title: DevSecOps Engineer – Secure Software Flow
description:
SiNIX is growing and we are looking for a DevSecOps Engineers who wants to integrate security directly into modern development and delivery workflows. This role is for engineers who enjoy automation, cloud platforms, and solving security challenges close to real development environments.


Together with our clients, we design and evolve software factories — CI/CD pipelines, cloud platforms and developer environments — where secure practices are built into everyday engineering.

**Your Role**  

As a DevSecOps Engineer at SiNIX, you help teams build secure-by-default development flows. You work close to developers and platform teams to embed security into pipelines, infrastructure, and automation.


Your work focuses on enabling teams to move fast while maintaining strong security foundations. We are focused on developments in the AI market and respond effectively. We also want to review how we currently use AI tools and ensure proper security around them.  

  



You will work with:

* Designing and securing CI/CD pipelines
* Integrating security controls into build, test and release workflows
* Securing cloud and Kubernetes-based platforms
* Automating vulnerability scanning and security validation
* Managing secrets and secure configuration practices
* Software supply chain security, software dependencies and artifact integrity
* Identity & Access Management for developer platforms
* Policy-as-Code and automated guardrails
* Improving traceability from commit to deployment
* Supporting teams with practical DevSecOps practices
 **What We Look For**  

You are likely an engineer with a DevOps or platform background who has moved toward security — or a security engineer who prefers automation over governance.  

  



We expect experience with:

* DevSecOps or platform engineering roles
* CI/CD tooling (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins or similar)
* Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure or GCP)
* Containers and Kubernetes environments
* Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, Pulumi or similar)
* Linux systems and networking fundamentals
* Security tooling integrated into pipelines (SAST, DAST, SCA or container scanning)
* Identity & Access Management concepts (OIDC, OAuth2, RBAC)
* Secrets management solutions
* Scripting (Python, Bash, Powershell, or similar)
* Programming (Python, Go, or similar)
* Collaborative work with development teams
**Meriting**

* Software supply chain security (SBOM, signing, provenance)
* Pentest
* Security assessment
* Policy-as-Code
* Kubernetes security or platform hardening
* Threat modeling in agile development environments
**Who are you**  

You are a curious, solution-oriented individual with a passion for problem-solving and a courageous mindset. You are driven by the next generation of technology and constantly look for ways to optimize workflows. You enjoy learning continuously and sharing knowledge with those around you. You take ownership, thrive in collaborative teams, and actively contribute to a positive and open atmosphere.

**About SiNIX**  

At SiNIX, we prioritize the value of our colleagues by creating memorable experiences and sharing skills. We empower our employees with choices in training, vacation time, and flexible salaries, fostering a supportive and thriving work environment. Our aim is to inspire ongoing growth and development, making success a shared journey.

title: DevOps Engineer / Platform Engineer
description:
**Om uppdraget**
----------------


Vi söker en erfaren DevOps Engineer / Platform Engineer till ett uppdrag hos en av våra kunder. Du kommer att vara en central del i arbetet med att bygga, förvalta och vidareutveckla kundens plattform och CI/CD-pipelines. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med utvecklings- och driftsteam för att säkerställa hög tillgänglighet, säkerhet och skalbarhet i infrastrukturen.

**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

* Designa, bygga och förvalta CI/CD-pipelines och automatiseringsflöden
* Hantera och vidareutveckla molninfrastruktur (Azure/AWS/GCP)
* Arbeta med containerorkestrering via Kubernetes och Docker
* Driva arbetet med Infrastructure as Code (IaC) med verktyg som Terraform eller Bicep
* Säkerställa övervakning, loggning och incidenthantering
* Samarbeta tätt med utvecklingsteam i ett agilt arbetssätt
* Bidra till säkerhetsarbetet i infrastrukturen (DevSecOps)  

  

**Skall-krav:**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av DevOps- eller plattformsarbete
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av minst en stor molnplattform (Azure, AWS eller GCP)
* Erfarenhet av Kubernetes och containerbaserade miljöer
* Vana att arbeta med CI/CD-verktyg som Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions eller GitLab CI
* God erfarenhet av IaC, t.ex. Terraform, Bicep eller CloudFormation  

  

**Bör-krav:**
* Certifiering inom relevant molnplattform
* Erfarenhet av DevSecOps och säkerhetsautomatisering
* Erfarenhet av Helm, ArgoCD eller liknande verktyg
* Erfarenhet från offentlig sektor eller reglerade miljöer  

  

***Förmåner och utvecklingsmöjligheter på Liminity***


	+ Omfattande utbildningsmöjligheter och certifieringar.
	+ Konkurrenskraftiga löner och attraktiva förmåner.
	+ Läs mer om oss och våra erbjudanden i vår handbok.
Känns detta som rätt utmaning för dig? Ansök nu och bli en del av Liminity!

title: Kravanalytiker/Testledare
description:
### **Rollbeskrivning**


Vi söker en erfaren kravanalytiker för ett uppdrag på 50–100 %. För rätt person kan uppdraget kombineras med testledning upp till heltid. Rollen innebär att planera, driva och dokumentera kravarbete för komplexa och integrerade system, med fokus på en komplett, verifierbar och spårbar kravbild genom hela projektet.

### **Arbetsuppgifter**

* Planera, leda och dokumentera kravarbete i projektets olika faser
* Ta fram kravplaner, kravspecifikationer samt stödja framtagning av processer och arbetsflöden
* Säkerställa att funktionella och icke-funktionella krav är tydliga, kompletta och verifierbara
* Stödja upphandlingsarbete genom att besvara leverantörsfrågor samt medverka vid utvärdering av anbud utifrån kravuppfyllnad
* Samverka nära med projektledning samt samarbeta med verksamhet, utvecklare och testresurser

**Vid kombinerad testledningsdel ingår även:**

* Planera, samordna och följa upp testarbetet (t.ex. funktionstest, acceptanstest, tekniska tester, systemintegrationstest, regressionstest)
* Identifiera testbehov och koordinera testaktiviteter med leverantör
* Rapportera status, risker och testresultat till projektledning

### **Krav**

* Certifiering enligt **IREB** eller motsvarande kompetens
* Minst **5 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet** som kravanalytiker
* Mycket god förmåga att ta fram dokumentation och presentera innehåll **på svenska**
* Erfarenhet av kravhantering i samband med **upphandlingar**
* Erfarenhet av kravarbete i **komplexa och integrerade systemmiljöer**
* Strukturerat arbetssätt samt god samarbets- och kommunikationsförmåga

### **Meriterande**

* Minst **9 års** dokumenterad erfarenhet som kravanalytiker
* Praktisk erfarenhet av **testledning** och testarbete
* **ISTQB-certifiering**
* Erfarenhet av testverktyg såsom **Azure DevOps** (eller motsvarande)
* Erfarenhet av upphandlingar enligt **LOU**
* Erfarenhet från projekt inom **offentlig verksamhet** med inriktning mot **vård**

### **Start/Längd**

* **Start:** 2026-03-30
* **Längd:** Till 2026-12-31
* **Omfattning:** 50–100 %

### **Plats**

**Göteborg**

**Om Rasulson Consulting**
--------------------------


Rasulson Consulting är ett specialiserat bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag inom IT-sektorn. Vi samarbetar med både etablerade teknikbolag och innovativa startupföretag för att erbjuda attraktiva karriärmöjligheter för dig som vill utvecklas inom digitalisering och IT. Genom vår djupa tekniska kompetens och vårt omfattande nätverk matchar vi rätt konsult med rätt uppdrag – snabbt och träffsäkert. Hos oss får du personlig rådgivning, kontinuerlig återkoppling och möjlighet att ta nästa steg i din karriär.

title: Infrastrukturingenjör
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsultkollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 4 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Kubernetes i produktionsmiljö
* Minst 4 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Linuxbaserade servermiljöer
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete i DevOps-miljö
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Kafka i produktionsmiljö
* Minst 4 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete i miljöer med relationsdatabas (t.ex. Oracle, SQL)
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (t.ex. Helm, Terraform eller likvärdigt)
* Kommunicera på svenska i både tal och skrift

  

**Meriterande**  

* Dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av OpenShift i produktionsmiljö
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av konfiguration och drift av Tomcat-applikationer i produktionsmiljö
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av att driva migrering av en stor plattform från server till container
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator eller liknande
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av GitOps, t.ex. ArgoCD, Nexus eller Red Hat Quay
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av övervakning, t.ex. Elastic APM eller Kibana
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Load balancer
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av CI/CD, t.ex. Bitbucket eller Git
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Pega som plattform
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Jira och Confluence

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 18-03-2026 **Om Oss**  

Att jobba på Deploja är något helt annat än att arbeta på ett vanligt konsultbolag – och det är vi riktigt stolta över. Vad är det då som gör oss unika?

  

Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.


Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.

  

Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Projektledare Dynamics 365 och Power Platform
description:
Vi söker en engagerad och erfaren **Projektledare** med spetskompetens inom **Microsoft Dynamics 365** och **Power Platform** som vill leda komplexa implementationsprojekt från ax till limpa.


Du blir spindeln i nätet mellan kund, konsulter och intressenter med ansvar för att leverera affärsnytta i tid, inom budget och med hög kvalitet. Fokus ligger på att skapa värde genom smarta, skalbara lösningar inom **Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement**, **Project Operations**, **Power Apps**, **Power Automate**, **Power BI** och **Dataverse** - ofta med inslag av AI och automation.

**Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden:**

* Leda hela projektlivscykeln: Från kravinsamling och planering till utveckling, test, go-live och efterföljande optimering.
* Skapa och äga realistiska **projektplaner**, tidsplaner, budgetar, resursplaner och riskregister.
* Genomföra workshops, kravinsamling och **fit/gap-analyser** - omvandla affärsbehov till konkreta lösningar.
* Leda och koordinera tvärfunktionella team (funktionella konsulter, utvecklare, testledare, arkitekter).
* Ansvara för daglig projektstyrning, statusrapportering och proaktiv **stakeholder management**.
* Hantera scope, förändringar, risker och issues - förebygga och hantera scope creep.
* Säkerställa god **kvalitet**, integrationer (Azure, ERP, externa API:er) och efterlevnad av beprövade metoder (t.ex. Microsoft Sure Step/Success by Design).
* Driva **change management**, användarutbildning och adoption efter lansering.
* Bidra till kontinuerlig förbättring med hjälp av Power BI-rapporter och prestandamätning.

**Vad vi erbjuder:**

* Spännande kunduppdrag i framkant inom digital transformation
* Tillgång till Microsofts senaste verktyg, utbildningar och certifieringsstöd
* Flexibel hybridmodell (kontor + remote)
* Konkurrenskraftig lön + förmånspaket
* Utvecklingsmöjligheter i ett kunnigt och hjälpsamt team
* Möjlighet att verkligen göra skillnad för kundernas affär

**Vem är du?**

* Minst 3 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av projektledning inom IT-implementationer, varav minst 2 års praktisk erfarenhet av **Dynamics 365** och/eller **Power Platform**-projekt.
* Van vid full lifecycle-leveranser (nyimplementation, uppgradering, migrering).
* God vana av både **agila** (Scrum, Kanban) och traditionella projektmodeller.
* God kunskap om **Dynamics 365**-moduler (Sales, Customer Service, Field Service, Project Operations m.fl.)
* Stark förståelse för **Power Platform** (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, Dataverse)
* Erfarenhet av integrationer (Azure, API:er, Logic Apps, etc.)


Grundläggande kunskap i Azure Data Factory, säkerhetsarkitektur eller DevOps-verktyg är ett plus.

**Verktyg du gärna behärskar:**

* Azure DevOps, Jira eller liknande
* Microsoft Project / Planner
* Teams, SharePoint

**Personliga egenskaper:**

* Stark kommunikationsförmåga på **svenska** och **engelska** (tal & skrift)
* Naturlig ledare som får med sig både team och kund
* Strukturerad, lösningsorienterad och stresstålig
* Affärsmässig med god förståelse för kundens processer och mål

**Meriterande certifieringar:**

* Microsoft Certified: Dynamics 365 / Power Platform (Fundamentals, Functional Consultant, Solution Architect etc.)
* PMP, SAFe, AgilePM eller liknande
* PL-200, PL-400, MB-200-serien m.fl.

**Om Softronic:**


Vi är ett ledande nordiskt IT-bolag som stärker våra kunders IT-förmåga i en allt mer komplex digital värld. Med bred och djup kompetens hjälper vi organisationer att skapa stabila, säkra och moderna lösningar från applikationsutveckling och integration till infrastruktur, drift och säkerhet.


Vi tar ett helhetsansvar för IT och arbetar långsiktigt, både med våra kunder och med varandra. Hos oss är gemenskap, engagemang och utveckling en självklar del av vardagen. När vi trivs och växer tillsammans skapar vi också större värde.

 **Låter det intresserant?** Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.


Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.

  

Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Kravanalytiker/Testledare
description:
Rollbeskrivning
  
Vi söker en erfaren kravanalytiker för ett uppdrag på 50–100 %. För rätt person kan uppdraget kombineras med testledning upp till heltid. Rollen innebär att planera, driva och dokumentera kravarbete för komplexa och integrerade system, med fokus på en komplett, verifierbar och spårbar kravbild genom hela projektet.
  
  

Arbetsuppgifter
  
Planera, leda och dokumentera kravarbete i projektets olika faser
  
Ta fram kravplaner, kravspecifikationer samt stödja framtagning av processer och arbetsflöden
  
Säkerställa att funktionella och icke-funktionella krav är tydliga, kompletta och verifierbara
  
Stödja upphandlingsarbete genom att besvara leverantörsfrågor samt medverka vid utvärdering av anbud utifrån kravuppfyllnad
  
Samverka nära med projektledning samt samarbeta med verksamhet, utvecklare och testresurser
  
  

**Vid kombinerad testledningsdel ingår även:**  

Planera, samordna och följa upp testarbetet (t.ex. funktionstest, acceptanstest, tekniska tester, systemintegrationstest, regressionstest)
  
Identifiera testbehov och koordinera testaktiviteter med leverantör
  
Rapportera status, risker och testresultat till projektledning
  
  

Krav
  
Certifiering enligt IREB eller motsvarande kompetens
  
Minst 5 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet som kravanalytiker
  
Mycket god förmåga att ta fram dokumentation och presentera innehåll på svenska
  
Erfarenhet av kravhantering i samband med upphandlingar
  
Erfarenhet av kravarbete i komplexa och integrerade systemmiljöer
  
Strukturerat arbetssätt samt god samarbets- och kommunikationsförmåga
  
  

Meriterande
  
Minst 9 års dokumenterad erfarenhet som kravanalytiker
  
Praktisk erfarenhet av testledning och testarbete
  
ISTQB-certifiering
  
Erfarenhet av testverktyg såsom Azure DevOps (eller motsvarande)
  
Erfarenhet av upphandlingar enligt LOU
  
Erfarenhet från projekt inom offentlig verksamhet med inriktning mot vård
  
  

Start/Längd
  
**Start:** 2026-03-30
  
**Längd:** Till 2026-12-31
  
**Omfattning:** 50–100 %
  
  

Plats
  
Göteborg
  
  

Om Rasulson Consulting
  
Rasulson Consulting är ett specialiserat bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag inom IT-sektorn. Vi samarbetar med både etablerade teknikbolag och innovativa startupföretag för att erbjuda attraktiva karriärmöjligheter för dig som vill utvecklas inom digitalisering och IT. Genom vår djupa tekniska kompetens och vårt omfattande nätverk matchar vi rätt konsult med rätt uppdrag – snabbt och träffsäkert. Hos oss får du personlig rådgivning, kontinuerlig återkoppling och möjlighet att ta nästa steg i din karriär.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Sweden Digital & IT Gothenburg Hybrid
Vårt kontor i Göteborg befinner sig i en spännande tillväxtfas, och vi söker nu fler talanger till vårt team inom Digitalization och Infotech!

  


About The Member Company
We are a global high-tech consultancy company with a team of entrepreneurial engineers, scientists, and digital experts from around the world. Together we form a fast-growing and proud community. We offer consultancy services to high-profile clients globally in diverse service areas, such as:


* Technology & Engineering
* Energy & Renewables
* Life sciences & Pharma
* Digital & IT
**About this vacancy**
----------------------


Är du en erfaren DevOps Engineer med minst 5 års erfarenhet och söker en ny utmaning? På TMC söker vi passionerade och engagerade ingenjörer med stark entusiasm för att optimera och automatisera system.


I denna roll får du en central position i att utveckla och implementera lösningar för kontinuerlig integration och leverans. Du kommer att arbeta med att optimera deployment-pipelines, säkerställa hög tillgänglighet och prestanda för våra kunders system. Ditt ansvar inkluderar även att stödja utvecklingsteam med verktyg och processer som förbättrar effektiviteten och kvaliteten i kundens Mjukvaruleverans.


Du kommer att arbeta i en dynamisk miljö med nära samarbete mellan olika team, vilket ger dig möjlighet att utveckla både tekniska och kommunikativa färdigheter.


**What we expect from you**
---------------------------


Vi söker dig som är utbildad högskole- eller civilingenjör med minst 5 års erfarenhet i roller som DevOps Engineer, Release Manager, Cloud Engineer eller liknande. Du drivs av att förbättra och effektivisera system och processer och har ett stort intresse för automatisering och skalbarhet. Vi förutsätter att du behärskar både engelska och svenska flytande i tal och skrift.


﻿


Meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:

* Verktyg och ramverk: Jenkins, Travis CI, Docker, Kubernetes
* Programmeringsspråk och skriptspråk: Python, Bash, Ruby
* Molnplattformar: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud
* Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Ansible


**What you can expect from us**
-------------------------------


I rollen som Employeneur får du både utveckla dina tekniska kunskaper och driva din egen utveckling och affär. Du blir del av en innovativ och entreprenöriell organisation där fokuset ligger på ständig utveckling och möjligheten att vara fullt ansvarig för att styra din egen karriär.

  

Vi lägger stor vikt vid ditt personliga engagemang och din vilja att driva din utveckling framåt. För att lyckas med det ges du chansen att själv påverka vilken typ av projekt du tar dig an samt vilken kompetensutveckling du vill investera i. Du styr din karriär helt enkelt.

  

Eftersom TMC är ett internationellt företag kan vi erbjuda projekt på olika platser i olika länder där vi och våra kunder finns. För närvarande finns vi representerade i Sverige, Nederländerna, Belgien, Frankrike, Luxemburg, Spanien, Portugal, Italien, Ungern, U.A.E., USA och Kanada. Du får världen som arbetsplats!


#LI-LM4


The 5 basic principles of **employeneurship**
A long-term working relationship
Enjoy the security of a long-term contract and a stable source of income while getting the opportunity to work at diverse projects.


Individual profit sharing
Full transparency. That’s it. For each of your projects, you know your hourly rate, your costs, and your individual performance-based profit sharing, all in order to stimulate your inner entrepreneur.


Business cells
Our employeneurs are grouped in business cells based on their technical expertise. They are small, focused and function as high-grade knowledge networks. And as buzzing communities of close colleagues.


YOUniversity
Every employeneur drives their own career. Together, we make a plan for personal and professional growth. Receive personal coaching and an extensive training budget to keep developing yourself and deliver outperformance at our clients.

  

The Entrepreneurial Lab
Work on your technical dreams in our lab. Collaborate with others in multidisciplinary teams to unlock out-of-the-box thinking and innovative ideas as well as entrepreneurial skills.
company_description: At TMC we believe it's people who drive technology. Our Employeneurship model creates the best conditions for technical talents to do so.

title: Platform Manager (Compute Storage Database)| Technology & Platform
description:
**Company Description** **Hej Platform Manager! Ready to help shape the future with smart, innovative solutions?**


At IKEA, you can feel at home while making a difference for millions. We’re a place where everyone is welcome, encouraged to explore new tech, try new things and grow from mistakes. As our Platform Manager, you’ll have the chance to stretch your skills, experiment and work in new ways.


We are transforming the Technology and Platform organisation to build a modern and scalable technology foundation for Inter IKEA. To make this shift possible, we need an organisation that is fully aligned with our Operating Model: one that works with a strong product‑ and platform‑thinking mindset and is ready to take full accountability from strategy to operations.

 **Job Description** **About the role**


As Platform Manager for Compute, Storage & Database, you take responsibility for the key platform domains that keep IKEA running. We are moving beyond managing infrastructure toward building a Compute & Database-as-a-Service model, where you lead the creation of modern, automated, and self-service capabilities that empower our product teams to build and scale with ease. With a clear vision and roadmap, you guide technology choices and monitor market trends, ensuring strong lifecycle management that spans from initial design and financial governance to continuous improvement and modernisation.


Your leadership drives the shift toward cloud-native and integrated solutions, ensuring our platforms evolve to meet the needs of the many. By applying a product-thinking mindset, you measure success through the developer experience and the seamless delivery of infrastructure. This transformation relies on your ability to create As-a-Service Delivery, transforming compute, storage, and databases into intuitive, software-defined products that remove friction for engineering teams. You work in close partnership with our Public Cloud and Data Center teams to achieve Hybrid-Cloud Synergy, building a "Golden Path" that bridges on-prem reliability with public cloud agility across the entire IKEA value chain.


People leadership is the heart of this role. You grow high-performing teams, build competence for the future, and create an environment where innovation and collaboration can thrive. You manage budgets and optimise spend through Federated Accountability, providing the automated guardrails and FinOps governance that allow teams to own their own consumption, costs, and performance. By fostering strong DevOps practices and building productive supplier relationships, you help IKEA make better technology decisions that are always grounded in simplicity and purpose.

**About you**


You combine technical depth in high-availability systems with a strong product leadership mindset. You understand that "infrastructure" is now code, and you thrive on turning complex backend technologies into simple, consumable services. You lead with IKEA values, developing high-performing teams that understand that with empowerment comes the responsibility for excellence.

**You are a champion of modern engineering, comfortable with:**

* **Software-Defined everything:** You bring a software engineering mindset to scale, using automation and Policy-as-Code (OPA) to manage tiered storage and distributed systems.
* **DBaaS & Data Governance:** You have experience scaling Database-as-a-Service models that are secure-by-default and resilient.
* **Developer Experience (DevEx):** You are passionate about shortening delivery cycles, ensuring that requesting a compute resource or a database is as simple as a single API call.


You navigate the full lifecycle of digital products from landing zone automation and release management to IT service operations, supported by frameworks like Agile and DevOps. Security, privacy, and risk management are not "extra steps" for you; they are a natural part of how you design resilient platforms.


As a people-centred leader, you enjoy making the complex simple and translating technology into clear business language. You understand IKEA’s strategic direction and use this to guide platform decisions that balance business needs with long-term value. You are a collaborator at heart, building trust across units and influencing others with clarity and purpose. Budget management, cost optimisation, and navigating fast-changing environments are familiar parts of your daily work, and you bring a structured, calm approach to even the most complex transformations.

**To be successful in this role, the following knowledge, skills and experiences would be valuable:**

* Total Accountability: Proven experience in owning a large-scale infrastructure domain, balancing operational excellence with strategic modernisation.
* Product-Led Mindset: Skilled in product management and operations at scale, with a track record of developing infrastructure "as-a-service" and a strong curiosity about technology trends.
* IKEA Leadership: Demonstrates accountability, handles uncertainty and complex dependencies, leads with IKEA values, and shows pragmatism in decision-making.
* Expertise in Platforms & Architecture: Strong understanding of technology ecosystems across cloud, on-prem, and hybrid environments, including DevOps, automation, and software engineering principles.
* Software Engineering at Scale: Experience with DBaaS governance, tiered object storage, and high-availability distributed systems.
* Modernisation & Lifecycle: Deep knowledge of emerging solutions and best practices for platform lifecycle management, portfolio governance, and modernisation.
* Collaborative Leadership: The ability to work across boundaries—specifically with Cloud and Data Center teams—to create a seamless, unified technology foundation.
* Operational Excellence: Experience applying agile frameworks, scaled delivery models, and IT service operations, using metrics and OKRs to track value and drive continuous improvement.
* People Development: Proven experience leading and developing high-performing technical teams, coaching talent, and driving organisational change across mixed sourcing models.
* Strategic FinOps: Experience with budget ownership and unit cost economics within a defined domain or organisational area.
* Risk & Compliance: Ability to apply security-by-design and privacy-by-design principles, take ownership of risk prevention, and manage digital risks within platform delivery.

**About us**


At IKEA, we think and work differently. We challenge old patterns and create new solutions, whether that’s a music-playing lamp or plant-based food that’s better for the planet. Our vision is simple: to create a better everyday life for the many people.


In Technology and Platform, we support the whole organisation by providing reliable technology and digital platforms that are easy to use and built for the future. By working closely with others across IKEA, we turn technology into real value and support ongoing transformation.

 **Additional Information**  

This is a full-time position located in either Malmö or Delft. The role reports into the Platform Area Manager – Core Infra and Compute Platforms and belongs to the Technology and Platform area within Operations Management. It is an enabling function with the core assignment to lead, develop, and maintain the common foundation for how Inter IKEA works across the value chain.


Interested? Submit your CV by **18th March 2026**.


If you have any special needs that require accommodation in the recruitment process, please let us know. You can reach out to jamila.harmal2@inter.ikea.com

 *At IKEA, we are looking for people who believe everyone deserves a seat at the table. You’re welcome no matter where you come from, what you believe, and what you look like. We don’t even care how you have furnished your home. We’re interested in you simply because you’re you. Even if your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. We believe that people’s different perspectives, backgrounds, and personalities make us better at understanding our customers’ dreams and needs. At IKEA, we’re all on the same project.*
company_description: At IKEA, we share an inspiring vision: “to create a better everyday life for the many people”.

title: Platform Manager (Public Cloud) | Technology & Platform
description:
**Company Description** **Hej Platform Manager! Ready to help shape the future with smart, innovative solutions?**


At IKEA, you can feel at home while making a difference for millions. We’re a place where everyone is welcome, encouraged to explore new tech, try new things and grow from mistakes. As our Platform Manager, you’ll have the chance to lead the evolution of our cloud foundation, turning complex hyperscale capabilities into a seamless product for the many.


We are transforming the Technology and Platform organisation to build a modern and scalable technology foundation for Inter IKEA. To make this shift possible, we need an organisation that is fully aligned with our Operating Model: one that works with a strong product‑ and platform‑thinking mindset and is ready to take full accountability from strategy to operations.

 **Job Description** **About the role**


As Platform Manager for Public Cloud, you guide our cloud platform domains, so they run smoothly, securely, and cost‑effectively and always aligned with IKEA standards. With a clear eye on performance and compliance, you make sure our public‑cloud platforms are dependable foundations for the many digital solutions across IKEA.

**You lead the full platform lifecycle with a focus on removing friction:**

* **Platform-as-a-Product:** You treat our cloud capabilities as a product, where your success is measured by the velocity and autonomy of the engineering teams who consume them.
* **Automated Guardrails:** You lead the shift toward Policy-as-Code, replacing manual compliance checks with automated, "invisible" guardrails that allow teams to stay secure by default.


Working across our technology and platform networks, you connect the needs of different stakeholders into one shared direction. You communicate roadmaps and activity plans in a simple and inspiring way, build awareness around platform capabilities, and strengthen adoption of common ways of working, tools, and processes. Along the way, you nurture close relationships with our suppliers, ensuring contracts, governance, and collaboration follow IKEA ways of working.


Leading people is a big part of the job. You grow high‑performing, curious teams with the skills we need today and in the future. Through competence development, succession planning, and an innovation mindset, you create the conditions for teams to thrive. You also take responsibility for budget planning, cost monitoring, and optimising spend. And by encouraging DevOps practices, automation, and a great developer experience, you help shorten delivery cycles and make life easier for engineering teams across IKEA.

**About you**


You combine technical depth with a product leadership mindset. You understand that a great cloud platform is one that gets out of the way of the developer while maintaining total resilience. You lead with IKEA values, developing a high-performing team that takes total ownership of the platform’s success.

**You are a pioneer of modern cloud engineering, comfortable with:**

* **Landing Zone Automation:** Treating infrastructure as software to create a consistent, global foundation.
* **Policy-as-Code (OPA):** Using technology to enable safe, decentralized decision-making.
* **Developer Experience (DevEx):** A passion for shortening delivery cycles together with the DevEx platform team, and making life easier for engineering teams.


You understand how IKEA works as a franchise system and have a good sense of our strategic direction and core business needs. You enjoy translating complex technical topics into simple business language, staying close to market trends and emerging technologies to guide future decisions. Budget awareness, cost optimisation and strong organisational skills help you lead transformation in a clear and structured way, even in fast‑changing or ambiguous situations.


You’re a people‑centred leader who develops high‑performing technical teams and builds strong collaboration across units. Motivated by the IKEA culture and values, you bring energy to platform development and take initiative to drive results. You know how to influence others, navigate complexity and integrate governance, security and resilience into platform strategies. With a growth mindset, excellent communication skills and a passion for continuous improvement, you help create better solutions for the many.

**To be successful in this role, the following knowledge, skills and experiences would be valuable:**

* Total Accountability: Proven experience in owning a large-scale public cloud domain, from strategy to unit cost economics (FinOps).
* Product-Led Mindset: A track record of building platforms that focus on ease-of-use, self-service, and high adoption.
* Strategic Influence: The ability to move the organization toward cloud-native adoption through mentorship and shared standards.
* Resilience & Security-by-Design: An "automated-first" approach to risk management and compliance.
* Hands‑on experience with software engineering at scale, such as landing zone automation, Policy‑as‑Code (OPA) and working with hyperscaler shared‑responsibility models.
* Proven ability to lead and develop high‑performing technical teams, coach others and drive organisational change across mixed sourcing models.
* Experience owning budgets and managing cost within a defined domain or organisational area.
* Deep knowledge of technology trends, emerging solutions and best practices for platform lifecycle management, modernisation and portfolio governance.
* Ability to apply security‑by‑design and privacy‑by‑design principles, take ownership of risk prevention and lead remediation activities.
* Awareness of regulatory changes, compliance requirements and digital risk management in platform delivery.
* Strong problem‑solving and decision‑making skills, combining analytical thinking with hands‑on operational experience to optimise complex technology landscapes.

**About us**


At IKEA, we think and work differently. We challenge old patterns and create new solutions, whether that’s a music-playing lamp or plant-based food that’s better for the planet. Our vision is simple: to create a better everyday life for the many people.


In Technology and Platform, we support the whole organisation by providing reliable technology and digital platforms that are easy to use and built for the future. By working closely with others across IKEA, we turn technology into real value and support ongoing transformation.

 **Additional Information**  

This is a full-time position located in either Malmö or Delft. The role reports into the Platform Area Manager – Core Infra and Compute Platforms and belongs to the Technology and Platform area within Operations Management. It is an enabling function with the core assignment to lead, develop, and maintain the common foundation for how Inter IKEA works across the value chain.


Interested? Submit your CV by **18th March 2026**.


If you have any special needs that require accommodation in the recruitment process, please let us know. You can reach out to jamila.harmal2@inter.ikea.com

We don’t even care how you have furnished your home. We’re interested in you simply because you’re you. title: Platform Manager (End-user Computing) | Technology & Platform
description:
**Company Description** **Hej Platform Manager! Ready to help shape the future with smart, innovative solutions?**


At IKEA, you can feel at home while making a difference for millions. We’re a place where everyone is welcome, encouraged to explore new tech, try new things and grow from mistakes. As our Platform Manager, you’ll have the chance to stretch your skills, experiment and work in new ways.


We are transforming the Technology and Platform organisation to build a modern and scalable technology foundation for Inter IKEA. To make this shift possible, we need an organisation that is fully aligned with our Operating Model: one that works with a strong product‑ and platform‑thinking mindset and is ready to take full accountability from strategy to operations.

 **Job Description** **About the role**


We’re looking for a Platform Manager who wants to solve meaningful, real‑world challenges that help make life at home better for the many. Join us on our journey as we strengthen and evolve our technology platforms and digital services to enable safe, reliable, and sustainable experiences across IKEA.


As Platform Manager for End-user computing, you lead a dedicated team responsible for the foundational hardware and client platforms that our co-workers rely on every day. You don't just manage inventory; you lead the evolution of our global client fleet and print services into a high-scale enablement model. You take full end-to-end accountability for the performance, security, and lifecycle of our diverse hardware landscape—including Windows, Macs, phones, tablets, and rugged devices—and the mission-critical print infrastructure throughout our offices, distribution centres, and stores.


You treat End-user computing services as products, where success is measured by the stability, security, and ease of use for the co-worker, regardless of their device or location. Driving the shift toward cloud-managed environments and ensuring that our mobility solutions and rugged devices are secure and ready for the demands of the value chain. You take ownership of technology choices, hardware standards, and financial governance to ensure our foundation is cost-efficient, sustainable, and future-ready.


Collaboration is central to your way of working. You partner with co-workers across technology and business networks to align capabilities with real needs, clearly communicating roadmaps and priorities. You also coordinate cross‑unit dependencies and help strengthen shared processes, tools and ways of working across IKEA.


As a leader, you build and develop high‑performing teams with the right competence for today and tomorrow. You own the budget for your area, ensuring responsible planning and cost optimisation. You also manage suppliers and contracts in a way that supports our ways of working and delivers value for IKEA. Through your leadership, our end‑user computing platforms remain simple, secure and ready for the many co‑workers who rely on them.

**About you**


You bring a strong understanding of how foundational client technologies support the everyday needs of a global organization. You combine technical depth in client engineering with a strong product leadership mindset. You understand that the best platform is one that is stable, secure, and requires minimal manual intervention, whether it’s a laptop in an office, a phone in the store, or a rugged device in a warehouse. You understand modern management for a mixed fleet of Windows, Mac, and portable hardware like smartphones, tablets, PoS, rugged mobile devices and various other endpoints. You understand the importance of managing the complexity of print infrastructure across offices and distribution centres as a modern, automated platform.


You have hands‑on experience across IT service operations, release management and end‑to‑end digital product development. Frameworks like TOGAF, ITIL, Lean, Agile and DevOps are familiar to you, and you stay curious about emerging technologies and market trends. You’re mindful of security, privacy, compliance and risk, integrating them naturally into your decisions to create resilient and reliable platforms.


As a people‑centred leader, you develop high‑performing teams, grow competence and guide others through change with clarity. You collaborate easily with stakeholders across the IKEA network, supported by strong communication, organisational skills, and the ability to bring structure in complexity. Budget management and cost optimisation are part of how you deliver, balancing long‑term direction with simple and effective execution.


You thrive in a fast‑changing environment and bring a growth mindset exploring, learning and sharing better ways forward. You take initiative, drive results and feel energised by improving platforms that make work easier for the many co‑workers. Above all, you lead with IKEA values at the heart, using technology to enable “a better everyday life for the many.”

**To be successful in this role, the following knowledge, skills and experiences would be valuable:**

* Strong understanding of platforms, architecture, and technology ecosystems across cloud, on‑prem and hybrid environments, including DevOps, automation, software engineering principles, and Modern Endpoint Management (Intune/Jamf).
* Experience with Virtual Desktop solutions (VDI/DaaS) and broader Digital Workplace technologies, with the ability to integrate them into scalable and secure platform strategies.
* Expertise in Modern Endpoint Management across Windows, Mac, and various portable hardware and for example point of sales devices.
* Experience with global print infrastructure in complex environments (Offices, DCs and more), integrating it into a scalable "as-a-service" model.
* Proven experience in owning a platform domain, including strategy, budget (FinOps), and operational excellence.
* Experience applying platform-as-product principles to drive high reliability and a frictionless user experience.
* Experience managing global vendors and diverse hardware pools to ensure long-term value and sustainability for IKEA.
* An "automated-first" approach to risk prevention, patching, and compliance within a mixed client and mobility landscape.


Above all, to thrive at IKEA, you should lead with our values and enjoy working in a culture built on togetherness, simplicity, cost-consciousness and a drive to always find better ways.

**About us**


At IKEA, we think and work differently. We challenge old patterns and create new solutions, whether that’s a music-playing lamp or plant-based food that’s better for the planet. Our vision is simple: to create a better everyday life for the many people.


In Technology and Platform, we support the whole organisation by providing reliable technology and digital platforms that are easy to use and built for the future. By working closely with others across IKEA, we turn technology into real value and support ongoing transformation.

 **Additional Information**  

This is a full-time position located in either Malmö or Delft. The role reports into the Platform Area Manager – Core Infra and Compute Platforms and belongs to the Technology and Platform area within Operations Management. It is an enabling function with the core assignment to lead, develop, and maintain the common foundation for how Inter IKEA works across the value chain.


Interested? Submit your CV by **18th March 2026**.


If you have any special needs that require accommodation in the recruitment process, please let us know. You can reach out to jamila.harmal2@inter.ikea.com

*At IKEA, we are looking for people who believe everyone deserves a seat at the table. You’re welcome no matter where you come from, what you believe, and what you look like. We don’t even care how you have furnished your home. We’re interested in you simply because you’re you. Even if your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. We believe that people’s different perspectives, backgrounds, and personalities make us better at understanding our customers’ dreams and needs. At IKEA, we’re all on the same project.*
company_description: At IKEA, we share an inspiring vision: “to create a better everyday life for the many people”.

title: Platform Manager (Private Cloud & Data Centre) | Technology & Platform
description:
**Company Description** **Hej Platform Manager! Ready to help shape the future with smart, innovative solutions?**


At IKEA, you can feel at home while making a difference for millions. We’re a place where everyone is welcome, encouraged to explore new tech, try new things, and grow from mistakes. As our Platform Manager, you’ll have the chance to stretch your skills, experiment and work in new ways.


We are transforming the Technology and Platform organisation to build a modern and scalable technology foundation for Inter IKEA. To make this shift possible, we need an organisation that is fully aligned with our Operating Model: one that works with a strong product‑ and platform‑thinking mindset and is ready to take full accountability from strategy to operations.

 **Job Description** **About the role**


We’re looking for a Platform Manager who wants to solve meaningful, real‑world challenges that help make life at home better for the many. Join us on our journey as we strengthen and evolve our technology platforms and digital services to enable safe, reliable, and sustainable experiences across IKEA.


As Platform Manager for Private Cloud & Data Center, you lead the team responsible for a core part of IKEA’s digital foundation. You don't just manage infrastructure; you lead the evolution of our data centers into a modern, Software-Defined Data Center (SDDC) model. You take full end-to-end accountability for the vision, strategy, and roadmap of our private cloud, ensuring it acts as a high-performing and seamless "as-a-service" enabler for the entire organization.


A big part of the role is leading the full lifecycle of the platforms you own. This includes making technology decisions, managing financial governance, and driving continuous improvement. You will lead modernisation initiatives across our private cloud and data center landscape. Including cloud‑native approaches and integrated solutions that strengthen scalability and resilience. Staying close to market trends keeps your strategy future‑ready and relevant.


Collaboration is essential. You will work closely across technology and platform networks, enterprise architecture, and business stakeholders to ensure platform capabilities meet real business needs. Bringing people together around shared roadmaps, common tools and aligned ways of working is key. You will also manage supplier relationships, ensuring contracts, governance and delivery follow IKEA’s ways of working, while coordinating dependencies across units to build consistency and understanding of our platform landscape.


As a leader, you will grow high‑performing teams and nurture an innovative, learning‑oriented mindset. Competence development, succession planning, and strong technical stewardship are central to the role. You will foster good practices in DevOps and automation and support an excellent developer experience so teams can deliver faster and with greater confidence. Through your leadership, our private cloud and data center platforms will remain reliable, modern, and ready for the many people we serve.

**About you**


You bring a strong understanding of how to connect technology, platforms, and architecture with real business needs, and you enjoy making the complex simple for others. With experience in software engineering at scale, cloud computing and service management, you feel at home navigating the full lifecycle of large‑scale platforms in a global environment.


You have a deep technical foundation that spans cloud platforms, automation, engineering principles and IT service operations. You understand Software‑Defined Data Centers (SDDC), hybrid‑cloud burst architectures and modern data center patterns that help create flexible and scalable solutions. You’re comfortable working with frameworks like TOGAF, ITIL, Lean, Agile and DevOps, and you know what it takes to keep services reliable, resilient and secure. Compliance, privacy and risk are part of your everyday thinking, and you integrate them naturally without slowing down progress.


You’re a people‑centred leader who builds strong teams, grows competence and leads confidently through change. You motivate and influence others with clear communication and a calm, structured approach — even in complexity. You lead with IKEA values at the heart, believe in the power of togetherness and enjoy using technology to enable the business and “a better everyday life for the many.”

**To be successful in this role, the following knowledge, skills and experiences would be valuable:**

* Knowledge of DevOps, automation, and software engineering at scale
* Experience with Software‑Defined Data Center (SDDC) and Hybrid‑cloud burst architectures
* Experience working with agile frameworks, scaled delivery models and IT service operations, with the ability to use metrics and OKRs to track value and drive continuous improvement.
* Ability to lead and develop high‑performing technical teams, coaching talent and driving organisational change across mixed sourcing models.
* Experience with budget ownership and cost management within a defined domain or organisational area.
* Deep knowledge of technology trends, emerging solutions and best practices for platform lifecycle management, modernisation, and portfolio governance.
* Ability to apply security‑by‑design and privacy‑by‑design principles, taking ownership for risk prevention and remediation.
* Awareness of regulatory developments, compliance requirements, and digital risk management in platform delivery.
* Strong problem‑solving and decision‑making skills, combining analytical thinking with hands‑on operational experience to manage and optimise complex technology landscapes.


Above all, to thrive at IKEA, you should lead with our values and enjoy working in a culture built on togetherness, simplicity, cost-consciousness, and a drive to always find better ways.

**About us**


At IKEA, we think and work differently. We challenge old patterns and create new solutions, whether that’s a music-playing lamp or plant-based food that’s better for the planet. Our vision is simple: to create a better everyday life for the many people.


In Technology and Platform, we support the whole organisation by providing reliable technology and digital platforms that are easy to use and built for the future. By working closely with others across IKEA, we turn technology into real value and support ongoing transformation.

 **Additional Information**  

This is a full-time position located in either Malmö or Delft. The role reports into the Platform Area Manager – Core Infra and Compute Platforms and belongs to the Technology and Platform area within Operations Management. It is an enabling function with the core assignment to lead, develop, and maintain the common foundation for how Inter IKEA works across the value chain.


Interested? Submit your CV by **18th March 2026**.


If you have any special needs that require accommodation in the recruitment process, please let us know. You can reach out to jamila.harmal2@inter.ikea.com

*At IKEA, we are looking for people who believe everyone deserves a seat at the table. You’re welcome no matter where you come from, what you believe, and what you look like. We don’t even care how you have furnished your home. We’re interested in you simply because you’re you. Even if your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. We believe that people’s different perspectives, backgrounds, and personalities make us better at understanding our customers’ dreams and needs. At IKEA, we’re all on the same project.*

title: DevOps Engineer / Platform Engineer
description:
Om uppdraget
   

  

 Vi söker en erfaren DevOps Engineer / Platform Engineer till ett uppdrag hos en av våra kunder. Du kommer att vara en central del i arbetet med att bygga, förvalta och vidareutveckla kundens plattform och CI/CD-pipelines. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med utvecklings- och driftsteam för att säkerställa hög tillgänglighet, säkerhet och skalbarhet i infrastrukturen.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Designa, bygga och förvalta CI/CD-pipelines och automatiseringsflöden
* Hantera och vidareutveckla molninfrastruktur (Azure/AWS/GCP)
* Arbeta med containerorkestrering via Kubernetes och Docker
* Driva arbetet med Infrastructure as Code (IaC) med verktyg som Terraform eller Bicep
* Säkerställa övervakning, loggning och incidenthantering
* Samarbeta tätt med utvecklingsteam i ett agilt arbetssätt
* Bidra till säkerhetsarbetet i infrastrukturen (DevSecOps)


**Skall-krav:**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av DevOps- eller plattformsarbete
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av minst en stor molnplattform (Azure, AWS eller GCP)
* Erfarenhet av Kubernetes och containerbaserade miljöer
* Vana att arbeta med CI/CD-verktyg som Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions eller GitLab CI
* God erfarenhet av IaC, t.ex. Terraform, Bicep eller CloudFormation


**Bör-krav:**
* Certifiering inom relevant molnplattform
* Erfarenhet av DevSecOps och säkerhetsautomatisering
* Erfarenhet av Helm, ArgoCD eller liknande verktyg
* Erfarenhet från offentlig sektor eller reglerade miljöer


***Förmåner och utvecklingsmöjligheter på Liminity***
* Omfattande utbildningsmöjligheter och certifieringar.
* Konkurrenskraftiga löner och attraktiva förmåner.
* Läs mer om oss och våra erbjudanden i vår handbok.


 Känns detta som rätt utmaning för dig? Ansök nu och bli en del av Liminity!

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team. In this role, you will build and evolve our cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and platform tooling, ensuring our systems are scalable, reliable, and secure as we grow.
   

  

 This is a hands-on builder role for someone who enjoys automation, ownership, and turning complexity into clean, scalable infrastructure.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, build, and maintain cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Implement and maintain monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions.
* Collaborate with developers to improve deployment workflows and platform reliability.
* Work with serverless technologies (Lambda) for event processing and automation.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to infrastructure projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document infrastructure architecture, processes, and runbooks.


 Success means engineers ship confidently, systems scale without drama, and incidents are rare, visible, and quickly resolved.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 5+ years of experience in DevOps, platform engineering, or backend development.
* Strong skills in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Experience with AWS services, particularly ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Experience with CI/CD tools and pipeline automation.
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with message queuing (SQS, SNS).
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Strong skills in monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Scripting skills in Python, Bash, or Go.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Enthusiasm for using AI agents and tools in daily development work.
* Experience in FinTech is a plus.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1/Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Infrastrukturingenjör
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsultkollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Minst 4 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Kubernetes i produktionsmiljö
* Minst 4 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Linuxbaserade servermiljöer
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete i DevOps-miljö
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Kafka i produktionsmiljö
* Minst 4 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete i miljöer med relationsdatabas (t.ex. Oracle, SQL)
* Minst 2 års dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (t.ex. Helm, Terraform eller likvärdigt)
* Kommunicera på svenska i både tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Dokumenterad arbetslivserfarenhet av OpenShift i produktionsmiljö
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av konfiguration och drift av Tomcat-applikationer i produktionsmiljö
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av att driva migrering av en stor plattform från server till container
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator eller liknande
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av GitOps, t.ex. ArgoCD, Nexus eller Red Hat Quay
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av övervakning, t.ex. Elastic APM eller Kibana
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Load balancer
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av CI/CD, t.ex. Bitbucket eller Git
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Pega som plattform
* Arbetslivserfarenhet av Jira och Confluence


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 18-03-2026
   

  

**Om Oss**
 Att jobba på Deploja är något helt annat än att arbeta på ett vanligt konsultbolag – och det är vi riktigt stolta över. Vad är det då som gör oss unika?
   

  

 Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.
   

  

 Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 🚗 Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Senior Test Coordinator
description:

 If this is you, then please do not delay in applying!
