title: Testledare
description:
**Techster Solutions** 
 befinner i dagsläget sig i en spännande tillväxtfas och söker nu fler kollegor, inledningsvis dig med minst
 **9+** 
 års erfarenhet och som kan stärka teamet.
   

  

 Du kan förvänta dig en omväxlande miljö, dagarna kan se väldigt olika ut - men en sak är säkert, här får du använda dina kompetenser och sätter själv gränsen för hur mycket du vill utvecklas. Som ett kunskapsbolag är det viktigt för oss att våra specialister delar med sig av sin kompetens och får kollegorna att växa.
   

  

**Roll och ansvar**
 Din roll är att arbeta operativt som testledare inom Balanseringen på SVK. Du är van med att arbeta med testplanering, samt att driva test mot testplan för önskat resultat. Vi vill att du har stor vana i att coacha kring framtagandet av testfall och att leda det dagliga arbetet inom test. Det är viktigt att du kan prioritera test samt vara tydlig med vad som är viktigt för att möta behovet på önskad produktkvalité. Du skall också löpande rapportera testprogress och status.
   

  

 Du kommer till stor del att arbeta med fokus på funktionella acceptanstester och systemintegrationstester men också till en viss del arbeta med mera IT nära tester i samband i våra olika migreringsprojekt.
   

  

 Du kommer även att arbeta med test i samband med anslutning - av marknadens leverantörer av balanstjänster ”BSP (Balancing Service Provider)/aktörer” - till våra olika stödtjänster. Här behöver du ha en god förståelse för elbranschens aktörer och deras verksamhet och kommunikationsteknik.
   

  

 Du kommer också att arbeta med regulatoriska projekt i samband med anslutning till plattformarna MARI och PICASSO.
   

  

 I din roll är det viktigt att du är öppen och kommunikativ då det är många intressenter kring test och du behöver ha en förmåga att hantera detta. Det är viktigt att du är samarbetsorienterad samt har god förmåga att dokumentera.
   

  

**I uppdraget ingår följande arbetsuppgifter:**
* Ansvara för att ta fram teststrategi och testplan med produktkvaliten som målbild.
* Stötta teamen och verksamheten med att utföra test
* Operativt säkerställa leverans av test mot strategi och testplan.
* Ansvara för Acceptanstest
* Säkerställa utförandet av System Integrationstester
* Arbeta med test i Agil kontext
* Arbeta med test i traditionell projektmodell
* Hantera Funktionella och icke funktionella tester
* Koordinera test mot både IT och verksamheten.
* Hantera och koordinera buggrättningar
* Dokumentera test i våra testverktyg JIRA och/eller Azure DevOps.
* Säkerställa rapportering av teststatus, testprogress samt testrapporter
* Delta i arbetet inom Europeiska och nordiska testrelaterade forum.
* Arbeta med test inom förvaltningen.


**Obligatoriska krav**
* Konsulten ska ha högskola/universitetsutbildning inom Ekonomi/Management eller Data/IT.
* Konsulten ska ha minst 9 års erfarenhet i rollen som testledare i projekt med mer är än 50 personer, organiserade i flera agila leveransteam som bygger driftkritiska system för kärnverksamheten.
* Konsulten ska ha minst 9 års dokumenterad erfarenhet inom test, testplanering och teststrategi, samt operativ ledning av systemintegrations- och acceptanstest.
* Konsulten ska ha minst 2års erfarenhet av Elbranschen
* Konsulten ska ha minst 2års erfarenhet av att koordinera integrationstester mellan olika företag (B2B).


**Meriterande**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av att ta fram riskbaserade tester
* Minst 5års erfarenhet av JIRA/Confluence och/eller Azure DevOps
* Minst 2års erfarenhet av automatiserade tester
* Minst 2års erfarenhet av tester av informationsflöden med CIM data exchange.


**Ansökan**
 Tror du att du är
 **Techster Solutions** 
 nästa stjärna? Tveka då inte att skicka in din ansökan redan nu. Urval sker löpande och tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Arbetsplats och kultur
   

  

 Vi är ett entreprenördrivet IT företag, med både produktkunskap och försäljning (Techster AB) och konsultativa tjänster (Techster Solutions AB). Det innebär att vi är mycket öppna för nya tekniska lösningar, kunskapsutbyte och ständigt lärande. Att ha roligt och samtidigt behålla den familjära andan utan hierarkier är lika viktigt.
   

  

 Vi vill skapa det konsultbolag som du alltid velat jobba för, men kanske inte hittat ännu. Redan idag har vi en blandning av seniora och yngre medarbetare, såväl som män och kvinnor. Det vill vi fortsätta att bygga på. Så välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Programvaruingenjör
description:
Visste du att 6 miljarder kronor i försäkringspengar aldrig hämtas ut i Sverige varje år?
 



 Det beror på att processen är krånglig, tidskrävande och överväldigande. Det vill vi ändra på! På Insurello bygger vi en plattform som gör det lättare för folk att få den ersättning de har rätt till. Vi har redan hjälpt 50 000 personer att få ut över en miljard kronor – och nu växlar vi upp! Är du vår nästa
 **Fullstack Software Engineer** 
 som vill göra skillnad på riktigt för miljoner människor?
 



**Varför Insurello?** 



* Gör skillnad på riktigt: Du får vara med och förändra en stel bransch med teknik som faktiskt hjälper folk.
* Jobba i empowered team, cross-functional team med frihet och ägandeskap att påverka teknikval, produktens roadmap och hur ni jobbar.
* Jobba i ett varm, inbjudande och inkluderande klimat där vi älskar samarbete, kunskapsdelning och att ha kul på vägen.
* Vad du kommer att göraUtveckla vår produkt både strategiskt och tekniskt i ett cross-functional empowered team.
* Bygga smarta fullstack-lösningar med fokus på funktionell programmering.
* Djupdyka i systemdesign, event-driven design och cloud-arkitektur.
* Köra par- och mobprogrammering.
* Utforska hur AI kan göra både utvecklingen och kundupplevelsen ännu vassare.



**Vår tech-stack:** 



* Programmeringsspråk: Elm, TypeScript, F#, ASP.NET Core.
* Databas
 **:** 
 PostgreSQL
* Data och events: Event sourcing, RabbitMQ
* Infrastruktur: AWS.



 Vem är du?
 



**Teknisk kompetens:** 



* Du har 6+ års erfarenhet och älskar fullstack-utveckling.
* Du är nyfiken på (eller expert på) funktionella språk som Elm, F# eller liknande.
* Du har koll på AWS och använder gärna AI-verktyg för att jobba smartare.
* Kunskaper inom modellering av system, gärna domain driven.
* Erfarenhet av att jobba med event sourcing och event-drivna system.
* Du behärskar både svenska och engelska obehindrat.



**Din personlighet:** 



* Du är nyfiken, prestigelös och trivs med att samarbeta fram pragmatiska lösningar.
* Du är en "product-minded" kodare som ser både kundnytta och affärsmöjligheter.
* Du vågar ta plats, dela dina idéer och utmana oss att bli ännu bättre!



 Kultur och förmåner
 



 Vi jobbar enligt våra values:
 


* We care for people – främjande av inkludering, empati och support.
* We innovate for impact – skapa värde och meningsfulla lösningar för våra kunder.
* We nurture trust – vi värdesätter transparens och samarbete i allt vi gör.



  





 När det gäller Product & Tech-teamet är vårt manifest enkelt:
 


* Tydlighet framför komplexitet
* Lärande genom experiment
* Gemensam riktning, lokala beslut
* Kvalitet genom samarbete
* Enkelhet och kostnadseffektivitet i allt vi bygger



  





 Om du brinner för fullstack-utveckling, moderna molnteknologier och att utforska hur AI kan lyfta både utvecdkling och kundvärde, så vill vi gärna prata mer med dig.
 



  





 Våra förmåner:
 



 🌴 30 dagars betald semester
 



 🌿 Tjänstepension via Avanza
 



 🏋️ Friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kr
 



 ⏱ Flexibla hybridarbetsmöjligheter med teamet baserat i Stockholm (vi jobbar från kontoret 1–2 dagar/vecka)
 



 🫄 Föräldralön
 



 🎐 Personliga terapisamtal
 



 🛡 Olycksfallsförsäkring som gäller dygnet runt – både i arbetet och på fritiden
 



 🥐 Teamfrukost varje vecka
 



 💃 Regelbundna after works och företagsevent – inklusive en årlig offsite i maj
 



  





 Kom och förändra försäkringsbranschen med oss! 🚀

title: Enablement Lead - AI & Data
description:
**Make data matter.** 
 Lead the charge in turning AI and analytics into real business impact.
   

  

**Join us**
 Join our team and help build production-grade AI and data solutions at global scale. We’re a fast-moving AI & Data hub focused on real impact - driving innovation, enabling the business, and solving meaningful challenges together.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of business strategy, development, and agile delivery, ensuring that our solutions are impactful, scalable, and aligned with enterprise priorities.
   

  

**Your mission**
 The Enablement Lead Team drives BI, ML, and AI initiatives by translating business needs into strategic, scalable data and AI solutions. Acting as product managers, Enablement Leads prioritize, guide, and deliver analytics and data initiatives that maximize business value and empower data‑driven decision‑making across the organization. You will bridge business stakeholders and technical teams, lead cross‑functional initiatives, and ensure the delivery of high‑quality, scalable data solutions.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Lead the planning, execution, and delivery of BI, ML, and AI initiatives using agile methodologies.
* Define, own, and evolve the value stream roadmap, vision, and priorities for data capabilities.
* Act as the primary interface between business stakeholders, analytics, and engineering teams.
* Drive cross‑functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable data products and platforms.
* Ensure alignment on objectives, outcomes, and measurable business value.
* Monitor progress, manage dependencies and risks, and ensure timely delivery of agreed deliverables.
* Promote best practices in agile ways of working, continuous improvement, and product thinking.


**Your profile**
 We are seeking a skilled Product or Project Manager with strong experience in agile delivery to drive the development of BI, ML, and AI capabilities. You have strong communication and stakeholder management skills and can effectively translate business needs into technical requirements and actionable roadmaps. The ideal candidate will demonstrate a high level of structure, planning, and organizational capability, ensuring clarity and efficiency throughout the project lifecycle.
   

  

**Required Qualifications And Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* 3+ years of experience in product or project management, preferably within BI, data engineering, data platforms, or AI/ML environments.
* Proven experience delivering data products or leading data infrastructure and platform initiatives.
* Knowledge of modern data architecture concepts such as Data Mesh, Data Products and Lakehouse architecture
* Experience working with agile tools such as Azure DevOps, Jira, or similar.
* Fluency in English


**Location and other**
 This position is located in Stockholm or Örebro.
   

  

 We can offer a hybrid workplace - a way of working that provides flexibility and promotes a healthier balance between professional and personal life.
   

  

**Why Epiroc?**
 By joining our team, you’ll make a big difference in the energy transition. At Epiroc, we take pride in being passionate innovators, driving the change toward a brighter future for both people and the planet. Guided by our values of Collaboration, Commitment, and Innovation, we foster a culture of trust, growth, and lasting impact.
   

  

 To support your journey, we offer a competitive Total Rewards Package, including:
   

  

* Global career opportunities
* Learning & Development programs
* Benefits package, including variable compensation (bonus)
* Flexible work culture promoting balance and well-being
* Global Parental Leave Policy
* Community involvement


**Application and contact information**
 We encourage you to submit your application through our online career site as soon as possible, but no later than March 17, 2026.
   

  

 We are committed to a thorough recruitment process, including interviews, reference checks and assessments. To ensure a safe working environment, we conduct identity checks and drug and alcohol screening. Our process is designed to be fair and inclusive; you can expect transparent communication and a balanced evaluation of your skills and experience.
   

  

 For questions about the position, please contact:
   

  

 Hiring Manager, Valentin Krehl, valentin.krehl@epiroc.com
   

  

 Recruitment specialist, Zuzana Kalivodova, zuzana.kalivodova@epiroc.com
   

  

**It all starts with people.** 
 The world needs metals and minerals for the energy transition and our cities and infrastructure must be developed to serve a growing population. To succeed, we need to speed up the shift towards more sustainable mining and construction industries. We at Epiroc accelerate this transformation, together with customers and business partners in more than 150 countries, by developing and providing innovative and safe equipment, digital solutions, and aftermarket support.
   

  

 All new thinkers are welcome. We are looking for those who want to develop, grow, and dare to think new. In Epiroc we attract, develop, and retain diverse talent valuing authenticity and unique perspectives, driving our spirit of innovation. We foster an inclusive culture where diversity isn't just a goal but a part of our values and way of working. This is how we do business for a sustainable future.  Learn more at www.epiroc.com

title: Data Engineer
description:
Är du intresserad av att arbeta med data över finansiella marknader och utveckla nya dataprodukter från idé till produktion? Är du även nyfiken på vad data faktiskt betyder? Hur rör sig pengarna genom det svenska finansiella systemet? Vilka mönster döljer sig i miljontals transaktioner? Då är denna tjänst för dig!
   

  

 Riksbanken söker dig som vill använda sin tekniska kompetens för att fortsätta utveckla Riksbankens finansmarknadsstatistik och bygga upp Riksbankens betalningsstatistik från grunden. Samtidigt som du utvecklar en djup domänkunskap inom finans- och betalningsmarknaden.
   

  

**DET HÄR GÖR DU HOS OSS**
 Riksbankens Statistik Består Till Stor Del Av Mikro- Och Transaktionsdata Över Den Svenska Finans- Och Betalningsmarknaden. Betalningsstatistiken Är i En Uppbyggnadsfas Och Det Innebär Att Du Är Med Och Utformar Dataflöden Från Grunden. Du Arbetar i Ett Agilt Team Med Helhetsansvar För Sina Dataprodukter. Konkret Innebär Rollen Att Du
   

  

* designar och utvecklar dataflöden för insamling, validering och bearbetning av stora, detaljerade datamängder
* skriver automatiska tester för att kvalitetssäkra din kod och underhåller CI/CD-pipelines
* utvecklar och lanserar API:er för inrapportering från banker och betaltjänstföretag
* använder marimo notebooks för att visualisera och tillgängliggöra resultat


**DITT TEAM**
 Enheten för finansiell data och utveckling består idag av 14 personer och tillhör avdelningen för penningpolitik, en av riksbankens nio avdelningar . Här kan du läsa mer om Riksbankens organisation.
   

  

 På enheten arbetar olika kompetenser sida vid sida i olika datateam och lär av varandra. Samarbete sker även avdelningsöverskridande och vi har regelbundna kontakter med finansiella företag, svenska myndigheter och internationella organisationer.
   

  

**MER OM DIG**
 Vi söker dig som är driven, ansvarsfull, kvalitetsmedveten, har gott omdöme och är bra på att samarbeta. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

**Vi Ser Att Du Har**
* relevant akademisk examen (exempelvis inom data science, matematik, finansiell ekonomi eller liknande)
* flerårig och aktuell erfarenhet av att koda i Python eller motsvarande programmeringsspråk
* erfarenhet av att utveckla dataflöden i orkestreringsverktyg som Dagster eller liknande (Airflow, dbt, etc.)
* erfarenhet av att hantera och bearbeta stora datamängder
* goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både skriftligt och muntligt


 Utöver ovan grundkrav är det meriterande om du även har:
   

  

* erfarenhet från finans- eller fintechbranschen
* erfarenhet av containermiljöer som Podman eller Kubernetes
* erfarenhet av att arbeta med datalake-lagring så som S3 och LakeFS
* erfarenhet av att arbeta enligt DevOps-principer med fokus på automatisering och CI/CD


**MER OM TJÄNSTEN**
 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Anställningstyp: Tillsvidareanställning, provanställning kan komma att tillämpas
   

  

 Placering: Kontor i centrala Stockholm
   

  

 Arbetstid: Förtroendearbetstid
   

  

 Möjlighet att jobba distans: 1 eller 2 dagar i veckan
   

  

 Förmåner: Generösa semestervillkor, löneväxling till pension, subventionerad lunch, friskvårdsbidrag, subventionerad massage och tillgång till gym och ledarledda träningspass.
   

  

 Tjänsten kan komma att placeras i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning innefattande registerkontroll, säkerhetsprövningssamtal och särskild personutredning görs då för slutkandidaten. För vissa tjänster ställs krav på svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

**ATT JOBBA PÅ RIKSBANKEN**
 Riksbanken är en myndighet under riksdagen som arbetar på medborgarnas uppdrag för en stark och säker ekonomi. Tillsammans arbetar vi för en låg och stabil inflation, bidrar till ett effektivt och stabilt finansiellt system och säkerställer att betalningar fungerar smidigt, även i kriser. Vi ger också ut Sveriges sedlar och mynt. Läs mer om hur det är att arbeta på Riksbanken här .
   

  

**ANSÖK**
 Vi vill ha din ansökan med CV och personligt brev senast den
 **18 mars** 
 . Vi vill att du i denna rekrytering besvarar ett antal urvalsfrågor. På så vis kan du enkelt söka tjänsten och vi ges möjligheten att utvärdera våra kandidater på lika villkor. Logiska tester och arbetsprov kan komma att ingå som en del av rekryteringsprocessen. Vi genomför också bakgrundskontroller på slutkandidaterna, vilket innebär att vi kontrollerar examensbevis eller annat dokument som styrker din utbildning.
   

  

 Du kan läsa mer om hur det fungerar när du söker jobb på Riksbanken här . Vi ser fram emot att få kontakt med dig!

title: Backend Developer (Node.js)
description:
At Ubiquiti Inc., we create technology platforms for Businesses, Smart Homes, and Internet Service Providers, driven by our goal to connect everyone, everywhere. To date, Ubiquiti has shipped over 100 million devices worldwide, from ISP networking products to next generation of IT solutions. Our growth is made possible by the dedicated team of hundreds behind the scenes. From software developers and product managers to designers and strategists, Team UI is driven to achieve our common goal: Rethinking IT. At Ubiquiti, you’ll heighten your potential and broaden your horizons - all while shaping the future of connectivity.
   

  

**Join forces with us on our mission to build a better IT industry. We are currently looking for a highly skilled Backend Developer (Node.js) to our team in Stockholm, Sweden.**
***Please note that applicants must live in Sweden and hold a valid work permit at the time of application to be considered for this role.***
**Team**
 We are hiring for the UniFi OS team that develops and maintains the core operating system for UniFi Cloud Gateways, NAS, and NVRs. The team ensures a secure and stable environment for all UniFi applications, spanning networking, camera surveillance, VoIP, and access control.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop efficient, scalable, and maintainable backend services
* Lead discussions on service architecture and code design
* Do code reviews, execute on branch/merge strategies as well as building and deployment processes
* Maintain a good programming style and stay up-to-date with the latest technology and trends
* Design developer-friendly APIs that are secure, scalable, and well-documented
* Communicate complex technical topics with key stakeholders including PM's, developers (embedded, web, mobile), UX/UI designers and strategists


**Requirements**
* 5+ years of experience with Node.js and TypeScript
* 3+ years of experience with SQL (Postgres or similar)
* Knowledge of web security (OWASP, browser security model, OAuth)
* Excellent debugging skills and familiarity with defensive programming
* Familiar with Git, Unix/Linux and Docker environments
* Ability to work independenty
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Strong sense of ownership of tasks and responsibilities
* Highly proficient in English (written and spoken)


**Nice To Have**
* Strong interest and experience with applying AI/LLMS to improve productivity and output quality
* Well-versed with DevOps and Build pipelines
* Experience with Rust or Golang
* Familiar with gRPC
* Experience with WebRTC


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation
* Occupational pension, health insurance, private health insurance, life insurance and work-injury insurance, and wellness allowance (5000 SEK)
* Flexible work hours and a hybrid work model
* Access to all the latest Ubiquiti products for home use


***Please note that a background check will be conducted in the final stage of the recruitment process***

title: Technical Lead - THE FINALS
description:
As the Engagement Technical Lead for THE FINALS, you will lead the technical execution of engagement features that keep players immersed in, connected to, and returning to the game.
   

  

 This role bridges people leadership with game design, live-ops, backend systems, and engineering.
   

  

 You will mentor and guide engineers, collaborate closely with design and product, and make architectural decisions regarding the engagement systems.
   

  

 In your day to day you work as an amplifier for cross team communication & collaboration.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
 Leadership & Collaboration
   

  

* Technical Leadership of a cross-functional engagement engineering team
* Act as the main technical point of contact for engagement initiatives across disciplines.
* Managerial responsibilities (not limited to) hiring & onboarding of new employees and long-term career development.
* Serve the know-how & share best practices: coaching people to make the right decisions across dependencies and to raise concerns and needs.
* Collaborate with design, art, data analytics and live-ops to define, scope, and deliver engagement-focused features.
* Planning and working for sustainability / scalability of team and throughput, including headcount planning and scoping.


 Architecture & Development
   

  

* Design and evolve robust, scalable systems supporting engagement components (e.g., player progression, reward loops, social features).
* Ensure high performance and reliability.
* Foster best practices in code quality, automated testing, performance profiling, and release reliability.


 What You'll Work on
   

  

* Player engagement systems (progression trackers, rewards, seasonal features).
* Social & competitive hooks: leaderboards, team stats, clans/guilds support, rewards integration.


**We would love if you have**
* A creative and curious mind
* A solid and proven background from software engineering and architectural leadership
* Experience in C++, building games
* Experience in game engine development
* Learning, collaborative and sharing approach as well as motivation to take initiative and drive
* The ability to be a great team player with good communication skills
* Proven leadership qualities, including splendid recommendation stats from former team members
* Professional English communication skills.


 This is an on-site role, and we are only considering candidates already residing in Sweden.
   

  

 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Senior Innovation Engineer
description:
**Introduction to Eficode**
 We’re building the future of software development - driving innovation across Cloud, DevOps, Agile, Service Management, and AI-powered transformation. Our mission is to help organizations evolve into truly software-driven enterprises, enabling them to deliver faster, smarter, and more sustainably. We believe in changing the world by sharing our expertise and enabling teams to work better through modern technology and intelligent automation.
   

  

 As an Atlassian Platinum Partner, we have been recognized multiple times as Atlassian Partner of the Year, most recently for 2024–25. We are also proud to be a two-time GitHub Partner of the Year in EMEA and an Azure Managed Service Provider. With over 600 experts across 10 countries, we bring together leading talent from the Nordics, continental Europe, the UK, and the Americas.
   

  

**Role purpose**
 In this role, you’ll be the technical driver in our innovation “lab” environment. You’ll take early-stage inputs - anything from high-level product vision to rough experimental code - and turn them into functional, well-structured systems that help us validate direction quickly.
   

  

 This is a highly hands-on role: you will spend the majority of your time building, iterating, and refining working software.
   

  

 Importantly, our prototypes are not meant to be disposable. Many of them mature into internal platforms, accelerators, or productized offerings - which means that some of them will require ongoing maintenance and improvements as they become used by others.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
*Your main responsibilities as our Senior Innovation Engineer will include (but won’t be limited to):*
* Build V0/V1 prototypes for new R&D initiatives, from concept to working implementation.
* Turn ambiguous inputs (vision, sketches, experimental snippets) into a coherent architecture and codebase.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to gather context early, clarify constraints, and move forward without waiting for perfect specs.
* Maintain a strong engineering baseline in prototypes: clean structure, pragmatic testing, and documentation so work can be continued.
* Support prototypes as they mature: fix issues, refine performance and usability, and improve maintainability when a prototype starts getting real users.
* Review innovation prototypes across the organization, mentoring teams to ensure solutions are grounded in sound engineering and business value


**Role Requirements**
*You will make a great match for this role if you have:*
* Have experience taking ideas from “early concept” to working prototypes/MVPs and iterating based on feedback.
* Are comfortable making architecture and engineering decisions: selecting stacks, defining boundaries/interfaces, and setting a maintainable foundation.
* Take ownership in ambiguous environments: you proactively align with stakeholders, ask the right questions, and drive work forward.
* Care about quality even in R&D contexts (pragmatic tests, clean code, CI/CD basics, and documentation).
* Are a team player: collaborative, supportive, and happy to share knowledge and help others succeed.
* Swedish language skills (at least basic) and fluency in English is needed.
* You must have full working rights in Sweden.


**Nice To Have’s**
*It would be an added bonus if you have:*
* Experience in R&D / innovation labs, internal product incubation, or consultancy-style delivery with shifting requirements.
* Cloud experience (AWS/Azure/GCP), containers, and modern runtime patterns (Docker/Kubernetes/serverless).
* Experience applying AI/LLM-enabled development in a pragmatic way to accelerate prototyping.
* Mentoring/technical leadership experience in code reviews and raising engineering quality across teams
* A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field - or equivalent practical experience.


**What’s in it for you?**
* Be part of a leading DevOps and Atlassian consulting company with over 600 experts across 10 countries
* Work with exciting customers across industries and tackle complex system implementation projects
* Grow your career in a learning driven culture with opportunities for training, certifications, and knowledge sharing
* Flexible working options with hybrid/remote work opportunities


**Sweden Benefits Include**
* 30 paid holiday days per year
* Healthcare allowance
* Parental salary cover
* Occupational pension and salary exchange options


 To find out more about life at Eficode, and hear what our people think about us, click here.
   

  

**Location**
 This position is hybrid in Stockholm, combining time at our Stockholm office with remote work.
   

  

***DEI Statement***
*At Eficode we are committed to offering an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunities for all applicants. We are dedicated to creating a work environment that embraces diversity, inclusion, and respect for all employees. We believe that our differences make us better. We recognise that by having diverse perspectives, skills, ages, genders, backgrounds, and cultures, we will better drive our customers forward and innovate in our field.*
*To ensure a fair recruitment process, please refrain from sharing unnecessary personal information or an image of yourself in your job application.*
***Salary Development***
*At Eficode, we believe your compensation should reflect the impact you make and how you grow along the way. Your salary develops through regular check-ins with your team lead, where we look at things like your skills, experience, client work, feedback, and overall contribution — both to your projects and to our culture. As a consultancy, it’s natural that factors like time spent on billable client work are part of the picture — but so are your development, collaboration, and everyday efforts that drive value. We also carry out a company-wide salary review once a year.*
*On top of your salary, we offer a broad mix of benefits, both financial and non-financial, to support your well-being, work-life balance, and professional growth.*
*Find out more about our benefits [* 
*here* 
*].*

We only communicate through official Eficode email accounts and approved recruitment platforms. If you receive an unsolicited message, job offer, or request for personal or financial information claiming to be from Eficode, it may be fraudulent.*

title: Microsoft Cloud Specialist
description:
Step into a role where your Endpoint expertise drives secure, scalable, and future-ready IT environments.
  
Do you have a strong passion for IT and technology? Do you want to contribute to developing an agile company in transformation with your technical expertise? In the role of Microsoft Cloud Specialist, you are offered the opportunity to contribute and further develop your technical skills to elevate both your team and the business at Foxway.
  
Foxway is a global company with more than 1,300 colleagues across six countries. Together, we make digital life easier for our customers by enabling circular and sustainable tech — environmentally, socially, and economically. Through organic growth and strategic acquisitions, Foxway has grown rapidly in recent years, and our operational teams play a key role in that journey.
  
  

**What you'll be doing:**  

As a Microsoft Cloud Specialist, you will be part of the Tech Solutions team consisting of skilled technical specialists with different areas of expertise. In this role, you will work with operations, support, and development of customers' IT environments, as well as troubleshooting and development of our delivery systems.
  
This includes methodical troubleshooting and issue resolution of both computers and mobile phones in systems such as Microsoft Windows, Endpoint, and Azure. You will actively contribute to continuously developing the team's processes and methods by, for example, training first-line support, participating in workshops, and writing technical documentation.
  
You will work both independently and as part of a team. At Foxway, you are offered a developing role where each day presents new challenges that you solve together with your colleagues and customers.
  
  

**Who we are looking for:**  

We are looking for someone with a strong interest in IT and technology. Someone who is driven by continuously developing their technical competence. You always put the customer first and strive to deliver solutions that create high customer satisfaction. We humbly ask you to have:
  
Minimum 1 to 5+ years solid experience with Microsoft Endpoint Management (Intune) and Microsoft environments such as SCCM and O365.
  
Proven experience within IT infrastructure.
  
Practical knowledge of PowerShell scripting or general programming.
  
Relevant technical background through work experience or post-secondary education in IT.
  
Experience working in a consultant role or in customer/supplier relationships is considered a merit.
  
Fluent in Swedish and English, written and spoken.
  
Based in or open to working from Växjö, Sweden.
  
  

You are motivated by a role focused on problem-solving for customers. As a person, you are curious to learn, take responsibility for your tasks, and carry them out in a structured manner. Since you work closely with your team, it is important that you enjoy collaborating with others. In addition, you have an open, humble, and positive attitude toward others.
  
This role requires on-site presence at Växjö office at least four (4) days a week to ensure effective coordination and collaboration with the team.
  
Join Circular tech!
  
Be part of a company that drives circular and sustainable innovation.
  
Work in a supportive, engaging, and fast-paced culture.
  
Enjoy opportunities for personal and career development.
  
  

Want to be our next colleague?
  
We'd love to hear from you! We are reviewing applications on an ongoing basis so if this sounds like an opportunity you want to pursue, apply quickly before the deadline!

title: Service Implementation Specialist
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
  
Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
  
At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!
  
DESCRIPTION
  
Join our global Service Implementation team on a 1-year contract and play a central role in delivering mobile messaging solutions to clients and partners worldwide. In this role, you’ll help ensure our sales and implementation cycles run smoothly, collaborating closely with Sales, Product Management, Support, and Implementation teams across our international offices.
  
You’ll be a key part of delivering messaging solutions at scale, directly influencing operational efficiency and client satisfaction. Your ideas, process improvements, and problem-solving will have an impact on our global operations. We offer the autonomy and flexibility you need to succeed. We challenge ourselves and each other to improve continuously, and we support you in making an impact from day one.
  
This is a 1-year temporary, hybrid role based in either Stockholm, Sweden, or Madrid, Spain, reporting to the Manager Service Implementation
  
Manage operator and partner processes related to service setup, documentation, and ongoing maintenance.
  
Handle ordering, deployment, and ongoing usage of messaging services for Sinch clients.
  
Own internal processes related to client orders and provisioning of inbound numbers and registered senders for SMS and Rich Messaging products.
  
Work closely with internal and external stakeholders to gather requirements and manage service changes or updates
  
Maintain accurate and up-to-date documentation of provisioned services and partner configurations.
  
Manage a high volume of parallel tickets.
  
Identify opportunities to improve processes, quality, and efficiency.
  
  

REQUIREMENTS
  
We believe you’re analytical, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple priorities across teams and regions. You look for ways to improve processes, troubleshooting issues and taking ownership to get things done.
  
Exposure and experience working with PC-based applications within the telecom or IT services industry.
  
Experience with web-based CRM or service desk tools such as Jira.
  
Comfortable using AI-powered tools at a user level to improve productivity, automate repetitive tasks, and enhance documentation or analysis work.
  
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with great attention to detail and the ability to work independently.
  
High attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple parallel workflows without losing structure.
  
Professional proficiency in English (written and spoken).
  
University degree or equivalent professional experience.
  
  

Big Plus!
  
Understanding of wireless carrier processes.
  
Knowledge of SMS, RCS, or messaging terminology.
  
Experience working in a global, cross-functional environment.
  
  

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English.
  
At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation at this time.
  
Applicants must be legally authorized to work in Madrid, Spain or Stockholm, Sweden (for example, by holding Spanish, Swedish, or EU/EEA citizenship, or a valid local work permit).
  
OUR HIRING PROCESS
  
We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
  
We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Försäljningschef
description:
Vi söker en **Försäljningschef** som vill bli en del av oss på Telia Cygate i Region Norr.  



Jag heter Mattias Svanberg, arbetar som Regional Director och jag letar efter erfaren ledare som vill växa tillsammans med oss i Region Norr. Vi är en stöttande och driven region som tillsammans fokuserar på att hjälpa våra kunder med dess digitalisering.  



**Vad du kommer att göra i rollen:**

Som Försäljningschef ingår du i ledningen för Telia Cygate i Region Norr och driver utvecklingen av säljstyrning och säljledning inom regionen. Regionen är stor och täcker orterna Karlstad, Örebro, Borlänge, Gävle, Sundsvall, Umeå och Luleå. Du har ett ansvar för att säkerställa att Telia Cygates och Telias centrala ambitioner når ut i verksamheten. Du kommer att driva aktiviteter inom säljteamet och i nära samarbete med vår konsultorganisation samt en nära dialog med våra kunder.  

  



Du kommer ha en nära dialog med våra partners och leverantörer, exempelvis Cisco, Fortinet, HPE, Check Point. Rollen som Försäljningschef innefattar säljutveckling, implementation av gemensamma processer och arbetssätt. Du kommer att leda våra Account Managers på dessa orter som bearbetar kunder inom segmenten Enterprise och Public, samt ett team av Specialistsäljare.  



**För att lyckas i rollen:**

Som ledare är du skicklig på att få verksamheten med dig, både i det dagliga och i förändring. Du har ett coachande och situationsbaserat ledarskap, samt engagerar och entusiasmerar dina medarbetare. Som person är du relationsskapande och värdesätter att bygga och bibehålla långsiktiga relationer. Du har en bakgrund från att skapa förtroendefulla samarbeten och tillväxt inom relevanta sammanhang där IT-infrastruktur varit den gemensamma nämnaren.  



Dina erfarenheter:


* **Tidigare kommersiell erfarenhet** från IT-infrastruktur och förståelse för de tjänster som Telia Cygate levererar inom nätverk, säkerhet och hybrid cloud.
* **Tidigare erfarenhet** som lönesättande chef och haft fullt PNL-ansvar för din enhet
* **Besitter ett situationsbaserat** förhållningssätt till coachning, och van vid motiverande samtal med seniora och strategiska säljare
* **Flytande svenska och engelska** , i både tal och skrift

**Varför Telia Cygate?**

På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.  



Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.  

  



Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan!  



**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**  

Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.  



**Vad vi erbjuder**  

När du börjar hos oss får du ett omfattande förmånspaket anpassat efter din lokala marknad, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telias resultat.  



**Låter det intressant?**

Vi ser fram emot din ansökan senast **2026-03-15.** Rollen kan komma att stängas tidigare om vi hittar rätt kandidat – så vänta inte för länge!  



Placeringsort: Karlstad, Örebro, Borlänge, Gävle, Sundsvall, Umeå eller Luleå  



Om du går vidare i processen kommer du att kontaktas av vår **Talent Acquisition Partner** . Bakgrund- och referenskontroller ingår i processen.  



Vill du veta mer om rollen? Kontakta gärna Mattias Svanberg på mattias.svanberg@cygate.se  



I samband med våra rekryteringar undanber vi oss kontakter från rekryteringsföretag och andra annonsörer.  

  



**Lika möjligheter för alla**

På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka.  



**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**Platform Engineer**
---------------------


At Kry, our platform is the backbone of everything we build. As a Platform Engineer, you will play a critical role in evolving the cloud infrastructure and shared foundations that power healthcare services used by millions of patients across Europe.


We’re hiring at mid to senior level. You’ll be trusted to take ownership of complex problems and contribute to architectural decisions that impact the whole organisation.

### **The Role**


Our cloud infrastructure and capabilities underpin every Kry product. The decisions made in this domain directly impact availability, scalability, security, developer experience and cost efficiency across the entire organisation.


As a Platform Engineer, you will:

* Design and deliver secure, scalable and highly available AWS architectures
* Strengthen cloud security, backup and disaster recovery strategies
* Drive cost optimisation and infrastructure performance improvements
* Enable product teams by providing robust cloud foundations, shared libraries and clear engineering patterns
* Contribute to platform standards and engineering best practices across the organisation


You will operate in a high-impact environment where reliability, security and resilience are mission-critical.

### **What You Bring**


We’re looking for an engineer with strong cloud fundamentals and architectural awareness. You may not have mastered every technology listed below, but you’ve worked in complex systems and can operate independently while continuing to grow.

#### **Expertise**

* Cloud Engineering and Security
* AWS (Networking, DNS, Container orchestration, Load balancing, Databases).
* Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
* CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions)
* Containerisation (Docker, ECS)
* Monitoring and observability (Datadog)
* Scripting and automation (Python, Bash)
* Backend development (Java, Spring Boot, Vert.x)
* Databases (MySQL)
* Data Engineering (Snowflake, Dagster, DBT)

#### **Personal Qualities**

* Deep curiosity and desire to understand systems
* Strong ownership mindset and accountability
* Ability to assess risk and make sound architectural decisions
* Clear communicator who can explain complex infrastructure topics to both engineers and stakeholders
* Collaborative and pragmatic
* Outcome-oriented and value-driven

### **Why This Role Matters**


This position is critical to the future of the Kry platform. The decisions made here will impact how well Kry is able to deliver healthcare across Europe.


If you’re motivated by problem solving, a meaningful mission and the ability to have a significant impact then this role gives you the mandate to do exactly that.


  
**Om Kry**
----------


Kry lanserades 2015 och driver både fysisk och digital sjukvård i Sverige, Norge, Frankrike och Storbritannien. Kry är Sveriges tredje största vårdgivare och har 73 mottagningar runt om i landet som integreras med den digitala vården. Detta möjliggör hög kvalitet, tillgänglighet och kontinuitet. Förutom primärvård bedriver Kry även specialistvård inom framförallt psykiatri och företagshälsovård.

title: Domain Architect – Customer engagement and Sales & Marketing
description:
Do you want to help shape the future of Tre’s IT landscape? We are now looking for an experienced and driven Domain Architect to take architectural leadership in our transformation program around our Customer engagement and Sales & Marketing area.
  
  

About the role
  
  

As a Domain Architect you hold the overall architectural responsibility for our CRM and Sales domain and play a central role in one of our most important transformation journeys. You lead the architectural direction as we move from custom-built solutions to a modern, data‑driven and standardized CRM ecosystem.
  
  

You are responsible for defining and realizing the target architecture, ensuring coherence and continuous development as business needs evolve. This includes close collaboration with sales as well as daily interaction with product teams, developers and other architects. You support teams in creating and following relevant roadmaps and ensure that initiatives and projects are feasible through early assessments of technology choices, risks, regulatory considerations and design requirements. Once the initial transformation is in place the role transitions into long‑term domain ownership where you drive the roadmap, target architecture, and ongoing evolution of the domain.
  
  

A key part of the role is understanding the current architectural landscape, identifying gaps and driving the organization toward future solutions. You also contribute to developing and refining our architectural standards, policies and guidelines and play an active role in raising architectural maturity across the organization.
  
  

This role can be based in Stockholm, Gothenburg or Malmö.
  
  

Work with great people
  
Julia Maxén
  
Team Manager
  
"I want my team to have the best conditions to excel in their roles. By empowering each member to perform at their best, we not only grow stronger as a team but also drive Tre forward to new heights"
  
Henrik Sundvall
  
Digital Project Lead
  
"The absolute best thing about being a project manager at Tre is that I get to work broadly with colleagues from all parts of the organization and learn new things every day. I have the freedom to be myself – and be appreciated for it!"
  
Jayasri Battola
  
Developer
  
"The great work culture and the technology made me choose Tre. Working alongside great people in mixed team setups, with both experienced and new talents, along with the latest and greatest tools and technologies like Cloud and Azure."
  
  

You can look forward to
  
  

leading the architectural work for one of our most strategically important transformations
  
working in an environment shaped by modern technology, AI‑driven development and data‑driven platforms
  
collaborating closely with skilled, engaged and cross‑functional teams
  
be part of Sweden's best workplaces according to Great Place To Work and that we are a proud partner of Women in Tech and Tjejer Kodar
  
  

Who you are
  
  

You bring solid experience as a senior architect, ideally from a Domain Architect role in large transformation programs. You navigate complex environments with ease and combine a strategic, long‑term view with the ability to translate architecture into clear direction.
  
  

Strong knowledge of platforms like Microsoft Dynamics, Salesforce, Amdocs and frameworks such as TM Forum is highly valued. Experience from the telecom industry is a strong advantage. You stay up to date on industry trends, technology developments and relevant regulations.
  
  

You are analytical, structured, and able to challenge, simplify and drive progress. With a strong ability to see the bigger picture and contribute fresh perspectives you handle complex topics with clarity. You communicate effectively—written and verbal—and build trust through clear, responsive and stable collaboration.
  
  

If you have any questions about the role, you are warmly welcome to contact hiring manager Mats Andersson (mats.andersson@tre.se).
  
  

Welcome with your application!
  
  

We are accepting applications through this advertisement and will hold interviews on an ongoing basis. A cover letter is not required, but we would like you to attach a CV and answer the questions we have asked below when you apply. We use tests to ensure objective assessments are connected with selection. The position may be filled before the application deadline. Background checks are carried out on the final candidate.
  
  

Great Place to Work
  
  

Health care allowance, parental pay, pension & insurance according to collective agreements
  
  

Dog zone & gym in the 3house
  
  

Great discounts on bicycles, public transport, and electric cars
  
  

Flexible holidays and five extra days off per year
  
  

Subsidized lunch
  
  

Generous bonus models or commissions
  
  

We are driven by constantly trying to improve things in new and different ways. Of course, we are at the forefront of developing future networks.
  
  

We see ourselves as a crucial part of Sweden's social structure because we know that reliable connectivity is a necessary foundation stone in today's digital world. That's why we see it as our job to keep our mobile network up and running year-round, 24/7, to ensure you can always count on being connected when you need it most.
  
  

Tre was born as a challenger and is an organization in constant motion. We strive to be at the forefront of everything we do. We are convinced that the people at Tre are decisive for our development.
  
  

No matter how you start your journey at Tre, there are endless opportunities to grow and develop with us.
  
  

WE THINK LIKE CHALLENGERS - In a constantly changing world, we stay curious and open minded. Born with a challenger mindset, we love pushing boundaries.
  
  

WE WORK LIKE CHAMPIONS - As true champions, we always do our best. We take ownership, set clear goals and stay focused. Together we´re on a winning streak.
  
  

WE ACT LIKE BUDDIES - Free to be ourselves, we treat each other with respect. Together we make a friendly bunch, born, and one tough force.

Tre was the first in Sweden to offer video calls and mobile video streaming. At this time, seeing the person you are calling in the eyes is a completely new experience.

Tre launches mobile broadband as the third operator in the world. Over the next five years, Tre will win awards for Sweden’s fastest mobile broadband.

Hallon, Tre’s sister company, was created with the idea of being a simple mobile operator, free from any unnecessary fuss.

It has been an eventful year! 3Världen was launched, allowing customers to surf in 80 countries at the same price as in Sweden. Then, 3Samla was introduced, enabling all customers to add more users to their subscription. Last but not least, Tre became the first in Sweden to launch a public 5G network.

title: Lead, Account Solution Engineer - Retail & Consumer Goods
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*

Job Category


Sales
Job Details


**About Salesforce**

Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.


Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.


Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn't a buzzword — it's a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
  

  

Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You're in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
  

  

**What is an Account Solution Engineer?**  

Also known as a "Presales", "Solution Advisor", "Sales Consultant," or "Sales Engineer" the Account Solution Engineer is responsible for owning the solutions throughout the sales cycle and delivering thought leadership to companies to transform their customer's experience. The Solution Engineer is an expert who works alongside their colleagues, participates in building our team culture and supports their aligned sales team to create solutions for prospects and customers.
  

  

To accomplish this, you should have a strong desire to set the vision translating business objectives into enticing and practical recommendations. The Solution Engineer acts as a trusted advisor to our customers while aiding the customer's transformational journey.
  

  

**Responsibilities*** **Strategic Customer Engagement** : Partner with sales teams to drive digital transformation initiatives for retail and consumer goods enterprises, positioning Salesforce as the platform for the agentic enterprise where AI agents work alongside humans to drive business outcomes
* **Solution Architecture & Design** : Lead technical discovery sessions to understand complex business processes across retail operations, omnichannel commerce, supplier networks, and customer experience, translating requirements into comprehensive Salesforce solutions spanning across the portfolio
* **Agentic AI Evangelism** : Demonstrate and articulate how Agentforce and autonomous AI agents can transform customer-facing and internal operations—from intelligent service agents handling customer inquiries to autonomous SDR agents qualifying leads and autonomous sales coaches optimizing rep performance
* **Value-Based Selling** : Build and present compelling business cases that connect technical solutions to measurable business outcomes, focusing on revenue growth through platform expansion, cross-cloud opportunities, and demonstrating clear ROI
* **Demo/Workshop/Proof of Concept Execution** : Design and deliver impactful demonstrations, customer workshops and pilots that showcase the art of the possible, driving operational efficiency and customer engagement in retail and consumer goods contexts
* **Trusted Advisor Relationship Building** : Establish yourself as a strategic technology advisor to C-level and senior technical stakeholders, understanding their industry challenges around unified commerce, loyalty management, demand forecasting, supply chain visibility, and evolving consumer expectations
* **Platform Expansion & Land-and-Expand Strategy** : Identify opportunities to expand Salesforce footprint within existing accounts by uncovering new use cases across departments and business units, driving new revenue through strategic platform growth
* **Collaboration & Knowledge Sharing** : Work closely with product specialists, industry advisors, architects, customer success teams and partners to ensure seamless handoffs and contribute to the broader solution engineering community through knowledge sharing and best practice documentation

  

  

**Key Attributes & Experience*** **Solution Engineering Excellence** : Proven track record as a pre-sales solution engineer, sales engineer, or technical consultant successfully supporting complex software sales cycles
* **Business Acumen** : Demonstrated ability to think strategically about business value rather than just technical features, with experience building business cases, ROI models, and value realization frameworks that resonate with executive buyers
* **Growth Mindset** : Intellectual curiosity and commitment to continuous learning in a rapidly evolving technology landscape, particularly around AI/ML, data platforms, and industry-specific innovations
* **Customer-Centric** : Consultative approach with exceptional listening skills and the ability to ask insightful discovery questions that uncover both stated and unstated customer needs
* **AI & Automation Fluency** : Understanding of how artificial intelligence, machine learning, and autonomous agents are reshaping business processes, with ability to translate technical AI capabilities into business outcomes
* **Communication skills** : Polished communication and presentation skills with the confidence to engage C-suite executives, technical architects, and operational managers alike, adapting your message and medium to each audience
* **Collaborative Team Player** : Experience working in matrix organizations, partnering effectively with account executives, customer success managers, product teams, technical architects as well as external partners to drive customer outcomes
* **Language Skills** : Swedish and Professional English proficiency required. Salesforce company language is English incl. corporate communication and meetings.
* **Proven Track Record** : History of meeting or exceeding sales quotas through technical contribution, with metrics demonstrating impact on win rates, deal size, and sales cycle velocity

  

  

**Preferred Skills and Experience*** **Industry Expertise** : Experience in retail or consumer goods sectors, with understanding of industry-specific challenges e.g. omnichannel commerce, loyalty and personalization programs, demand planning, supplier collaboration, and the shift toward direct-to-consumer and unified commerce models
* Prior experience in Business, Computer Science, MIS, or equivalent fields
* Hands-on experience with Salesforce platform configuration, including exposure to Flow, Lightning Web Components, or Apex development
* Previous experience and/or certification in Salesforce solutions such as Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Commerce Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Loyalty Management, or B2B/B2C Commerce
* Understanding of modern data architecture concepts including data lakes, real-time integration, API management, and master data management
* Experience with AI/ML platforms, prompt engineering, or implementing intelligent automation solutions
* Knowledge of retail industry standards and technologies (e.g., POS systems, ERP integrations, product information management, and e-commerce platforms)
* Exposure to MuleSoft, Tableau, or other Salesforce ecosystem products
* Experience with value engineering methodologies, business case development tools, or value realization frameworks
* Previous experience selling or implementing large-scale ERP, CRM, or digital transformation platforms (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics)
* Understanding of European data privacy regulations (GDPR) and retail industry compliance requirements
* Project management or Agile methodology certifications
* Experience in presenting and hosting webinars or public speaking
* Active participation in Salesforce community, Trailhead accomplishments, or speaking engagements at industry events
* Fluent in Swedish and English + Right to work in Sweden

Unleash Your Potential


When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and *be your best* , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can *do your best* . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.


Accommodations


If you require assistance due to a disability applying for open positions please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form .


Posting Statement


Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Forskningsadministratör
description:
**Institutionen**  

Institutionen för freds- och konfliktforskning grundades 1971 med syftet att bedriva forskning och erbjuda utbildning inom området fred- och konfliktstudier. Institutionen är idag en ung, dynamisk och internationell arbetsplats med ca 90 medarbetare och ca 1000 studenter från hela världen. Kurser erbjuds inom kandidat- och masterprogram samt att vi har ett doktorandprogram. Mer om institutionens verksamhet finns på www.pcr.uu.se.


Institutionen söker nu en Forskningsadministratör för en tidsbegränsad heltidsanställning (100%), med tillträde 1 april 2026.

**Arbetsuppgifter**  

Du ansvarar för att sprida institutionens forskning, utbildning och samverkansaktiviteter, genom att självständigt producera texter och annat innehåll (infografik, korta filmer, podcasts), för spridning på institutionens hemsida, i sociala medier samt i andra relevanta kanaler. Du ansvarar även för institutionens webbplats. Du samarbetar med andra roller inom universitetet för att utveckla webbens funktionalitet samt med institutionsledningen kring strategier för forskningskommunikation och extern profilering. Du är i nära dialog med forskare och lärare samt deltar i planering och genomförande av offentliga evenemang samt fotograferar vid seminarier, konferenser och andra aktiviteter. Andra administrativa uppgifter kan förekomma.

**Kvalifikationskrav**  

För att vara aktuell för tjänsten, krävs att du har en universitetsexamen inom samhällsvetenskap eller humaniora, utmärkta och dokumenterade språkliga och stilistiska färdigheter i svenska och engelska, samt dokumenterad akademisk skicklighet och förmåga att förstå och arbeta med akademiska texter på engelska. Vidare är även krav:


* Minst ett års erfarenhet av att självständigt producera, och fungera som värd för podcasts på engelska, inklusive ansvar för inspelning och editering
* Minst ett års professionell erfarenhet av att planera och sprida forskning och undervisning till olika målgrupper via texter och sociala medier
* Erfarenhet av att popularisera forskning och utbildning och att göra komplexa akademiska resonemang begripliga för bredare målgrupper
* Erfarenhet av att planera och genomföra offentliga evenemang och event, samt att vara ansvarig för och sköta ljudåtergivning samt fotografering vid dessa
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med målgruppen ungdomar i gymnasieåldern, på sociala medier och vid evenemang
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och implementera strategier för intern och extern informationsdelning
* God förmåga att ge professionell rådgivning kring AV‑utrustning och att lösa tekniska problem
* Mycket god förståelse för institutionens kärnverksamheter undervisning och forskning inom freds- och konfliktområdet, samt dess nationella och internationella samverkan
* Mycket goda kunskaper i webbpubliceringsverktyget Site Vision och erfarenhet av att självständigt ansvara för en arbetsgivares hemsida
* Omfattande professionell erfarenhet av videoproduktion samt Adobe Creative Cloud, särskilt InDesign, Premiere Pro, Audition och Lightroom
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i DiVA (hantera forskningsprojekt) Kunskap om WCAG och tillgänglighetsanpassning av webb, video och dokument
* Utbildning i att hantera informationsspridning under kris.

**Personliga egenskaper**  

För att trivas i rollen har du ett starkt intresse av att sprida forskning till en bred publik och att lyfta fram institutionen och dess utbildningsprogram. Du är en skicklig skribent och kan snabbt ta till dig komplex information och formulera och förpacka budskap på ett effektivt sätt. Du är ansvarsfull och trivs att arbeta självständigt, samtidigt som du har god samarbetsförmåga. Du är utåtriktad och socialt skicklig. Rollen är självständig och kräver god förmåga att prioritera och driva arbetet framåt. Du är kreativ och kan hitta lösningar där andra ser problem, samtidigt som du respekterar och förstår universitetets grafiska riktlinjer.

**Ansökan**  

Förutom att svara på de kompletterande frågorna, ska din ansökan innehålla;

* CV
* 1–3 relevanta arbetsprov (av dig skrivna texter) från tidigare anställningar.

**Om anställningen**  

Anställningen är: *tidsbegränsad (11 månader).* Omfattningen är: *100 %.* Tillträde: *1 april 2026, eller enligt överenskommelse*. Placeringsort: *Uppsala.*

**Vid frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta:** HR‑samordnare Helena Millroth: helena.millroth@pcr.uu.se

**Skicka in din ansökan senast 18 mars** **2026, med referens UFV-PA 2026/612.**


Uppsala universitet är ett brett forskningsuniversitet med stark internationell ställning. Det yttersta målet är att bedriva utbildning och forskning av högsta kvalitet och relevans för att göra skillnad i samhället. Vår viktigaste tillgång är alla 7 600 anställda och 53 000 studenter som med nyfikenhet och engagemang gör Uppsala universitet till en av landets mest spännande arbetsplatser. Läs mer om våra förmåner och hur det är att jobba inom Uppsala universitethttps://uu.se/om-uu/jobba-hos-oss/ Anställningen kan komma att säkerhetsprövas. Vid säkerhetsprövning är en förutsättning för anställning att sökande blir godkänd. Vi undanber oss erbjudanden om rekryterings- och annonseringshjälp. Ansökan tas emot i Uppsala universitets rekryteringssystem. Fackliga företrädare: Saco-S - saco-s@uu.se, Seko - seko@uadm.uu.se, ST (OFR/S) - ofr@uu.se


Anställningsform: tidsbegränsad anställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 1 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100 | Ort: Uppsala | Län: Uppsala län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: UFV-PA 2026/612 | Publicerat: 2026-03-04 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-03-18

title: Customer Success Partner Senior Advisor, Sweden
description:
**We help the world run better**  

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. **Summary**  

SAP Business Data Cloud is a technology platform in Data & AI solution area that brings together data and analytics, artificial intelligence & intelligent applications in one, unified environment. SAP Business Data Cloud is one of the highest profiles and fastest growing parts of the SAP portfolio and critical to SAP helping our customers innovate and grow with SAP. In EMEA alone BTP-BDC represents a 1BN Euro business supporting > 8,000 customers. Aside from being the foundation for SAP applications it provides a modern platform of cloud capabilities to enables customers to extend, enhance and innovate above and beyond their existing applications.  

The focus of this position is to join the SAP BDC Customer Success Manager (Customer success solution advisor) team and become the trusted advisor to some of our flagship EMEA customers, helping them drive a roadmap for SAP BDC adoption and consumption across their organization.  

**Responsibilities**  

* You will proactively partner with customers to sustainably increase consumption of SAP BDC & Analytical services, and coordinate activities with the Account Team, by building out a joint outcome-based Adoption plan and drive a mutual understanding of IT-Architecture and Business value.
* You understand the big picture, deliver expertise with digital transformation across different lines of business, advise on technical and business architectures.
* You are the primary SAP BDC strategic point of contact and will orchestrate success resources across SAP and customers, leveraging assets of the SAP BDC engagement model.
* You are the primary point of contact to drive customer transformation journey strategy towards SAP Business Data Cloud
* You will analyze your customer’s Vision, Technical needs and execute consumption plans for your assigned customers.
* You will instruct and prepare the customer to make the best use of the solution, in alignment with SAP strategy and roadmap.
* You will be a voice of the customer to internal SAP stakeholders. You will work with colleagues from a broad variety of groups such as Cloud Success Services life-cycle relevant centers of experts, Account Teams, Pre-sales, Product Management groups, Support, Services, Partners, etc.
* BDC -CSP Senior Advisor may also be assigned to fulfill a customer’s premium subscription services.

 **Role Requirements**  

You will excel in this role if you:* Have 5-6 years of experience working in the IT Industry in Customer facing roles. Your background could be Software Engineering, Solution Advisory & Management, Project/Product Management, Project Implementation, Pre-sales, Technical Customer Engagement, Customer Success, Consulting, etc.
* Have excellent understanding of one or more areas of the Data & Analytics portfolio - SAP Business Data Cloud covering Datasphere , SAP Analytics Cloud, Intelligent applications , BW- BW4HANA , Databricks ML – covering primarily Reporting , Planning and forecasting solutions.
* Have a working knowledge of hybrid and cloud-based landscapes and can guide customers on Solution Advisory , Cloud Strategies and Architecture guidance.
* Certifications in SAP Business Data cloud solutions – Datasphere , SAP Analytics cloud , BW4HANA – BW , Enterprise architecture are a plus.
* Have foundational knowledge of public cloud platforms and providers (e.g. Microsoft , Annaplan , Snowflake etc.)
* Have professional experience with implementing cloud initiatives.
* Have excellent communication and presentation skills. Familiarity with design thinking methodology is a plus.
* Communicate proactively and can prioritize efficiently. You have a strong sense of accountability.
* Can manage complex organizational dynamics both internally at SAP, as well as externally with customers and partners.
* Can continuously learn and adapt to the unique business and cultural practices of each region/country.
* Have a strong customer service mindset and customer empathy.
* Have a passion for learning new technologies and enjoy problem solving.
* Thrive in a dynamic team-based environment and can guide new team members into the role.

 **Other requirements*** Fluent in both English and local language Swedish or Danish or Finnish
* Already situated in Sweden as relocation is not supported for this position

  

**Location**
Stockholm or Gothenburg **Our Team**  

We pride on a work environment that is inclusive and diverse. Every idea and perspective are valued.  

The SAP Business Data Cloud CSP team is committed to sustain each other to ensure success, both individually and as a team. We have a pay it forward mentality and are always willing to help our colleagues. Our culture is built upon sharing best practices, utilizing communication platforms to answer each other’s questions, and bringing an entrepreneurial
spirit to the mission of driving SAP BDC consumption growth together. We provide opportunities to lead regional and global workstreams that help us improve as a team and contribute to great customer experiences **Bring out your best**  

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
  

  

**We win with inclusion**  

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.  

  

SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.  

  

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.  

  

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.  

  

Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor. **AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.
