title: Infrastrukturarkitekt Centrala Plattformar
description:
* Ansök senast: 18 mars 2026
* Stockholm
* Hybrid
**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

Vill du arbeta med några av Handelsbankens mest affärskritiska system och vara med och säkra driften på en av bankens mest betydelsefulla plattformar? Vi söker en Infrastrukturarkitekt med erfarenhet av IBM Z och z/OS som trivs i komplexa miljöer med stora transaktionsvolymer och höga krav på säkerhet.


**Ditt team**  

Du blir en del av Centrala Plattformar, där cirka 45 medarbetare arbetar i fyra team placerade i Stockholm, Göteborg och Örebro. Centrala Plattformar har ansvaret för två av bankens mest centrala plattformar – System IBM z och IBM i – där många av Handelsbankens mest transaktionskritiska system körs, såsom kärnsystem för:


* Internetbank och mobil
* Kontorssystem
* Korttjänster
* Inlåning
* Stora delar av bankens internationella banksystem

Plattformarna är en kritisk del av bankens totala tekniska infrastruktur. IBM Z är en strategisk plattform på Handelsbanken som skall vara en del i bankens hybrida IT landskap som är en blandning av Azure cloud, on premises cloud-teknologi, samt kärnsystem på IBM Z, varför integrationsförmågor är nyckeln till vår framtid.


Arbetet sker enligt agila principer, och teamet deltar i SAFe‑liknande ceremonier, inklusive PI‑planering.


**Din roll**

Detta är en renodlad arkitektroll som proaktivt driver arkitekturarbete inom sitt ansvarsområde i enlighet med Handelsbankens strategier och målarkitekturer. I rollen förväntas man röra sig mellan verksamhet och teknik samt mellan helhet och detalj - viktiga egenskaper för att kunna hantera en modern, intelligent och hybrid infrastruktur.


Rollen koordinerar och verkar för IT-strategisk förflyttning, sprider kunskap och stöttar team i lösnings- och arkitekturarbete.


Infrastrukturarkitektens huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
  

* Delta i analyser kring förbättringar av plattformen
* Informera intressenter om progressen
* Dokumentation (spårbarhet, nuläge, lösningsförslag beslutsunderlag)
* Ägandeskap av arkitekturen och road map
* Regelefterlevnad
Som Arkitekt är du ansvarig för high level design och varje kompetensområde har en techlead som är ansvariga för low level design och som arbetar nära arkitekterna, så arkitekten beskriver VAD som ska åstadkommas men techlead definierar exakt HUR det tekniskt ska implementeras.


Som Arkitekt på mainframe-området så samarbetar du även med arkitekter på övriga plattformsområden med regelbundna möten för gemensamt ställningstagande runt tekniska frågeställningar och informationsspridning mellan plattformarna.


**Vad rollen erbjuder**

* Arbete i en tekniskt avancerad och affärskritisk mijö, där din specialistkompetens gör stor skillnad.
* Möjlighet att arbeta nära både drift, utveckling och arkitektur.
* Samt nedan förmåner:
**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------

* Tjänstepension
* Vinstdelningssystem
* Gruppförsäkring
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Bidrag vid föräldraledighet
* Banktjänster
* Banking services
* Benefit in connection with parental leave
* Health promotion subsidy
* Group insurance
* Occupational pension
* Profit-sharing scheme
**Kvalifikationer**
-------------------

**Din profil**

Vi söker dig som tidigare arbetat i en Tech Lead-roll eller har tidigare arkitekterfarenhet. Du har god kunskap om IBM Z (stordator/mainframe) och z/OS. Du trivs med att arbeta i komplexa systemmiljöer med stora transaktionsvolymer och höga krav på säkerhet och tillgänglighet. Du är trygg och säker i det svenska och engelska språket, både i tal och skrift.


Meriterande är erfarenhet av att arbeta i miljöer med sekventiella arbetsflöden (tågliknande), där ändringar i ett system kan påverka andra delar av processen.


Utöver ovan är det meriterande om du:


* Har en bredare allmän IT kompetens (utanför IBM Z)
* Har viss erfarenhet av Linux server (oavsett arkitektur)
* Har kunskaper om datakommunikation

Även om teknisk kompetens är viktigt, lägger vi stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och social kompetens.


Vi söker dig som har en god kommunikationsförmåga och tycker om att samarbeta med olika personer och intressenter för att nå gemensamma mål. Du är strukturerad och trivs med att ta ansvar för att planera och driva arkitekturarbete framåt.


Din analytiska förmåga gör att du gärna tar fram tydliga dokument och underlag som hjälper teamet att fatta bra beslut. Du är också nyfiken på teknik och engagerar dig i att utveckla plattformen på smarta och effektiva sätt.


**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

*Som ett steg i Handelsbankens rekryteringsprocess krävs en godkänd bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidat, utförd av en extern part, innan anställning kan ske.*

**Kontaktuppgifter**

**Rekryterande chef:** Elin Gräslund, elin.graslund@handelsbanken.se
  

**Talent Acquisition Partner:** Henrik Alm, henrik.alm2@handelsbanken.se
  

**Facklig representant Finansförbundet:** Per Almshult, per.almshult@handelsbanken.se
  

**Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen:** Bjarne Nilsson, bjarne.nilsson@handelsbanken.se


  
**Om företaget**
----------------

I Handelsbanken är mötet mellan människor grunden för allt vi gör. Vi tror på långa relationer till både kunder och medarbetare, och låter det långsiktigt kloka gå före kortsiktig vinst.


Med tilltro och respekt för varje medarbetares förmåga fördelar vi ansvar så långt ut i organisationen som möjligt. Du deltar i besluten vilken roll du än har. Hos oss växer du med ansvaret. Karriärvägarna är många, men du stakar själv ut vägen. Vi bejakar omtanke, förståelse, initiativkraft och utveckling. Varje medarbetares erfarenhet är unik och bidrar till helheten. Tillsammans är vi Handelsbanken.


Mer om Handelsbanken Mer om Handelsbanken


TOM Bildades 1871


TOM En av världens starkaste banker


TOM All verksamhet utgår från kunden


TOM Decentraliserat arbetssätt med tilltro och respekt för individen


TOM Rikstäckande kontorsnät på våra hemmamarknader


TOM Höga hållbarhetsambitioner


TOM I koncernen arbetar drygt 12 000 medarbetare. 44% av alla chefer är kvinnor.


TOM Högre lönsamhet än genomsnittet för jämförbara konkurrenter


TOM Formed in 1871


TOM One of the world’s strongest banks


TOM All business starts with the customer


TOM Decentralised working method based on trust in and respect for the individual


TOM Nationwide branch network in our home markets


TOM High ambitions regarding sustainability


TOM The Group has just over 12,000 employees. 44% of all managers are women


TOM Higher profitability than the average of peer banks


  
Henrik Alm | Kontaktperson

title: AI Platform Architect
description:
**We are looking for an AI Platform Architect for a company in Stockholm. Start ASAP, 6-month limited contract to begin with.**

**Detailed description of work task to be carried out**

* Detail out architectural roadmap for agentic AI in enterprise
* Create requirements for cloud based AI platforms including auditing & compliance requirements
* Solution architecture for GenAI applications
* Architectural drawings of cloud based platforms

**Must-have knowledge and experience**

* Experience with cloud platforms
* Experience establishing group wide enterprise gen ai capabilities and platforms
* Experience in embedded ai eco systems
* Experience with Agentic AI and its lifecycle

**Nice-to-have knowledge and experience**

* Understanding of Data products and how it can be translated to AI assets
* AWS and GCP cloud native services and their GenAI tech stack such as Bedrock and AgentCore


This is a full-time consultant position in Stockholm through Incluso. Start ASAP, 6-month limited contract to begin with, with possibility of extension after that. This role is 50% onsite in Stockholm.  

  

Please submit your CV as soon as possible since we will review the applications on an on-going basis.


For more information about this role, please contact Kanika Singhalrecruiter at Incluso.

title: Global Application Support Manager
description:
When our applications perform flawlessly, businesses move faster, teams stay productive, and customers stay happy. When they don’t — everything stops.


We’re looking for a Global Application Support Manager who thrives in that space between complexity and clarity. Someone who can lead distributed teams, calm high-severity incidents, and turn reactive firefighting into proactive excellence.


This isn’t just a support role. It’s a leadership role at the center of reliability, performance, and trust.

**What You’ll Own**

* Lead and develop the global Application Support Engineering teams, including team leads, to deliver exceptional customer support.
* Being part of making sure there are root cause analysis done and preventive actions cross functionally to reduce recurring incidents.
* Influence and evolve the support tooling ecosystem (ticketing systems, knowledge base, monitoring tools) to improve efficiency and performance.
* Oversee and ensure seamless 24/7 global support operations.
* Partner with the Global Support Leader and regional managers to align strategies, processes, and service standards.
* Ensure timely tracking, management, and resolution of customer issues in line with internal and external SLAs.
* Support and manage escalations across both EU and US regions.
* Build high-performing, customer-centric teams with clear roles, expectations, and career development paths for inriver colleagues.
* Lead continuous improvement initiatives driven by data, customer feedback, and best practices such as ITIL.
* Translate customer insights into actionable feedback for Product and Development teams.
* Monitor support KPIs and provide regular performance reporting to key stakeholders.
* Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement across global teams.
* Making sure customer insights are converted into actionable feedback for teams such as development and product.

**What You Bring**

* Proven Leadership in Team Development: Demonstrated success building, mentoring, and retaining high-performing, cross-functional teams. You foster a culture of excellence, collaboration, accountability, and continuous growth.
* Global Technical Support Leadership: Experience leading multi-tier, 24/7 technical support operations across multiple time zones, delivering service excellence at scale.
* End-to-End Incident Management Expertise: Firsthand experience managing critical incident workflows, from initial triage and root-cause analysis through to post-incident review and preventive action planning.
* ITSM & Framework Knowledge: Functional understanding of ITSM tools and best practices such as ITIL.
* SaaS & Cloud Understanding: Solid grasp of SaaS platforms and cloud infrastructure concepts.
* Customer-Centric Mindset: Experience managing executive-level customer interactions with the ability to balance strong customer advocacy alongside business priorities and cost efficiency.
* Data-Driven Operational Excellence: Skilled in leveraging analytics to reduce ticket volume, improve resolution times, and consistently elevate NPS/CSAT and operational KPIs.
* Analytical & Strategic Thinking: Ability to interpret trends, forecasts, and operational risks to proactively improve service performance.
* Collaborative Leadership Style: Strong belief in collective success, with a powerful sense of ownership and accountability.

**Why Join Inriver**


We are scaling.
  

As digital commerce accelerates, the need for structured, scalable product data has never been greater. That puts us at the center of digital transformation for leading global brands.
  

Joining Inriver means:
  

* Working in a high-growth SaaS category
* Partnering with experienced enterprise sales leaders
* Playing a direct role in revenue creation
* Building skills that elevate your long-term SaaS career
**Apply If…**


You want to build more than a support function — you want to build resilience.


You stay calm under pressure, turn incidents into improvements, and lead teams with clarity and confidence. You understand that operational excellence protects both systems and reputation.


If you’re driven by impact and ready to lead globally — we’d love to meet you.

title: Service Implementation Specialist
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.  



Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.  



At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!  



**DESCRIPTION**

Join our global Service Implementation team on a 1-year contract and play a central role in delivering mobile messaging solutions to clients and partners worldwide. In this role, you’ll help ensure our sales and implementation cycles run smoothly, collaborating closely with Sales, Product Management, Support, and Implementation teams across our international offices.  



You’ll be a key part of delivering messaging solutions at scale, directly influencing operational efficiency and client satisfaction. Your ideas, process improvements, and problem-solving will have an impact on our global operations. We offer the autonomy and flexibility you need to succeed. We challenge ourselves and each other to improve continuously, and we support you in making an impact from day one.  



This is a 1-year temporary, hybrid role based in either Stockholm, Sweden, or Madrid, Spain, reporting to the Manager Service Implementation


* Manage operator and partner processes related to service setup, documentation, and ongoing maintenance.
* Handle ordering, deployment, and ongoing usage of messaging services for Sinch clients.
* Own internal processes related to client orders and provisioning of inbound numbers and registered senders for SMS and Rich Messaging products.
* Work closely with internal and external stakeholders to gather requirements and manage service changes or updates.
* Maintain accurate and up-to-date documentation of provisioned services and partner configurations.
* Manage a high volume of parallel tickets.
Identify opportunities to improve processes, quality, and efficiency.  
* 

**REQUIREMENTS**

We believe you’re analytical, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple priorities across teams and regions. You look for ways to improve processes, troubleshooting issues and taking ownership to get things done.  

  



* Exposure and experience working with PC-based applications within the telecom or IT services industry.
* Experience with web-based CRM or service desk tools such as Jira.
* Comfortable using AI-powered tools at a user level to improve productivity, automate repetitive tasks, and enhance documentation or analysis work.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with great attention to detail and the ability to work independently.
* High attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple parallel workflows without losing structure.
* Professional proficiency in English (written and spoken).
* University degree or equivalent professional experience.

**Big Plus!**

* Understanding of wireless carrier processes.
* Knowledge of SMS, RCS, or messaging terminology.
* Experience working in a global, cross-functional environment.

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in **English** .  



At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation at this time.  



Applicants must be legally authorized to work in Madrid, Spain or Stockholm, Sweden (for example, by holding Spanish, Swedish, or EU/EEA citizenship, or a valid local work permit).  



**OUR HIRING PROCESS**

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.  



We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/ . No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Cortex Partner Development Manager
description:
Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden Sales Ref ID: JR-014827  

**Our Mission**


At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.

**Who We Are**


In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!


This role is remote, but distance is no barrier to impact. Our hybrid teams collaborate across geographies to solve big problems, stay close to our customers, and grow together. You will be part of a culture that values trust, accountability, and shared success where your work truly matters.**Job Summary**

**The Team**


The channel organization at Palo Alto Networks is a strategic pillar for our continued growth within cybersecurity, and a critical component to accomplishing our mission. Channel development is an extension of the territory sales team, with the ultimate goal to train and enable our channel partners to become empowered in the use and sales of our products.

**Job Summary**


As a strategic Partner Development Manager you will lead the expansion of our Cortex ecosystem. Unlike generalist channel roles, this is a specialized position focused exclusively on our Cortex platform (SecOps and Cloud Security) including XDR, XSIAM, XSOAR, and CLOUD. The successful candidate will be responsible for developing a high-performance ecosystem of specialized SOC partners. Your primary objective is to drive measurable revenue growth and market share by integrating the Cortex platform into the core service offerings of our most strategic partners.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and execute comprehensive business plans that align partner capabilities with Cortex growth targets, ensuring a long-term, mutually beneficial GTM strategy.
* Support partners in building, operating, and scaling Managed Security Services (MSS) powered by our Cortex platform.
* Formulate and communicate compelling value propositions that differentiate Palo Alto Networks within the partner’s security stack.
* Lead regular business performance reviews (QBRs) and maintain accurate performance dashboards for senior leadership and key stakeholders.
* Ensure partners are technically positioned and certified to deliver high-quality customer implementations across the full Cortex platform.
* Coordinate with regional sales, marketing, local channel and technical teams to ensure seamless execution of joint partner initiatives.

**Qualifications**

**Required Qualifications**

* Extensive experience in Channel Management, GSI/MSSP Business Development, or Sales Leadership within the enterprise cybersecurity ecosystem.
* Significant experience with SOC technologies is required, specifically regarding SIEM, XDR, EDR, and CNAPP (DevSecOps/CloudOps) solutions.
* A proactive, 'hunter' mentality with a track record of managing complex negotiations and resolving high-stakes channel conflicts.
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with a demonstrated ability to influence key stakeholders at partner organizations.
* Ability to understand the difference between local markets, analyze market trends and develop data-driven business cases for strategic partnerships.
* Deep subject matter expertise on the Cortex technology stack to identify where our portfolio fits within a partner’s organizational structure to drive maximum relevance and revenue.

**Our Commitment**

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.


We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.


Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.


All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.


Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

title: Cloud Platform Engineer (GCP)
description:
**About Teachiq**

Teachiq is a growing SaaS company with a clear mission: to help teachers excel so that students can learn and grow. Founded in 2015, we've grown steadily without external funding, giving us the freedom to build for the long term rather than chase short-term wins. Today, we are more than 40 people, with backgrounds spanning teaching, product development, and companies like Spotify, eBay, and Google. Our products are used by teachers in over 100 countries.

We have offices in Danderyd (Stockholm) and Gothenburg. This role is based in Gothenburg, close to the developers who will be building and operating our next‑generation cloud platform.

Our culture is shaped by four values: **We are genuine**, **We play fair**, **We build for tomorrow**, and **We dare to grow**. These values guide how we make decisions, how we work together, and how we think about long-term impact.

Situated in central Gothenburg near Stenpiren, we have a hybrid work policy, working on-site three days a week.

**The role**

We are looking for a Cloud Platform Engineer to take hands-on technical ownership of our Google Cloud Platform setup for two SaaS products.

This is an operations‑grounded platform role. You will build and evolve the foundation that our developers rely on: infrastructure as code, secure defaults, good observability, and a pragmatic operational approach that scales as we grow.

We use managed cloud services where they make sense, and you'll help us make pragmatic choices that keep the platform secure, maintainable, and easy to operate. A key part of this role is helping us turn early validation work into a well‑designed, maintainable, and secure platform that developers can operate confidently.

You will collaborate closely with developers and stakeholders across product engineering. While you will be a key internal platform owner, you will also have access to external support when needed.

**Key responsibilities**

GCP platform ownership

* Take hands‑on ownership of our GCP platform foundations across our SaaS products
* Build and maintain infrastructure with **Terraform** (modules, environments, reviews, CI for infra)
* Establish a practical baseline for IAM, service accounts, access patterns, and guardrails
* Shape and maintain networking foundations and connectivity patterns

Reliability, observability, and operability

* Build dashboards and alerting that make it easy to understand service health and user impact
* Set up pragmatic logging/metrics practices and retention suitable for production systems
* Drive operational documentation, runbooks, and incident readiness (without over‑process)

Security and resilience foundations

* Ensure secrets and sensitive configuration are handled consistently and securely (secrets management, rotation where appropriate, and least-privilege access)
* Ensure backups exist and are testable through restore exercises
* Make pragmatic risk trade‑offs clear and documented

Enablement and collaboration

* Coach and enable developers to operate the platform safely
* Help coordinate platform work across teams, setting standards and clarifying ownership
* Explain trade‑offs clearly to both technical and non‑technical colleagues

**Who you are**

You are an ops‑minded engineer who enjoys building, improving, and owning a platform. You like making systems reliable and understandable, and you prefer to automate and document rather than rely on heroics. You're service‑minded and responsive, but also comfortable pushing back and suggesting better long‑term solutions when needed.

**Required**

* Hands‑on experience running production workloads in **Google Cloud Platform** (or very strong equivalent cloud experience with a clear track record of ramping fast)
* Strong practical experience with **Terraform** and infrastructure‑as‑code workflows
* Experience establishing or operating cloud foundations: IAM, networking, environments, deploy patterns, observability
* Comfort working close to developers and enabling a shared operational responsibility
* Ability to troubleshoot incidents and explain root causes and trade‑offs clearly
* Comfort working in an environment without a rigid, closed development lifecycle
* A pragmatic, service‑oriented mindset with a bias for maintainability

**Nice to have**

* Experience running workloads on **Cloud Run**
* Experience with **Cloud SQL** (or other managed databases) on GCP
* Experience with security baselines (least privilege, secrets, hardening, vulnerability scanning)
* Experience with incident practices (postmortems, SLOs, alert hygiene)
* Experience collaborating with external consultants or partners

**Why this role matters at Teachiq**

Our cloud platform is central to our ability to scale a reliable, secure service for teachers and students.

This role ensures that:

* Our GCP setup is reproducible, secure by default, and designed to last
* Observability and operational readiness are built in — not added as an afterthought
* Developers have clear patterns and tooling to operate services safely
* We reduce manual work, long‑term complexity, and key‑person dependency

You'll play a key role in strengthening the backbone of our products — with real impact on reliability, security, and pace.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: 52 000,00kr - 68 000,00kr per month

Experience:

* cloud operations: 2 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

title: Data Center Engineering Technician, DCEO
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
  

  

You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.
  

  

We are currently seeking a Data Center Engineering Operations Technician to serve as a technical resource within our mission critical Data Center’s. The position will help ensure overall availability and reliability to meet or exceed defined service levels of Data Center Engineering Operations. We strive towards building a diverse workforce and look to hire the best people we can regardless of age, gender or ethnicity.  

  

Due to the success of the Amazon Web Services (AWS) operations and rapid expansion of Data Centers we are recruiting suitable candidates to operate/maintain these facilities in Sweden. In this role you will have a positive involvement in both the maintenance of facilities and the improvement of efficiencies to help offer Amazon customer’s better value.  

  

  

  

Key job responsibilities  

You will also be involved in:  

o Assisting in the operation and maintenance of all electrical, mechanical, fire/life safety equipment and HVAC equipment within the Data Center/Facility. This equipment supports mission-critical servers and must maintain better than 99.999% uptime.  

o Assisting in the maintenance and monitoring of all Data Center systems to include incidents/events, problems, changes, monitoring, problem escalation/notification/resolution and all other aspects of Data Center support.  

o Monitoring and troubleshooting all mechanical, electrical, HVAC systems, voice/data, cooling systems, fire/life safety equipment and generators.  

o Providing assistance to contractor or data center engineers to ensure proper operation and maintenance of all facility equipment.  

o Providing assistance to contractors or data center engineers to deploy new equipment, such as building racks, cabling, and other tasks as necessary.  

o Performing site walk throughs to verify proper operation of Facility Equipment and Monitoring Systems.  

  

In addition to acting as a Facilities First Responder to critical events, you will be a part of the team supporting new data center facilities and existing data center facilities!  

  

A day in the life  

Day to day activities for this role include;
  

o Monitoring of all alarms and systems involved in the operation of power, cooling and fire suppression systems in the data center.
  

o Planning and coordinating vendor works on site to ensure equipment is maintained and uptime retained.
  

o Supporting other sites and teams during events and planned works.
  

o Carrying out rack power up and installation duties.
  

o Monitoring and facilitating new equipment handover.
  

o Supporting new hires and team members through knowledge share and development.
  

o Event response and drill participation.  

  

  

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.  

  

Mentorship & Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 1 to 4 years of electrical, mechanical and/or controls relevant experience (degree or trade qualification preferred) with demonstrated key electrical and mechanical competencies and theory.
* Ability to follow procedures system documentation and track issues through appropriate entries into a Trouble Ticket system and apply safe electrical practice according to guidelines set by relevant electrical safety supervisory bodies, while maintaining service level agreements (SLAs) through the implementation of proactive issue detection and immediate response.
* Competent in use of basic IT programs such as MS Word/Excel or similar; Valid driving license and able to cover a 24x7 shift rotation.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Heavy industry or data center experience.
* Working knowledge of generic mechanical-room infrastructure such as chillers, Air Handling Units, and fan controls.
* Working knowledge of backup generator systems.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Microsoft Lead, Sales Manager Nordics
description:
**It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!**

Job Description:


As **Microsoft Lead, Sales Manager Nordics** at Ingram Micro, you will lead our Microsoft cloud business across the Nordic region — combining direct sales impact with the leadership of a growing team. This is a hybrid role where you drive results personally and through others, shaping both strategy and day-to-day execution.


You will own the commercial agenda for Microsoft while also holding budget responsibility for a strategic set of cloud vendors — driving performance across the full portfolio. With team leadership, partner activation, and execution at its core, this role is pivotal to our cloud strategy.


You will play a central role in expanding Ingram Micro’s Microsoft presence across the Nordics — helping us move beyond Sweden by identifying new growth pathways, challenging traditional distribution models, and accelerating strategic entry into priority markets.


**Key Responsibilities:**

* Drive the geographic expansion of our Microsoft cloud business across the Nordics — exploring alternative GTM strategies, establishing presence in new countries, and defining how we engage Microsoft partners beyond traditional distribution channels
* Lead the Nordic Microsoft business commercially — including full budget, profitability, and sales execution responsibilities across Microsoft and selected complementary cloud vendors
* Collaborate closely with our Alliance Manager to ensure strategic alignment and seamless execution across all aspects of our Microsoft partnership — including active participation in quarterly business reviews (QBRs) to track performance, surface co-sell opportunities, and drive commercial outcomes in the Nordic market.
* Identify and activate high-potential partners across the Nordic region, including cloud-native players and leading system integrators.
* Lead the development and execution of strategic business plans with key partners — working closely with our Customer Success Managers to drive cloud adoption, bundle complementary services, and accelerate Microsoft ecosystem growth.
* Lead, coach, and develop a high-performing Nordic sales team — ensuring motivation, accountability, and consistent delivery in a fast-paced, partner-centric environment
* Introduce new sales motions across modern workplace, Azure, and AI services — aligning offerings with market opportunity
* Collaborate with marketing team to launch campaigns, enablement tracks, and incentive activations
* Monitor KPIs, forecast accuracy, and partner performance via CRM and executive dashboards

**What you bring to the role**  

You are both a seller and a leader — equally confident in closing strategic deals and in guiding a team toward consistent performance. You lead by example, and you know how to lift others without losing commercial edge.
  

You thrive in high-impact roles that combine execution with ownership. With experience from the Microsoft ecosystem and the ability to manage both partner relationships and internal teams, you are ready to elevate Ingram Micro’s presence across the Nordic cloud market.


You think beyond established playbooks — exploring new channels, ecosystems, and partnerships to accelerate Microsoft-led growth. As the counterpart to our AWS expansion lead, you thrive in uncharted environments and know how to turn a footprint into full market presence.


**Skills & Requirements:**

* 5+ years of experience in cloud sales, partner management, or vendor-led go-to-market roles — with Microsoft focus
* Demonstrated ability to manage budget, sales performance, and multi-vendor portfolios
* Strong knowledge of Microsoft’s CSP model, co-sell frameworks, and Nordic cloud ecosystem
* Proven success in building and scaling strategic partner relationships
* Experience leading sales teams; capable of building trust, driving accountability, and managing performance
* Fluent in English and Swedish; other Nordic languages are advantageous
* Proficiency with CRM tools, sales planning, and performance dashboards

title: Global R&D Infrastructure Lead
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.


This Position reports to:


R&D Global Unit Lead **Your role and responsibilities (Mandatory):**


We are seeking a visionary and accomplished **Global R&D Infrastructure Strategy Lead** to define and drive the long-term strategy for R&D infrastructure across all global sites. This senior role is responsible for global standardization, modernization, and digital enablement of R&D environments.


Reporting directly to Global R&D Management, you will lead global transformation initiatives, including cloud adoption, Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) automation, interoperability between global labs, and alignment of infrastructure capabilities with strategic R&D priorities.

  

The work model for the role is: #LI Hybrid  

  

This role is contributing to the Process Automation Business of Process Control Platform Division in Bangalore and Vasteras (Sweden) .  

  

You will be mainly accountable for:

* Define and execute a unified **global R&D infrastructure strategy** aligned with R&D leadership and corporate technology direction.
* Establish **global governance, standardization practices, and infrastructure frameworks** for IT, OT, and lab environments across regions to achieve seamless availability of the R&D Infrastructure.
* Enable **interoperability and seamless connectivity between global R&D labs**, ensuring consistent user experience, data flow, and infrastructure compatibility.
* Lead cloud transformation initiatives to enable cloud‑based lab systems, scalable compute, and digital R&D capabilities.
* Champion the adoption of **Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC)** for automation, consistency, and secure provisioning of global R&D infrastructure.
* Ensure the reliability, availability, and security of global R&D systems, networks, and lab infrastructure.
* Drive standardization and optimization of asset management, inventory workflows, and global software licensing compliance.
* Collaborate with global engineering, IT, OT, cybersecurity, and facilities teams to enable strategic R&D programs.
* Establish and track global KPIs for infrastructure performance, cost optimization, and operational excellence.
* Advise global R&D leadership on infrastructure capabilities, emerging technologies, risks, and long‑term modernization paths.

**Required Qualifications*** Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Electronics, Instrumentation, or related fields.
* 12–15 years of experience in global or multi‑site infrastructure management, ideally within R&D settings.
* Demonstrated leadership in cloud technologies (Azure ARC, AWS) and infrastructure modernization.
* Hands-on experience with **IaC tools** such as Terraform, Ansible, ARM, CloudFormation, etc.
* Strong knowledge of IT/OT systems, lab infrastructure, networking, and global interoperability concepts.
* Knowledge of Kubernates, Linux Administration will be added advantage.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and influencing skills.


More About US:
ABB a provides a comprehensive range of integrated automation, electrical and digital systems and services for customers in the process, hybrid and maritime industries. These offerings, coupled with deep domain knowledge in each end market, help to optimize productivity, energy efficiency, sustainability and safety of industrial processes and operations.

  

Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.


Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.


Recruitment Fraud Warning


ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.


View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home


For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how-to-apply/fraud-warning

title: Security Consultant
description:
Atea on Pohjoismaiden ja Baltian johtava IT-infrastruktuuritoimittaja, jonka palveluksessa on 8000 työntekijää, Suomessa meitä on noin 700. Me Ateassa olemme myös vahvasti sitoutuneita yhteiskuntavastuullisiin arvoihin, kestävän kehityksen tavoitteisiin ja ympäristöystävällisiin toimintatapoihin.


**Konsultointiyksikkömme** palvelee suuria ja keskisuuria julkisen sekä yksityisen sektorin organisaatioita. Tarjoamme asiakkaillemme laadukkaita ratkaisu- ja palvelukokonaisuuksia. Asiakaskuntamme ja projektimme kasvavat, ja tiimimme etsii nyt lisävahvistusta työpöytä- ja sovellusvirtualisointiin.



Etsimme nyt joukkoomme useampaa **Security konsulttia.**


**Tehtäväsi**:



Etsimme kokeneita tietoturvaan erikoistuneita konsultteja toteuttamaan asiakkaiden Microsoft-ympäristöjen (M365/Azure) tietoturvaratkaisuja ja vahvistamaan heidän suojauskyvykkyyttään. Roolissa keskityt erityisesti identiteettiturvaan, valvontakyvykkyyksiin sekä datan suojaamiseen. Osaamisesi voi painottua yhteen tai kahteen näistä - kolmannen osa-alueen, tai muu tämän alueen osaaminen katsotaan eduksi.



Tehtävässäsi viet suojausratkaisut käytäntöön, suunnittelet toteutusmallit, rakennat konfiguraatioita, teet käyttöönottoja ja tuotat asiakkaalle toimivan, selkeästi dokumentoidun turvallisuuskyvykkyyden. Työskentelet tiiviissä yhteistyössä asiakkaiden ja muiden turvallisuusasiantuntijoiden kanssa.


**Toivomme sinulta:**


* Kokemusta **vähintään yhdestä**: Entra ID/Microsoft Sentinel/Purview Data Security
* Ymmärrystä Microsoft 365- ja Azure-alustojen suojauskäytännöistä
* Kykyä suunnitella, toteuttaa ja dokumentoida tietoturvaratkaisuja
* Hyviä viestintä- ja asiakastyötaitoja
* Oma-aloitteisuutta ja halua kehittää asiakkaiden turvallisuuskyvykkyyttä

  



Arvostamme, jos sinulla on vahvaa osaamista vähintään toisesta seuraavista


**Microsoft Sentinel – SIEM/SOAR ja valvontakyvykkyys**


* Sentinel-toteutukset: lokilähteet, detektiot, hälytykset, KQL-kyselyt
* Incident management, korrelaatiot ja tutkinnan tukeminen
* Automaatioiden rakentaminen (Logic Apps/playbookit) ja osallistuminen PoC- sekä workshop-työskentelyyn


tai


**Data Security (ml. Purview) – tiedon suojaus**


* Tietoluokittelu (labels), suojauspolitiikat ja DLP (pilvi ja tarvittaessa endpoint)
* Retention-peruskyvykkyydet, valvonta ja raportointi
* Käyttöönottojen pilotointi, vaiheistus ja poikkeusten hallinta

  



Eduksi, on mikäli sinulla on kokemusta myös


**Entra ID – identiteettiturva ja pääsynhallinta**


* Conditional Access, MFA, riskipohjainen pääsynhallinta ja Zero Trust -periaatteiden toteutus
* PIM ja Identity Governance (JML, access reviews, elinkaariprosessit ja automaatio)
* Identiteettiturvan integraatiot muihin suojausratkaisuihin


Kokemus Defender-ekosysteemistä (endpoint, identity, cloud)



Taito tuotteistaa ja kehittää toteutusmalleja


**Mitä me teemme**:



Työmme keskiössä on asiakkaan tarpeiden ymmärtäminen ja niihin vastaaminen teknologian avulla. Luomme ratkaisuja, jotka helpottavat asiakkaidemme arkea ja tukevat heidän liiketoimintansa kasvua ja kehitystä.



Tärkeää on, että sinulla on vahva tekninen osaaminen, itsenäinen työote ja motivaatio jatkuvaan kehittymiseen.


**Atealaisena sinulla on mahdollisuus** motivoivaan palkkatasoon. Käytössäsi on kattavat työsuhde-edut kuten mahdollisuus hankkia suuri valikoima it-tuotteita kilpailukykyiseen hintaan, laajat työterveyspalvelut sekä lounas-, liikunta- ja kulttuuriedut.



Atealla sinulla on mahdollisuus tehdä töitä hybridimallilla. Toivomme kuitenkin, että sinulla on halu kohdata asiakkaat ja kollegasi säännöllisesti kasvokkain. Etätyötä tuemme tarjoamalla mobiilin laajakaistayhteyden kotiisi. Työpaikkasi sijaitsee ensisijaisesti jollain seuraavista paikkakunnista: Tampere, Pori, Turku, Vaasa, Seinäjoki, Jyväskylä tai Oulu.



Jos tämä kuulostaa sinulta, älä epäröi ottaa yhteyttä ja kertoa itsestäsi sekä osaamisestasi. Lisätietoja tehtävästä antaa Head of Consulting Sami Männistö (Tampere, Turku & Pori), sekä Head of Consulting Merja Fröberg (muut paikkakunnat).



Tavoitat Samin numerosta 040 511 4002 ja Merjan numerosta 045 180 1584. Tehtävä täytetään heti sopivan henkilön löydyttyä, joten lähetä hakemuksesi pian! Hakuaika päättyy 28.3.2026

title: Kommunikatör
description:
*Vill du vara med och bidra till kommunikation som stärker en god och jämlik hälsa i Västra Götaland? Välkommen att söka jobb hos oss!*

### **Om oss**


Regionhälsans kommunikationsavdelning består av åtta personer med uppdrag att stödja olika typer av verksamheter. Nu söker vi en kommunikatör med uppdrag att stödja Kunskapsstöd psykisk hälsa.


Kunskapsstöd psykisk hälsa (KPH) är en resurs inom Västra Götalandsregionen för kunskapsutveckling och förbättringar inom olika områden av specialistpsykiatri och primärvård. KPH verkar för en god och jämlik hälsa och bidrar till utveckling samt kunskapsspridning till vårdens personal. Medarbetare på KPH bistår dessutom som sakkunniga till politiska ärenden inom psykisk hälsa. Kunskapscentrum psykisk hälsa är organisatoriskt placerad i Regionhälsan.

### **Om arbetet**


Vi erbjuder dig ett stimulerande och meningsfullt arbete i ett professionellt team med fokus på kommunikationens effekt. Du kommer att ha en bred roll som kommunikatör där du arbetar både strategiskt och operativt med kommunikationsinsatser.


I rollen som kommunikatör får du ett brett och varierat uppdrag där du arbetar för att stärka vår interna och externa kommunikation. Du ansvarar för att utforma och kontinuerligt uppdatera strategier för målgruppsanpassning och kanalval, samtidigt som du säkerställer en effektiv digital närvaro genom att skapa och utveckla innehåll på våra webbplatser samt andra digitala plattformar.


Arbetet innefattar även att producera och sprida redaktionellt material i form av artiklar, filmer, bildspel och inlägg, liksom att ta fram och uppdatera trycksaker vid behov. Du kommunicerar utbildningar i olika kanaler och driver förändringskommunikation när nya riktlinjer eller beslut ska införas i organisationen. En viktig del av rollen är även att följa upp och systematiskt utvärdera våra kommunikationsinsatser för att skapa lärande och möjliggöra kontinuerliga förbättringar.

### **Om dig**


Vi söker dig som har en högskole- eller universitetsutbildning inom medie- och kommunikationsvetenskap, eller en annan utbildning som vi bedömer likvärdig. För rollen är det ett krav att du har flera års arbetslivserfarenhet inom kommunikationsområdet. Du behöver ha en mycket god förmåga att skriva lättbegripliga och målgruppsanpassade texter och du har mycket goda kunskaper i det svenska språket.


Du har även mycket god kunskap om hur webbsidor görs tillgängliga, lättnavigerade och anpassade för besökaren. Vidare har du tidigare erfarenhet av arbete i webbpubliceringsprogram och goda kunskaper i Adobe Creative Cloud – särskilt InDesign, Photoshop och Illustrator samt i Officepaketet.


Som person är du lösningsfokuserad och trivs med att arbeta både självständigt och i nära samarbete med andra professioner. Du har förmåga att driva långsiktiga processer samtidigt som du kan hantera snabba förändringar när situationen kräver det. Det är viktigt att du har mycket god samarbetsförmåga och ett tydligt intresse för samhällsfrågor och området psykisk hälsa. Du arbetar strukturerat, är noggrann med detaljer och tar ansvar för att leverera arbete av hög kvalitet.


Stor vikt läggs vid personlig lämplighet för tjänsten.

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

  

**Om Regionhälsan**  

Förvaltningen Regionhälsan omfattar regiongemensamma vårdverksamheter och hälsofrämjande nära vård. Nära 1900 medarbetare jobbar för att invånarna ska må bra. När du blir en del av oss är du med och utvecklar verksamheten.  

Regionhälsan har en värdegrund som tagits fram tillsammans med förvaltningens chefer och medarbetare. Värdegrunden utgår ifrån tre värdeord; Tillit, engagemang och kvalitet. Vi arbetar aktivt för att värdegrunden ska vara känd och fungera som en viktig grundpelare i Regionhälsan.  

Vi ser mångfald som positivt och tycker att våra olikheter är en tillgång.


Om Västra GötalandsregionenVästra Götalandsregionen finns till för människorna i Västra Götaland. Vi ser till att det finns god hälso- och sjukvård för alla. Vi arbetar för en hållbar utveckling och tillväxt, bra miljö, förbättrad folkhälsa, ett rikt kulturliv och goda kommunikationer i hela Västra Götaland.Västra Götalandsregionen arbetar aktivt för att digitalisera fler arbetssätt. För att vara en del av den digitala omvandlingen har du med dig grundläggande färdigheter och kan använda digitala verktyg och tjänster. Du kan söka information, kommunicera, interagera digitalt, är riskmedveten och har motivation att delta i utvecklingen för att lära nytt.Västra Götalandsregionen krigsplacerar alla tillsvidareanställda medarbetare. Vill du veta mer om Västra Götalandsregionen kan du besöka vår introduktion till nya medarbetare på länken www.vgregion,se/introduktion. Du kan även läsa mer i presentation om Lön, ersättning och förmåner – det här får du som medarbetare i VGR. AnsökanVästra Götalandsregionen ser helst att du registrerar din ansökan via rekryteringssystemet. Om du som sökande har frågor om den utannonserade tjänsten eller av särskilda och speciella skäl inte kan registrera dina uppgifter i ett offentligt system - kontakta kontaktperson för respektive annons. Till bemannings-, förmedlings- och rekryteringsföretag och till dig som är försäljare:Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt direktkontakt med bemannings-, förmedlings- och rekryteringsföretag samt andra externa aktörer och försäljare av ytterligare jobbannonser. Västra Götalandsregionen har upphandlade avtal.

title: Logistics Technician
description:
*Lantbrukare har världens viktigaste jobb – att producera mat åt jordens befolkning. På Väderstad utvecklar vi maskiner och metoder i världsklass som förenklar arbetet och förbättrar resultatet för lantbrukaren. Vi befinner oss i en spännande expansionsfas med stark global efterfrågan.*
Om tjänsten
Vi söker nu en engagerade Logistiktekniker till Supply Chain Processing. I rollen arbetar du med att utveckla och förvalta våra logistikprocesser – från godsmottagning och lagerhållning till satsplockning och interna transporter. Du ansvarar för planering och beredning av logistikprocesser samt utformning av materialförvaringslösningar i både lager och produktion.
Du samarbetar nära ledare inom internlogistik och våra lager, samtidigt som du har ett brett kontaktnät med inköp, produktionsteknik och produktion. Rollen är central för att säkerställa ett effektivt flöde som stödjer vår tillverkning av premiumprodukter.
Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter* Förvalta och utveckla logistikberedningen
* Ge stöd till våra logistikfunktioner i process- och teknikrelaterade frågor
* Representera Supply Chain Processing i PUM/ECM/PPS-projekt
* Medverka i och driva utveckling av nya metoder och arbetssätt
* Ansvara för val och framtagning av emballage och förpackningsinstruktioner
* Designa logistikutrustningar vid behov
* Projektleda mindre till medelstora projekt inom logistikområdet


Om dig
Vi söker dig som är trygg i din yrkesroll och van att arbeta både självständigt och i team. Du har många kontaktytor och trivs i samarbeten där du får bidra till utveckling och förbättring. Du är proaktiv, nyfiken och har ett strukturerat arbetssätt där du sätter mål, genomför och följer upp.
Vi ser att du har:* Examen som högskoleingenjör eller motsvarande
* Några års erfarenhet från liknande roller inom tillverkande industri
* Erfarenhet av logistik inom tillverkande företag, Supply Chain Management och logistikprocesser
* Goda kunskaper inom Lean Production
* Erfarenhet av arbete i ERP-system (IFS Cloud är meriterande)
* Goda kunskaper i Officepaketet
* Goda kunskaper i både svenska och engelska


Vi erbjuder
Att arbeta hos oss innebär stora möjligheter till personlig och professionell utveckling. Väderstad präglas av en stark familjekänsla, korta beslutsvägar och ett klimat där omtanke och samarbete står i centrum. Det finns en stolthet över våra innovativa premiumprodukter och en kultur som uppmuntrar lärande, ansvarstagande och utveckling.
Övrig information
Placeringsort är Väderstad och arbetet är förlagt till dagtid.
Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen används psykometriska tester för att säkerställa en objektiv och rättvis bedömning.
Kontakt* För frågor om rollen: Daniel Stjärnberg, Manager Supply Chain Processing – daniel.stjarnberg@vaderstad.com, 0142–882 38
* För frågor om processen: Mathias Otterheim HR Business Partner, 0142–818 51


Ansökan
Urval sker löpande och tjänsterna kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Ansökningar via mail tas inte emot.
Om Väderstad*Väderstad förser det moderna lantbruket med innovativa och högeffektiva maskiner och metoder. Vår vision är att bli världens ledande partner för enastående uppkomst. Koncernen är familjeägd och finns representerad i 40 länder. År 2025 hade vi 1900 medarbetare och en omsättning på 6,1 miljarder kronor.**Väderstad är utsedd till* *Karriärföretag 2026* *– en utmärkelse som lyfter Sveriges mest attraktiva arbetsgivare. Vi är stolta över att erbjuda en arbetsmiljö som präglas av utveckling, trygghet, ansvar och lärande.\_*
Se gärna vår korta film om Väderstad AB: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=otyG\_kgySbg

title: Platform Manager (Connectivity & Base Infrastructure) | Technology & Platform
description:
**Company Description** **Hej Platform Manager! Ready to help shape the future with smart, scalable, and secure infrastructure?**


At IKEA, you can feel at home while making a difference for millions. We’re a place where everyone is welcome, encouraged to explore new tech, try new things and grow from mistakes. As our Platform Manager, you’ll have the chance to stretch your skills, experiment and work in new ways.


We are transforming the Technology and Platform organisation to build a modern and scalable technology foundation for Inter IKEA. This shift requires an organisation fully aligned with our Operating Model, one that works with a strong product and platform thinking mindset and is ready to take full accountability from strategy to operations.

 **Job Description** **About the role**


We’re looking for a Platform Manager who wants to solve meaningful, real-world challenges that help make life at home better for the many. Join us on our journey as we strengthen and evolve our connectivity and base infrastructure platforms to enable safe, reliable and sustainable digital experiences across IKEA.


In this role, you lead the platform team focusing on the specialized hardware that keeps our global value chain connected. Your scope covers the critical infrastructure that exists where our digital services meet the physical reality of our sites—from SD-WAN edge appliances and industrial-grade switching to the specialized wireless foundations in our stores, offices and distribution centres.


You take full end-to-end accountability for these physical connectivity anchors, ensuring they are managed as a modern, software-defined platform. You lead the shift away from manual site-by-site configurations toward a model of high-scale enablement, where networking hardware is deployed and managed through automation and Infrastructure-as-Code.


Collaboration is central to your way of working. You partner across product teams, operations, security and business stakeholders to align platform capabilities with real needs. You communicate roadmaps clearly, manage cross-unit dependencies and support shared processes, tools and ways of working across IKEA. As a leader, you build high-performing teams, own the budget for your domain, and manage supplier relationships that deliver long-term value.

**About you**


You bring a strong understanding of IKEA’s strategic direction and how modern connectivity and base infrastructure platforms enable our global operations. With a solid foundation in network architecture, base infrastructure, platform engineering and service management, you navigate cloud, hybrid and on-prem environments with ease.

**You’re comfortable working with:**

**Software-Defined Infrastructure:** You treat physical and network deployments with a software engineering mindset at scale. This includes Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, etc.), network virtualization, and high levels of automation.

**Zero-Trust & modern connectivity:** You implement identity-based access, micro-segmentation, and secure edge (SASE) to protect our global value chain. You are experienced with modern technologies like SD-WAN, wireless, and data centre networking.

**Base Infrastructure:** You ensure that the "heartbeat" of our systems, including DNS/DHCP/IPAM and load balancing, is highly available and automated.


As a people-centred leader, you develop high-performing teams and guide others through change. You thrive in a fast-changing environment and bring a growth mindset, exploring, learning, and sharing better ways forward. Above all, you lead with IKEA values and use technology to enable “a better everyday life for the many.”

**To be successful in this role, the following knowledge, skills, and experiences would be valuable:**

* Modern networking & connectivity: Strong understanding of cloud/hybrid ecosystems, including SD-WAN, SASE, and high-availability global connectivity for fast-scaling retail and distribution environments.
* Zero-Trust & secure edge: Deep experience in implementing identity-aware access models, micro-segmentation, and secure infra to build a secure perimeter by design.
* Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC): Using tools like Terraform to automate physical and network deployments, ensuring our foundation is version-controlled and repeatable.
* Foundational Compute & Core Services: Solid understanding of data centre operations and core services like DNS/DHCP/IPAM and load balancing managed as mission-critical products.
* Experience working with agile frameworks, scaled delivery models and IT service operations.
* Use of metrics and OKRs to measure impact and drive continuous improvement.
* Proven track record of leading technical teams, managing budgets, and optimizing costs.
* Experience with risk, compliance, and regulatory requirements for global infrastructure.
* Ability to apply security-by-design and privacy-by-design principles.

**About us**


At IKEA, we think and work differently. We challenge old patterns and create new solutions, from sustainable materials to intelligent home technology. Our vision is simple: to create a better everyday life for the many people.


In Technology and Platform, we support the whole organisation by providing reliable technology and digital platforms that are easy to use and built for the future. Working closely with teams across IKEA, we turn technology into real value and support ongoing transformation.

 **Additional Information**  

This is a full-time position located in either Malmö or Delft. The role reports into the Platform Area Manager – Core Infra and Compute Platforms and belongs to the Technology and Platform area within Operations Management. It is an enabling function with the core assignment to lead, develop, and maintain the common foundation for how Inter IKEA works across the value chain.


Interested? Submit your CV by **18th March 2026**.


If you have any special needs that require accommodation in the recruitment process, please let us know. You can reach out to jamila.harmal2@inter.ikea.com

*At IKEA, we are looking for people who believe everyone deserves a seat at the table. You’re welcome no matter where you come from, what you believe, and what you look like. We don’t even care how you have furnished your home. We’re interested in you simply because you’re you. Even if your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. We believe that people’s different perspectives, backgrounds, and personalities make us better at understanding our customers’ dreams and needs. At IKEA, we’re all on the same project.*
company_description: At IKEA, we share an inspiring vision: “to create a better everyday life for the many people”.

title: Art Director - HK
description:
Hos Scorett letar vi efter en kreativ själ med en passion för färg, form och fantastiska idéer. Är du den som alltid har tusen tankar i huvudet och bara väntar på att få dem ur dig? Bra, för vi behöver dig! Som Art Director hos oss kommer du få chansen att jobba med en rad olika varumärken och du får stort utrymme att tänka utanför ramarna. Här är några av de spännande områden du kommer att få sätta tänderna i:


* Skapa kampanjmaterial för våra interna varumärken samt för våra affärskoncept.
* Driva projekt från första idé och brief till färdigt resultat.
* Vara en snabbfotad projektledare vid fotograferingar.
* Ta fram artworks och färdigställa trycksaker för print i butik, samt ta fram och leverera material till våra digitala kanaler.
* Ansvara för att våra digitala skärmar i butik alltid visar rätt budskap på rätt plats.


Du kommer att jobba nära både vår marknadschef och ditt team, som består av kreativa och engagerade kollegor. Ditt bollplank blir marknadschef och vår andra AD (som också blir din närmaste bordsgranne). Hos oss på Scorett ges du möjligheten att påverka, ta stort ansvar och självklart bli en del av vårt fantastiska marknads- och e-handelsteam, som idag består av 11 passionerade medarbetare. Du rapporterar direkt till vår marknadschef, och tillsammans skapar vi ren magi!


**Bakgrund och kvalifikationer:**


* Du är utbildad Art Director eller har motsvarande universitets-/yrkeshögskoleutbildning inom grafisk design eller liknande.
* Du har ett brinnande intresse för färg och form.
* Du har skicklighet inom hela Creative Cloud suiten – och rör dig obehindrat i främst InDesign, Photoshop och Illustrator.
* Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta kreativt med flera varumärken samtidigt.
* Du kan snabbt och lätt klippa rörligt material i Premiere Pro och AfterEffects.
* Du är en trygg person, en lagspelare och har lätt för att samarbeta i team.

  


**Meriterande:**


* Det är ett stort plus om du har erfarenhet inom retail- och modebranschen, samt ett personligt intresse för detta.
* Kunskap och erfarenhet av att skapa tryckmaterial, tex butiksskyltar och trycksaker.


 Viktigast av allt - du är en varm, stabil och prestigelös kollega. En lagspelare som trivs i ett kreativt sammanhang där vi stöttar, inspirerar och lyfter varandra. Hos oss blir du en del av ett team som brinner för det vi gör – och där du får utrymme att växa, påverka och bidra med allt det fantastiska du kan.

  


**Tjänsten:**



Det här är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde sker omgående. Har du frågor? Tveka inte att kontakta vår marknadschef, Karin Lundberg, på karin.lundberg@scorett.se.

  


**Placering:**



Placering är på vårt huvudkontor i Varberg. Resor i tjänst för foto- och filmproduktion förekommer.

  


**Ansökan:**



Känner du att detta är rätt för dig? Skicka in din ansökan tillsammans med din portfolio, och bli en del av vårt kreativa team!

title: SMB Account Executive - Sweden
description:
We are looking for an **SMB Account Executive** to join our Nordic sales organization and strengthen our presence in Sweden.

##### **About the role**

**Based in or near Stockholm**, you will proactively identify, develop, and close opportunities with customers in the **SMB segment** (up to 1,000 seats).


You will develop relationships with prospective SMB decision-makers, uncover business needs, and communicate the value of our market-leading SaaS backup solution. As part of an established, high-performing team, you will have the collaboration and support needed to drive new business and make a real impact.

**You will:**

* Own the full sales cycle from prospecting to close, including product demos and presentations.
* Actively hunt for new business in the SMB segment (up to 1,000 seats) and build a healthy pipeline of opportunities.
* Engage directly with decision-makers to understand their needs and position Keepit’s solution effectively.
* Proactively manage and prioritize your pipeline, ensuring accurate forecasting on a monthly and quarterly basis.
* Continuously identify new ways to reach prospects and open opportunities in Sweden.
* Contribute insights and best practices to continuously improve the sales approach across the team.

##### **About you**

* Proven track record in new business sales within the SMB segment (up to 1,000 seats).
* Solid understanding of B2B SaaS or IT solution sales, ideally within cloud, backup, or related technologies (preferred, not required).
* Confident managing the entire sales cycle independently.
* Skilled at building trust-based relationships with prospective decision-makers.
* Self-driven, proactive, and adaptable, with a strong hunter mentality.
* Fluent in **Swedish and English**.
* Comfortable with **frequent travel in Sweden** to meet customers and partners.

##### **About us**


Our platform provides customers with an immutable, historical archive of their data in systems such as Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Salesforce, Entra ID, Dynamics 365, and Zendesk.


We protect our customers against everything, ranging from ransomware to simple accidents.


The majority of our back-end components are written in clean, modern C++ using mainly purpose-built components. Components responsible for business processes and data mining are built using Common Lisp. Everything runs on Linux.


We pride ourselves on backing up billions of objects over foreign APIs using imperfect networks on systems with finite memory and making it all happen in a performant, reliable, and predictable way.

##### **We offer:**

* Competitive salary.
* Pension scheme.
* A modern, energetic global work environment.
* Flexible work-life balance.
* Regular team-building activities.
* Opportunities for professional development and career advancement.
* Compensation is based on experience and skill set.

*We kindly ask you not to provide us with any sensitive categories of personal data when applying for a job with us. When applying for the vacancy, Keepit will process your personal data, and therefore we recommend that you also* ***read our*** ***privacy policy****, which describes our processing of personal data and your rights as a data subject.*

title: Frilansare inom Tech? Jobba med oss på Devoteam Creative Tech!
description:
- **Dig vill vi samarbeta med!**  

Vi letar efter erfarna underkonsulter inom Cloud, Data Cyber och AI, som vill bygga morgondagens digitala lösningar tillsammans med oss. Vi sitter i Malmö och Halmstad och jobbar med några av regionens mest spännande bolag.
  

  

Mer än bara ett företag, vi vill vara en partner i din framgång:
  

25 års global erfarenhet: Med över 10 000 medarbetare i 20 länder är vi en ledande AWS, Azure, Snowflake och Google Cloud-partner som bidrar med expertis och innovation i varje projekt. Creative Tech Malmös fokus ligger främst på att hjälpa nordiska företag att ta tillvara på sin data genom mjukvara, moderna dataplattformar, avancerad analys och AI-drivna lösningar.  

  



**Vi söker dig som är expert inom:**


	* Utveckling: Fullstack, Frontend eller Backend.
	* Mobile: iOS eller Android.
	* Cloud: AWS, Azure eller GCP.
	* Data: Data Engineering och AI/ML.
	* Ledarskap: Tech Leads och Arkitekter.**Varför Devoteam?**

Hos oss får du tillgång till tunga uppdrag, ett starkt tekniskt community (vi älskar våra Creative Days!) och ett brett nätverk av innovativa kunder.
  

  

Process: För denna tjänst är ett godkänt utdrag ur belastningsregistret en förutsättning för anställning.


Nyfiken? Registrera din profil så hör vi av oss när vi har ett uppdrag som matchar din kompetens.
company_description: Devoteam is a leading consulting firm focused on digital strategy, tech platforms, cybersecurity and business transformation.

title: Product Partnership Engineer
description:
**TL;DR:** We’re hiring a Product Partnership Engineer to build and scale Lovable’s most strategic product partnerships. You’ll work directly with enterprise partners to design and ship high-impact integrations, reading their stack, prototyping solutions yourself, and shaping both our roadmap and theirs. This role sits at the intersection of engineering, product, and enterprise relationships, and will directly accelerate Lovable’s ecosystem growth and enterprise adoption.

**Why Lovable?**


Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.


We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.

**What we’re looking for**

* 5+ years in Technical Business Development, Forward Deployed Engineering, Solutions Engineering, or as a technical founder/CTO - in high-velocity environments.
* Hands-on experience with integrations; you've read the docs, written the scripts, and ship something to production, even if you're not a full-time engineer.
* Track record of structuring and executing product-centric partnerships that involve real technical depth.
* Genuinely technical; comfortable reading technical documentation, understanding cloud architectures, and forming independent views on integration feasibility.
* Strong enterprise and commercial instincts: comfortable navigating senior stakeholders in negotiating, building relationships and managing complex deals while maintaining technical credibility.
* High agency and bias for action; you prototype first and refine later than waiting for full specs.

**What you’ll do**

* Own and deepen relationships with Lovable’s most strategic product and enterprise partners — driving urgency, alignment, and executive-level momentum.
* Independently assess partner architectures, APIs, and other integration points to identify high-impact integration opportunities, validate feasibility, and proactively surface risks or blockers.
* Prototype and spike early integrations yourself to shape requirements, accelerate decision-making, and reduce engineering lift.
* Scope and, where appropriate, ship production-ready integrations that deliver measurable value to Lovable users and our partners.
* Develop compelling business cases for integrations that clearly demonstrate long-term value creation for partners, Lovable, and end customers with a strong focus on measurable impact.
* Feed technical and market insights back into Lovable’s product organization, while collaborating cross-functionally (Engineering, Product, Marketing, Growth) and leading workshops to drive alignment and successful go-to-market execution.

**About your application**


Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.


We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

title: Microsoft Lead, Sales Manager Nordics
description:
As **Microsoft Lead, Sales Manager Nordics** at Ingram Micro, you will lead our Microsoft cloud business across the Nordic region — combining direct sales impact with the leadership of a growing team. This is a hybrid role where you drive results personally and through others, shaping both strategy and day-to-day execution.


You will own the commercial agenda for Microsoft while also holding budget responsibility for a strategic set of cloud vendors — driving performance across the full portfolio. With team leadership, partner activation, and execution at its core, this role is pivotal to our cloud strategy.


You will play a central role in expanding Ingram Micro’s Microsoft presence across the Nordics — helping us move beyond Sweden by identifying new growth pathways, challenging traditional distribution models, and accelerating strategic entry into priority markets.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Drive the geographic expansion of our Microsoft cloud business across the Nordics — exploring alternative GTM strategies, establishing presence in new countries, and defining how we engage Microsoft partners beyond traditional distribution channels
* Lead the Nordic Microsoft business commercially — including full budget, profitability, and sales execution responsibilities across Microsoft and selected complementary cloud vendors
* Collaborate closely with our Alliance Manager to ensure strategic alignment and seamless execution across all aspects of our Microsoft partnership — including active participation in quarterly business reviews (QBRs) to track performance, surface co-sell opportunities, and drive commercial outcomes in the Nordic market.
* Identify and activate high-potential partners across the Nordic region, including cloud-native players and leading system integrators.
* Lead the development and execution of strategic business plans with key partners — working closely with our Customer Success Managers to drive cloud adoption, bundle complementary services, and accelerate Microsoft ecosystem growth.
* Lead, coach, and develop a high-performing Nordic sales team — ensuring motivation, accountability, and consistent delivery in a fast-paced, partner-centric environment
* Introduce new sales motions across modern workplace, Azure, and AI services — aligning offerings with market opportunity
* Collaborate with marketing team to launch campaigns, enablement tracks, and incentive activations
* Monitor KPIs, forecast accuracy, and partner performance via CRM and executive dashboards

**What you bring to the role**  

You are both a seller and a leader — equally confident in closing strategic deals and in guiding a team toward consistent performance. You lead by example, and you know how to lift others without losing commercial edge.  

You thrive in high-impact roles that combine execution with ownership. With experience from the Microsoft ecosystem and the ability to manage both partner relationships and internal teams, you are ready to elevate Ingram Micro’s presence across the Nordic cloud market.


You think beyond established playbooks — exploring new channels, ecosystems, and partnerships to accelerate Microsoft-led growth. As the counterpart to our AWS expansion lead, you thrive in uncharted environments and know how to turn a footprint into full market presence.

**Skills & Requirements:**

* 5+ years of experience in cloud sales, partner management, or vendor-led go-to-market roles — with Microsoft focus
* Demonstrated ability to manage budget, sales performance, and multi-vendor portfolios
* Strong knowledge of Microsoft’s CSP model, co-sell frameworks, and Nordic cloud ecosystem
* Proven success in building and scaling strategic partner relationships
* Experience leading sales teams; capable of building trust, driving accountability, and managing performance
* Fluent in English and Swedish; other Nordic languages are advantageous
* Proficiency with CRM tools, sales planning, and performance dashboards
company_addresses:
3351 Michelson Drive, Suite 100.
Irvine, CA 92612 USA
company_description: Headquartered in Irvine, California, Ingram Micro is the world's largest distributor of wholesale technology products.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**Platform Engineer**
---------------------


At Kry, our platform is the backbone of everything we build. As a Platform Engineer, you will play a critical role in evolving the cloud infrastructure and shared foundations that power healthcare services used by millions of patients across Europe.


We’re hiring at mid to senior level. You’ll be trusted to take ownership of complex problems and contribute to architectural decisions that impact the whole organisation.

### **The Role**
