* Minst 5 års erfarenhet i rollen som Systemintegratör



  





 Meriterande kompetens:
 


* Erfarenhet av arbete inom offentlig sektor
* Erfarenhet av liknande Dynamics-uppdrag inom större organisationer
* Minst 3 års dokumenterad erfarenhet (de senaste 5 åren) av arbete med Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations
* Erfarenhet av liknande Dynamics-uppdrag
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom rättsväsendet



  





 Uppdraget kan komma att omfattas av säkerhetsskydd. Säkerhetsprövning och säkerhetsklassning kommer att genomföras innan uppdragsstart. Svenskt medborgarskap kan komma att krävas.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

title: Verksamhetsinriktad Enterprise Architect
description:
Vill du arbeta med Enterprise Architecture som verkligen gör skillnad? Vill du vara med och forma framtidens organisationer – på riktigt? Hos Solita gör vi det tillsammans i ett nyfiket och prestigelöst sammanhang där strategi, affärsarkitektur och digitalisering hänger ihop!
 



  





 På Solita söker vi nu Enterprise Architects på medior till senior nivå som vill arbeta i skärningspunkten mellan affär, förändring och teknik. Vi letar efter dig som har tillräcklig erfarenhet för att skapa värde idag, och samtidigt är nyfiken, utvecklingsbar och hungrig på att fortsätta lära.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som Enterprise Architect på Solita arbetar du med uppdrag som syftar till att skapa verklig affärsnytta och hållbar förändringsförmåga hos våra kunder. Du hjälper organisationer att förstå nuläge, formulera riktning och fatta bättre beslut i komplexa sammanhang. För oss är Enterprise Architecture inte ett IT-ramverk, utan ett sätt att skapa sammanhang mellan strategi, affär, process, information, applikation och teknik. I dagens landskap där AI transformerar hela branscher är Enterprise Architecture viktigare än någonsin. I vissa uppdrag arbetar vi med frågeställningar som hur agentisk AI kan orkestreras, hur kunskapsgrafer kan stödja AI-system, och hur EA möjliggör innovation och flexibilitet i komplexa ekosystem.
 **Vi ser Enterprise Architecture som ett tolkande ramverk, inte bara ett sätt att mäta eller dokumentera. Arkitekturen hjälper våra kunder att sätta signaler i sitt sammanhang och fatta bättre beslut.** 
 EA hos oss omfattar minst lika mycket verksamhetsarkitektur, process och samspel som teknik.
 



  





 Du arbetar nära kundens verksamhet och ledning, tillsammans med andra specialister på Solita, och har en central roll i att:
 


* formulera mål, förmågor och strategiska vägval
* strukturera komplex information, processer och beroenden till begripligt beslutsunderlag
* utveckla och visualisera affärsarkitektur, informationsarkitektur och övergripande målarkitektur
* skapa tydlighet i hur verksamhet, processer, integrationer och system hänger ihop
* möjliggöra transformation, innovation och långsiktig utveckling
* facilitera workshops, samskapande och dialog mellan IT, verksamhet, produkt, data och andra nyckelintressenter.



  





**Vad du kommer att arbeta med** 




 Uppdragen varierar, men kan exempelvis omfatta:
 


* Affärs- och verksamhetssarkitektur kopplat till strategi, styrning och transformation
* Förmåge-, mål- och värdeflödesmodeller
* Verksamhets- och processarkitektur, inklusive samband mellan processer, information och system
* Nuläges- och målarkitekturer samt roadmaps
* Beslutsstöd inför investeringar och förändringsinitiativ
* Informations- och begreppsmodellering
* Arkitektur för integration och samspel mellan system, plattformar och ekosystem
* Design av ekosystem och samverkansmodeller
* Arkitektur som möjliggörare för data- och AI-drivna arbetssätt



  





 Du kan ha flera uppdrag parallellt och har god möjlighet att påverka både din inriktning och din utvecklingsresa över tid.
 



  





**Vi tror att du har** 



* Relevant akademisk bakgrund eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Stark analytisk förmåga
* Erfarenhet av arbete med verksamhetsutveckling, arkitektur, processutveckling, analys eller digitalisering
* Förmåga att se och förklara samband mellan affär, process, information, integration och teknik, samt att se arkitektur som en möjliggörare för affärsutveckling, inte bara teknik
* Teknisk nyfikenhet och en genuin vilja att lära dig nya saker. Ett intresse för hur AI och moderna datastrukturer (som grafer och ontologier) kan transformera arkitekturarbetet.
* Intresse för konsultrollen och att arbeta nära kund
* Utmärkt förmåga att presentera, moderera och kommunicera på både svenska och engelska.



  





 Vi söker inte en “färdig mall", utan rätt grund och rätt mindset. Viktigast är att du har rätt grund, rätt nyfikenhet och vilja att växa i rollen!
 **För oss handlar EA ytterst inte om modeller i sig, utan om att skapa mening som kan omsättas i handling.** 




  





**Meriterande är erfarenheter av och/eller intresse för något av följande** 



* Erfarenhet av EA-verktyg (t.ex. Ardoq, ARIS, Bizzdesign, SAP LeanIX, Orbus Infinity, Qualiware, Sparx EA etc.)
* Modellering av affärs-, process- och informationsarkitektur
* Ontologier, semantiska modeller och grafdatabaser
* AI som stöd för analys, modellering eller beslutsfattande
* Affärsnära digitalisering, transformation och förändringsarbete



  





**Personliga egenskaper vi värdesätter högt** 




 På Solita lägger vi mycket stor vikt vid vem du är, inte bara vad du kan.
 



 Vi tror att du:
 


* är nyfiken, lärande och vill utvecklas kontinuerligt
* trivs i komplexitet och är bekväm med att inte ha alla svar
* är prestigelös och generös med kunskap
* gillar samarbete och samskapande
* vill bli en del av ett sammanhang – inte bara leverera i ett uppdrag



  





**Om Solita och Design & Strategy** 




 Solita är ett snabbväxande företag med över 2 200 medarbetare som arbetar med digital transformation, drivet av data och mänsklig expertis. Vi arbetar med både stora och små kunder och har kontor i Sverige, Finland, Danmark, Norge, England, Tyskland, Belgien, Schweiz,
 



 Polen. Solita Design & Strategy är ett multidisciplinärt community som brinner för att skapa hållbar förändring. Vi är en gemenskap med mer än 170 strategikonsulter, designers, enterprise architects och affärstransformationsledare, drivna av mänskliga insikter och beteenden, och som arbetar med att skapa sammanhang mellan affär, process, data och teknik. Vi arbetar med både svenska och internationella kunder i deras eller våra gemensamma lokaler i norra och centrala Europa. Tillsammans med resten av Solitas mångsidiga data- och teknikexperter visar vi vägen för hur framtidens tjänster designas och byggs. Hos oss finns alltid någon att lära av, och någon som vill lära av dig. Människor kommer till oss för att bli en del av en mångsidig gemenskap av erfarna yrkesmänniskor och kontinuerliga lärare. Och människor stannar av samma anledning – och av de som lämnar, kommer även många tillbaka.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder dig** 



* En internationell arena med möjlighet att växa professionellt tillsammans med de främsta experterna i branschen.
* Meningsfulla uppdrag med verkligpåverkan
* En kultur som tar både prestation och välmående på allvar. Ett fantastiskt team som inte bara samarbetar i projekt, utan även gärna ses för en lunchlöpning eller en afterwork
* Stort utrymme för utveckling och att specialisera dig inom det som motiverar dig
* Flexibilitet, förtroende och långsiktighet



  





**Är du redo att ta nästa steg med Solita?** 




 Skicka in din ansökan med CV eller LinkedIn-profil, och gärna några rader om varför rollen som Enterprise Architect på Solita lockar just dig. Är du redo att ta första steget? Vi ser fram emot att lära känna dig! Vid frågor kan du kontakta rekryteringsansvarig; Sara Lindström, sara.lindstrom@solita.se

title: Associate Mechanical Plant Design Engineer
description:
**Description**  



  

**The opportunity**

  

The Mechanical Plant Design team, part of HVDC, is now looking for an Associate Mechanical Plant Design Engineer to join. You are welcome into our energetic team with mix of experienced and young engineers and colleagues from diverse nationalities around the world. We work closely within the various design teams and collaborate with engineering and research teams in Sweden and abroad.

*"Our team is highly supportive and excels at sharing knowledge. We are looking for someone who can further strengthen this cooperative spirit, so if you thrive in a collaborative environment and value teamwork, this could be the perfect opportunity for you."* - Hiring Manager Daniel Granat

**How you’ll make an impact**

* Evaluate, select and apply standard techniques and procedures to perform station layout design in 3D modelling in parts and assemblies. 2D drafting for drawings and layouts and make sure they are delivered on time and meet quality and safety standards.
* Correctly use design principles, guidelines and applicable standards that are used within mechanical plant design of HVDC stations, onshore and offshore.
* Prepare and propose/present for example bill of materials, estimated engineering hours, general project documentation.
* Interact with customers, suppliers, contractors and internal departments to achieve the scope of deliveries.


**Your background**

* A degree in Mechanical Engineering or related discipline.
* Knowledge in 3D-Modeling and preforming 2D-drawings/layouts in Software tools NX/TC.
* A high level of self-motivation, curiosity and desire to learn about new Technologies.
* A collaborative, solutions-oriented approach and strong communication skills.
* Proficiency in English is required, knowledge in Swedish is a great advantage.

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement.
* Flexible working time.
* Health care and wellness allowance.
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally.
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase.
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development.
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden.
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave.
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks.

  



**More about Us**


The preferred location for the role is Ludvika and requires frequent presence at our office, especially in the first 6 months up to a year. We also have offices in other locations in Sweden where it’s possible to work from after the initial onboarding.

  

Are you ready for an exciting new challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Welcome to apply! Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis so don’t delay – apply today!

  

Recruiting Manager Daniel Granat, daniel.granat@hitachienergy.com will answer your questions about the position. All other questions can be directed to Talent Partner Nicole Bergman, nicole.bergman@hitachienergy.com


Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Mikael Hjort, +46 107-38 29 86; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, +46 107 38 70 43; Unionen: Fredrik Holmgren, +46 107-38 21 85

**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Administratör med inriktning mot grundutbildning
description:
Vill du arbeta i en internationell miljö där utveckling och samarbete står i fokus? Vi söker nu en vikarierande administratör till vå grundutbildning då vår medarbetare är tjänstledig.


**Information om avdelningen**  

Institutionen för data- och informationsteknik är en integrerad institution mellan Göteborgs universitet och Chalmers tekniska högskola AB, belägen på campus Johanneberg och campus Lindholmen i Göteborg. Institutionens verksamhet omfattar högklassig forskning, utbildning och nyttiggörande inom områden som AI & machine learning, software- & hardware engineering, computer science, security, network & systems. Organisationen består av drygt 300 anställda med en hög internationell sammansättning.



Den administrativa verksamheten vid institutionen är gemensam för både Chalmers och Göteborgs universitet och leds av en administrativ chef och en biträdande administrativ chef. Vi möter dagligen studenter, lärare och övriga anställda som vi ger ändamålsenlig och professionell service till. På avdelningen arbetar totalt 32 medarbetare som ger kompetent stöd inom ekonomi, HR, kommunikation, studievägledning, utbildningsadministration, intern service m.m.


**Beskrivning av tjänsten**  

Ditt huvudsakliga uppdrag är att ge studenter och lärare stöd inom grundutbildningsadministration. Du samarbetar med kollegor från många delar av verksamheten så som lärarkollegiet, programansvariga, viceprefekt, linjechefer och studierektorer. Här är du en nyckelperson som möter människor i stora och små konstellationer från världens alla hörn. I de utbildningsadministrativa arbetsuppgifterna ingår bland annat rapportering och registrering i studiedokumentationssystemet Ladok, antagningsadministration, administrera examensarbeten, tentamenshantering och bemanning av vår expedition samt övriga förekommande uppgifter inom utbildningsadministrationen. Då verksamheten är integrerad är du aktiv inom både Göteborgs universitet och Chalmers tekniska högskola och vid båda våra campus Johanneberg och Lindholmen. I rollen nätverkar du aktivt både inom avdelningen, institutionen och de båda huvudmännen. Vi ser även att du tillsammans med dina kollegor är med och utvecklar våra rutiner för att säkerställa en hög servicenivå såväl internt som externt.



Arbetsuppgifterna kan variera efter behov.


**Kvalifikationer**  

Vi söker dig som har relevant utbildning på högskolenivå eller motsvarande som bedöms vara relevant för rollen. Starkt meriterande är erfarenhet av liknande arbetsuppgifter inom universitet och/eller högskola och annat arbete som innebär myndighetsutövning.



God datorvana är ett krav. Meriterande är kunskap i Word, Excel, Ladok, NyA, samt andra utbildningsrelaterade system som Göteborgs universitet och Chalmers använder. Att du kommunicerar väl på både engelska och svenska är en nödvändighet då vi verkar i en internationell miljö.



För att lyckas i rollen behöver du ha ett genuint intresse för andra människor och trivas med att samarbeta med andra. Som person är du serviceinriktad, kan arbeta självständigt och har förmåga att ta egna initiativ för att hitta lösningar att utveckla och effektivisera det administrativa arbetet. Du är självgående, effektiv, noggrann och flexibel i ditt arbete. Du har ett strukturerat arbetssätt med god förmåga att planera ditt arbete och att prioritera, samt att hantera många olika uppgifter samtidigt.


**Anställningsform**  

Anställningen är ett vikariat på ett år, med tillträde så snart som möjligt.


**Att arbeta på Chalmers**  

Chalmers värdeord: öppenhet, respekt, delaktighet, mångfald och kvalitet, genomsyrar synen på vår arbetsmiljö och våra medarbetare. Vi erbjuder en stimulerande arbetsplats i en akademisk miljö, där studenter och medarbetare drivs av att skapa värde för en hållbar framtid.



Våra förmåner för anställda omfattar bland annat:  

* Flexibilitet att arbeta på distans med hänsyn till verksamhetens behov.
* Semester upp till sju veckor per år.
* Kollektivavtal med föräldralön, sjukpenningtillägg, läkemedelskostnader, löneväxling, pension, inarbetade dagar samt flextid.
* Friskvårdsbidrag samt en friskvårdstimma varje vecka under betald arbetstid.


Här kan du läsa mer om våra förmåner och hur det är att arbeta på Chalmers.  

  

**Ansökningsförfarande**  

Ansökan ska vara märkt med namn och dokumenten sparas som PDF-filer enligt nedan:  

  

**CV**  

  

**Personligt brev**  

* 1-2 sidor

  

**Övrigt (valfritt)**  

* Eventuella intyg, betyg etc.

  

Sista ansökningsdag: **2026-03-18**  

  

**Vid frågor, vänligen kontakta**  

Jenny Andersson Vaughan  

jennyva@chalmers.se  

0768-537802  

  

*\*\*\* Chalmers undanber sig alla erbjudanden om ytterligare jobbannonsering eller rekryteringsstöd i samband med denna rekrytering.* \*\*\*

*Chalmers tekniska högskola i Göteborg forskar och utbildar inom teknik och naturvetenskap på hög internationell nivå. Universitetet har 3 100 anställda, 10 000 studenter och utbildar ingenjörer, arkitekter och sjöbefäl. Med vetenskaplig excellens som grund utvecklar Chalmers kompetens och tekniska lösningar för en hållbar värld. Genom globalt engagemang och entreprenörsanda skapar vi innovationskraft, i nära samarbete med övriga samhället.*  

*Chalmers grundades 1829 och har än idag samma motto: Avancez – framåt.*

title: AI Engineer Golang to Ictech Stockholm!
description:
*For English, see below.*

Vi söker en driven **AI Engineer** med fokus på mjukvaruutveckling och AI-lösningar. Rollen innebär att **bygga och vidareutveckla intelligenta, skalbara system** i och kring dataplattformen, med hög kodnära närvaro och fokus på **Go-utveckling**. Du får möjlighet att **jobba i framkant av AI och mjukvaruutveckling**, med stor frihet att påverka lösningar, arbeta med moderna tekniker och **driva utvecklingen av avancerade system som gör verklig skillnad**!

#### **Om rollen**

*Som AI Engineer ansvarar du för att:*

* Utveckla integrationer och backend-tjänster, med fokus på Go
* Implementera AI-drivna funktioner och användarnära applikationer
* Omsätta verksamhetsbehov till robusta tekniska lösningar, från datainhämtning och systemdesign till AI-modellintegration
* Driva AI-initiativ från prototyp till produktion
* Bidra till att etablera nästa generations intelligenta system
* Arbeta iterativt med moderna utvecklingsmetoder, där AI är en naturlig del av processen

#### **Vi söker dig som:**

* Har **stark erfarenhet (8-10 år) av mjukvaruutveckling**, med fokus på **Go**
* Har **erfarenhet av AI- eller ML-projekt**, gärna kring agentisk AI, MCP-servrar eller conversational AI
* Har förmåga att kombinera **teknisk kompetens** med **affärsförståelse**
* Trivs med att **arbeta nära koden** och **driva idéer från koncept till produktion**
* Är nyfiken, initiativrik och **vill påverka utvecklingen av nästa generations AI-lösningar**

#### **Varför Ictech?**


Med lång erfarenhet i branschen och ett starkt nätverk i regionen bygger vi en stabil grund för fortsatt framgång. Ictech, grundat 2011 i Göteborg, är ett växande konsultbolag med 160 anställda över 5 olika orter, specialiserade på system- och mjukvaruutveckling.

* **Konsulter som trivs bra**: 95% tycker att vi är en idealisk arbetsgivare
* **Flexibel lönemodell** där du styr löneuttag, semester och val av uppdrag... **Eller en fast lönemodell** beroende på vad du föredrar!
* **Låg personalomsättning** (6%)
* Våra medarbetare har en **snitterfarenhet på 14 år,** med bred kompetens


Som anställd på Ictech får du möjlighet att **utvecklas både tekniskt och professionellt** genom uppdrag hos olika kunder inom flera branscher – ofta med stor flexibilitet. Vi tror på att våra konsulter gör störst nytta när de får använda sin expertis i uppdrag som verkligen passar dem, och vi ser till att **du har inflytande över vilka uppdrag du tar dig an**.

**Vi värdesätter det personliga**: för oss är rätt person på rätt uppdrag avgörande och vi har få anställda per chef för att säkerställa rätt stöd och tid. Det ger resultat, **100% skulle rekommendera oss för en vän** och **97% känner sig uppskattade av sin chef**. **Det är siffror vi är stolta över!**


Vi erbjuder **kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling** genom utbildningar och nya tekniska utmaningar, samtidigt som du är en del av en stark företagskultur där gemenskap, omtanke och arbetsglädje står i centrum.


Hos oss har du också stor frihet att påverka din arbetssituation. Vi erbjuder **konkurrenskraftig lön** och **riktigt generösa förmåner**, och du kan själv **välja mellan en flexibel eller traditionell lönemodell**, beroende på vad som passar dig bäst.

*Flexibilitet finns också för anställning som* ***underkonsult****.*

#### **Ansökan**


Låter det här som något för dig? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag! Vi ser fram emot att höra mer om dig.


We are looking for a driven **AI Engineer** with a focus on software development and AI solutions. The role involves **building and further developing intelligent, scalable systems** within and around our data platform, with a strong hands-on coding presence and focus on **Go development**. You will have the opportunity to **work at the forefront of AI and software development**, with the freedom to influence solutions, work with modern technologies, and **drive the development of advanced systems that make an impact that matters!**

### **About the Role**

*As an AI Engineer, you will be responsible for:*

* Developing integrations and backend services, with a focus on Go
* Implementing AI-driven features and user-facing applications
* Translating business needs into robust technical solutions, from data acquisition and system design to AI model integration
* Driving AI initiatives from prototype to production
* Contributing to the establishment of next-generation intelligent systems
* Working iteratively with modern development methodologies, where AI is a natural part of the process

### **We Are Looking For Someone Who:**

* Has **strong experience (8–10 years) in software development**, with a **focus on Go**
* Has **experience in AI or ML projects**, preferably related to agentic AI, MCP servers, or conversational AI
* Can **combine technical expertise with business understanding**
* Enjoys working **close to the code** and pushing ideas from **concept to production**
* Is curious, proactive, and **eager to influence the development of next-generation AI solutions**

### **Why Ictech?**


With long-standing experience in the industry and a strong regional network, we build a solid foundation for continued success. Founded in 2011 in Gothenburg, **Ictech** is a growing consulting company with 160 employees across five locations, specializing in system and software development.

* **Satisfied consultants:** 95% feel we are an ideal employer
* **Flexible compensation model** where you control your salary, vacation, and choice of assignments... **or a fixed salary model**, depending on your preference
* **Low staff turnover** (6%)
* Our employees have an **average of 14 years of experience** and broad expertise


As an employee at Ictech, you will have the opportunity to **grow both technically and professionally** through assignments with various clients across industries. We believe our consultants make the most impact when they can use their expertise in projects that suit them best, and we ensure you have influence over which assignments you take on.

**We value the personal touch**: for us, having the right person in the right assignment is crucial. We maintain a low employee-to-manager ratio to provide proper support and time, which delivers results: **100% would recommend us to a friend**, and **97% feel appreciated by their manager**.


We offer **continuous skills development** through training and new technical challenges while being part of a strong company culture focused on community, care, and workplace happiness.


At Ictech, you also have significant freedom to influence your work situation. We offer competitive salaries and generous benefits, and you can **choose between a flexible or traditional compensation** model depending on what suits you best.

### **Application**


Is this your next challenge? Submit your application today! We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Systems Engineer - Wave Energy
description:
Working at CorPower Ocean you will be part of a world class team, determined to make big impact. We are on a mission to bring reliable and competitive wave energy to the world. We offer a high degree of autonomy and flexibility, combined with great personal responsibility. CorPower Ocean is a global leader in wave energy, with a technology that has shown game-changing performance. Your work will contribute to the global transition to renewable energy by unlocking one of the largest untapped sources of clean energy on earth.


The Role


We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Systems Engineer to join our team in supporting the development of our wave energy converter. We utilize a Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) approach, and this role is critical to ensure the quality of our complex products, both individual wave energy converters (WEC) and full-scale WEC farms. In this transversal role, you will work closely with other Systems Engineers, Product Owners, and Module Owners on requirement management, verification and validation (V&V), risk and interface management, design modification support, and on the path to commercial certification.


Responsibilities

* Verification & Validation: Design and oversee rigorous testing protocols to validate system requirements, ensuring that individual WECs and full-scale arrays perform as predicted by our models and satisfy all stakeholder needs.
* Interface Control: Lead the definition and management of Interface Control Documents (ICDs) to ensure seamless technical integration between mechanical, electrical, and software sub-systems.
* Requirements Management: Maintain the integrity and quality of our requirements throughout the lifecycle, ensuring full traceability and relevance within our requirement management system.
* Certification & Compliance: Contribute to the product certification process, for example grid compliance and third-party verification, ensuring our technology meets all regulatory and industry standards.

Possible responsibilities:

* Contribute to the development of our digital twin model, especially ensuring that the test protocol results are transferred into our numerical tools.

Skills and qualifications

* BSc or MSc in relevant disciplines such as Physics, Engineering, or Mathematics.
* Proven experience as a System Engineer, ideally within complex hardware and software integration projects, and in the industry.
* Strong analytical skills.
* Proficiency in requirement management tools is favorable, for example DOORS, Jira, or ReqSuite.
* Experience with and interest in complex machines is qualifying.

Your personality, experience and interest in the field are the most important and what is most highly valued at CorPower. You are proficient in English, both spoken and written.


As a person:

* You are striving for excellence, put quality into everything you do
* You are self-motivated and love to optimise your time
* You always search for the most sustainable solutions to difficult problems
* You love to learn new things, and take pride in constantly developing your skills
* You are persistent, knowing it takes stamina to reach pioneering goals
* You see your tasks through to completion
* You are comfortable in presenting your solutions internally and externally
* You are data driven and strive to always back your points with a solid research

CorPower Ocean has a highly diversified team with many nationalities and backgrounds, all working towards the same goal. This is something we are very proud of. We are not perfect yet but we hope you share our aim to reach higher equality.

title: Field QA Engineer
description:
*Do you want to be part of Verisure Innovation? We are looking for an enthusiastic Field Quality Assurance Engineer to our office in Malmö. In our team we are supporting Verisure with quality assurance services on both hardware and software products and services. This means that everything that Verisure launches for our customers in 8 countries in Northern Europe, is monitored by our Field Quality team to ensure the products and services perform as they should, and in compliance with the required standards.*  

  

*We have a great team culture with members from different countries and backgrounds, and our team members love working here. It is a team with a lot of experience, and people in the team are truly passionate about making sure we deliver good products that perform well in our clients' homes so that we can protect them.*

 **About the role**

As a Field Quality Assurance Engineer at Verisure, you will be responsible for driving the monitoring the performance of our products in field. This means that you need to be able to read and analyze data, understand and define KPI's, and are able to be hands on when it comes to investigating on issue. This includes hands on lab testing of the products (hardware & firmware), gather and analyze data, discuss metrics, include teams in solving issues and follow up until they are solved, and manage a controlled roll-out.

  

To avoid unclarities around the definition of Quality Assurance: at Verisure this is not a software testing role. Software testing is part of the delivery cycle, while Quality Assurance is a governance process to ensure overall quality, compliance to (external and internal) requirements, optimization of processes and more. This role includes:

* Analyze quality metrics / data
* Request metrics / data - understand what data will help you understand issues
* Connect with our internal and sometimes external customers to understand issues
* Continuous monitoring of the product performance and data analysis
* Testing
* Report and recommend on quality
* Work with development teams on improvements / issue solving
* Drive pilots and field trials


Location: Malmö, Sweden.

**Who are you?**


To succeed in the role as QA Engineer you need to be socially skilled and communicative since you interact with many various stakeholders. You are not a stranger to work in an advisory role and being able to challenge when needed, as well as guide and coach the delivery teams.

* 2 - 5 years of experience
* experience in Quality Assurance (not the software test role)
* some experience in both IT and products
* analytical - knows how to work with data, ideally has worked with PowerBI or similar before. Can derive business impact from a technical issue
* good team player - easy in connecting with other teams (RnD, IT)
* good communication skills - knows how to report on a complex issue in an understandable way. Can communicate in different forums (technical and managerial).
* works precisely - accurate fact / root cause finding, accurate reporting
* works in a structured way - execute according to the processes we have in our team and in our organization
* You are curious, with a technical interest or background
* Not afraid of hands on technical troubleshooting in Lab environment or in real installations
* Microsoft Office platform
* You are willing to travel
* Good English verbal/written and a plus with Swedish and Spanish

  

Relevant education from a university, college or vocational university is desirable. You have a very good ability to express yourself in speech and writing in English.

**Do we suit you?**


We are building a high-performance organization through investing in our people. We offer a great opportunity to personal development with an environment characterized by humbleness & knowledge sharing and to enhance the on the job training we have a training budget to ensure personal growth. Our bright and open office space is just a 5-minute walk from the Central Station in Malmö, easily accessible and a great location.

  

Interested in learning more about us? Get inspired by our colleagues talking about how it feels to be part of our exciting journey by clicking here


https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pjDxUndJf98

**About Verisure**


Verisure is a global leading provider of professionally monitored security solutions. We are an international company with a start-up mindset, fast, agile, lean, high-performance and value-driven. We protect millions of customers in 18 countries. Our business model integrates product development, design and sales with installation, outstanding service and a 24/7 professional monitoring solution. We protect people from intrusion, fire, and flood - and we save lives.


Over the past years, Verisure has experienced exceptional and resilient financial performance with a very long track record of double-digit growth - thanks to our continuous drive for Innovation, our very sophisticated Go-To-Market approach and our replicable business model for expansion into new countries. We are now supporting the business’s next phase of growth with a robust business plan for value creation. Verisure’s success depends on its people, and we invest in them every day. Working with Verisure is being part of an industry-leading leading world-class company that has a strong entrepreneurial spirit.


Verisure Innovation is an equal-opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from diverse backgrounds. We are an international company with offices and colleagues in multiple countries.
company_description: Verisure, a fast growing company full of career opportunities. Verisure Belgium is part of a global organisation active in 14 countries.

title: Embedded Software Application Engineer
description:
**Company Description**  

Are you looking for a company that offers a variety of assignments and gives you the chance to work with innovation and new technologies? With us at SEGULA Technologies, you will have the opportunity to work on exciting projects and help shape the digital domain while being supported towards your dream career. Skills development is a big part of SEGULA Technologies' DNA and we are always looking for new, ingenious and bold talents. Does this sound exciting? Join us on our journey in a fast growing international company.

 **Job Description**  

We are looking for a **Senior Embedded Software Application Engineer** to join our team. In this role, you will lead electronic and software development activities from concept phase to industrialization, delivering robust and customer-adapted technical solutions for vehicles.


This is a key position where you will drive end-user functions from requirement collection to fully verified and customer-accepted vehicle features.

 **Qualifications** **To succeed in this role, you bring:**

* University degree in Electrical Engineering or a similar technical field
* Minimum 5 years of relevant experience within embedded software engineering
* Extensive experience in software design within trucks, commercial vehicles, or similar automotive domains
* Strong knowledge of E/E systems including E2E functions, telematics, and in-vehicle communication technologies (CAN, LIN, Ethernet)
* Experience in system layouts, function development, and software configuration
* Hands-on experience with tools such as CANalyzer/CANoe, Diadem, Signalyzer, Engineering Tool, Tech Tool, SE Tool, SW Configurator, and KOLA
* Knowledge of automotive standards related to Functional Safety and Cyber Security


**Meritorious**

* Fluent in Swedish
* Experience in Creo or Catia

  

**Additional Information**  

* Stable employment with secure terms under Swedish labor law
* Competitive salary and attractive benefits
* Exciting assignments with leading global companies shaping the future of their industries
* Make a real impact with your expertise, backed by a supportive and experienced consulting organization
* Join a fast-growing community of talented engineers
* A dedicated manager who actively supports your professional growth and career ambitions

  

To thrive in this role we believe that you enjoy working collaboratively and that you are proactive in taking initiative. To apply for this position, you need to have a valid work VISA within the European Union. We embrace diversity and equality and attach great importance to your personal qualities. We are continuously recruiting, so welcome with you application today!
company_description: SEGULA is a gobal engineering group helping boost competitiveness within all of the major industrial sectors.

title: Systems Engineer – ALTEN Sweden in Västerås
description:
We are looking for an experienced **Systems Engineer** who wants to work with advanced, multidisciplinary products and platforms in a high-tech development environment. In this role, you will be a key player in defining system architecture, managing requirements, and ensuring successful integration across hardware, software, and mechanical domains.


You will collaborate with cross-functional teams and contribute to the full system lifecycle — from early concept and requirements definition to verification, validation, and industrialization.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and manage **system architecture and requirements** for complex products
* Translate stakeholder needs into **clear, testable system and sub-system requirements**
* Break down system requirements into **hardware, software, and mechanical specifications**
* Ensure **system consistency, traceability, and compliance** throughout the lifecycle
* Lead and participate in **design reviews** and technical decision forums
* Coordinate cross-functional teams across **electronics, software, mechanics, safety, and manufacturing**
* Manage **interfaces and system integrations**
* Support **verification and validation (V&V)** activities
* Perform **system-level risk analysis** (FMEA, HARA, hazard analysis)
* Ensure compliance with **relevant industry standards and regulations**
* Contribute to **industrialization, change management, and modular system design**



**We are looking for you who have:**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in **Systems Engineering, Electrical/Electronics Engineering, Mechatronics**, or a related field
* **Minimum 4 years of experience** in systems engineering or a similar role
* Strong understanding of:
	+ Systems engineering principles (**V-model, requirements management, system architecture**)
	+ **Hardware–software–mechanical integration**
	+ **Embedded and distributed systems**
* Experience with requirements management tools such as **DOORS, Polarion, Jama, or Codebeamer**
* Knowledge of **system verification & validation methodologies**
* Familiarity with **functional safety and reliability concepts**
* **Professional proficiency in English (required)**

**It would be a great plus if you have:**

  

* Experience in **automotive or commercial vehicle systems**
* Knowledge of **ISO 26262** and/or **IEC 61508**
* Experience with railway standards **EN 50126 / 50128 / 50129**
* Exposure to **electrification systems, power distribution, battery systems, or charging infrastructure**
* Experience with **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** tools such as **SysML, Enterprise Architect, or Cameo**
* Understanding of **cybersecurity requirements** for industrial or vehicle systems
* Familiarity with **PLM and configuration management systems**
* Experience working in **global, cross-functional development teams**
* **Fluency in Swedish (considered a strong plus)**

*Don’t wait to apply — we’re actively reviewing candidates as applications come in.*

**What we offer you?**


Every employee is equally valuable in the success of ALTEN! We believe in growing together by offering opportunities, development and togetherness.


ALTEN operates in several different industries, having a wide variety of assignments, coaching managers and training through ALTEN Academy, which means that it will always be possible to develop at ALTEN. Your wishes will guide your way forward.


As a consultant, you will get the genuine team feeling at your assignment but also a wonderful togetherness at ALTEN. Through our different internal networks, such as Women@ALTEN and ALTEN Sports you will get the opportunity to drive topics and activities that are close to your heart. At ALTEN, we think it’s important to have a balance between work and spare time, which is why we offer three extra days off a year. We have a collective agreement and offer benefits like pension, insurances and wellness grants.

**About ALTEN**


ALTEN is one of Europe’s largest technology and IT consulting companies with over 57,000 employees in nearly 30 countries. Our engineers carry out complex and highly technical projects throughout the value chain of the most prestigious companies in all sectors, such as Automotive, Defense, Energy & Environment, Industry, Public services & Government and Life Sciences. In Sweden, we are about 1300 committed employees with 9 offices in 9 cities – from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north.


 For the fifth year in a row, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden’s most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, an award for employers that offer unique career and development opportunities.


Welcome to read more about us at alten.se

  

For any HR-related questions or request regarding a job application, please select the ‘Recruitment’ category in “Contact us”.

 04/03/2026


Västerås
REKRYTERING KONTAKT


 ALTEN Sweden

title: Test Engineer Automotive
description:
Sweden Mechatronics Gothenburg Hybrid
We are on the hunt for Test Engineers with automotive experience to work with industry-leading clients on the next generation of mobility solutions!

  


About The Member Company
We are a global high-tech consultancy company with a team of entrepreneurial engineers, scientists, and digital experts from around the world. Together we form a fast-growing and proud community. We offer consultancy services to high-profile clients globally in diverse service areas, such as:


* Technology & Engineering
* Energy & Renewables
* Life sciences & Pharma
* Digital & IT
**About this vacancy**
----------------------


You will be responsible for conducting test engineering activities across multiple abstraction layers, including component, system, and complete vehicle function levels. Your work will involve test analysis, planning, method definition, and execution, ensuring high-quality testing processes and results.


Key Responsibilities:

* Perform test execution in various environments, such as HIL, SIL, VIL, and real-world vehicle testing.
* Take responsibility for fault tracing, administrative traceability, and coverage analysis.
* Collaborate across different test infrastructures and support integration and technical alignment.
* Work with test assets, including Boxcar, CANalyzer, CANoe, INCA, DSA, CarConfig, and CarCom.
* Ensure the readiness and quality of test processes and support agile working methodologies.


**What we expect from you**
---------------------------


An Employneur that is a collaborative team player who believes in the power of positive influence. Embracing change, you continually seek innovative and improved approaches to tasks. Experience within any below is desirable:

* 2+ years of experience in test engineering within the automotive industry.
* Experience in component, domain, and complete vehicle testing.
* Proficiency with test tools such as CANalyzer, CANoe, INCA, DSA.
* Strong skills in fault tracing and troubleshooting.
* Fluent in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.


Meritorious Qualifications:

* Experience in embedded software development, including proficiency in C, Python, MATLAB, TargetLink, or Ascet.
* A hands-on mindset—you're not afraid to get involved in practical testing and troubleshooting.
* A genuine passion for the automotive industry and a strong drive to stay at the forefront of its technological advancements.


**What you can expect from us**
-------------------------------


In the role as an Employeneur, you will have the opportunity to both develop your technical skills and drive your own growth and business. We place great emphasis on your personal commitment and your willingness to advance your development. To support you with this, you will have the chance to influence the type of projects you take and the professional development you want to invest in. In other words, you are in control of your career.

  

Since TMC is an international company, we can offer projects in various locations across different countries where we and our clients operate. Currently, we are represented in Sweden, the Netherlands, Belgium, France, Luxembourg, Spain, Portugal, Italy, Hungary, the U.A.E., the USA, and Canada. The world is your workplace!


#LI-LM4


The 5 basic principles of **employeneurship**
A long-term working relationship
Enjoy the security of a long-term contract and a stable source of income while getting the opportunity to work at diverse projects.


Individual profit sharing
Full transparency. That’s it. For each of your projects, you know your hourly rate, your costs, and your individual performance-based profit sharing, all in order to stimulate your inner entrepreneur.


Business cells
Our employeneurs are grouped in business cells based on their technical expertise. They are small, focused and function as high-grade knowledge networks. And as buzzing communities of close colleagues.


YOUniversity
Every employeneur drives their own career. Together, we make a plan for personal and professional growth. Receive personal coaching and an extensive training budget to keep developing yourself and deliver outperformance at our clients.

  

The Entrepreneurial Lab
Work on your technical dreams in our lab. Collaborate with others in multidisciplinary teams to unlock out-of-the-box thinking and innovative ideas as well as entrepreneurial skills.
company_description: At TMC we believe it's people who drive technology. Our Employeneurship model creates the best conditions for technical talents to do so.

title: Applied AI Engineer
description:
At Intrum, you will grow by making a difference. You will do it in a highly international environment and in a supportive culture where effort counts.

**Are you our new AI Engineer?**


Intrum is the industry-leading provider of credit management services across 20 markets in Europe. By helping companies to get paid and support people with their late payments, Intrum leads the way to a sound economy and plays a critical role in society at large.  

Intrum has circa 9,000 employees who serve around 70,000 companies across Europe


Intrum AI defines how AI solutions are built, governed, and scaled responsibly across the Group. We advise senior leadership on AI strategy and execution while developing scalable capabilities that enable Intrum to deploy solutions sustainably across markets.


We are hiring Applied AI Engineers across multiple seniority levels - from strong individual contributors to senior technical leaders.

**What will you do:**


As an Applied AI Engineer, you will design, build, and scale AI-powered solutions operating in production environments across multiple countries. This role combines hands-on engineering with cross-functional collaboration in a regulated enterprise setting.


You will contribute to both solution delivery and the broader standardization of how AI is industrialized across Intrum.


Senior-level candidates are expected to influence architectural direction, define technical standards, and act as trusted advisors across markets.

* Design and implement AI-driven solutions and workflows.
* Integrate LLMs and other AI services into enterprise production systems.
* Develop reusable solution patterns and shared components.
* Partner with the Infrastructure / LLMOps team to operationalize AI solutions, including model and prompt deployment, observability, evaluation frameworks, governance, cost control, and reliability at scale.
* Establish and maintain CI/CD pipelines for AI services and artifacts, including automated testing, evaluation gates, versioning (code, configuration, prompts), and controlled promotion across environments.
* Collaborate with local market teams to enable scalable, repeatable deployments.
* Contribute to engineering standards and best practices for AI at scale, including security, compliance, monitoring, and release processes

**What we’re looking for:**

* Strong software engineering fundamentals.
* Experience building and operating production-grade systems.
* Exposure to AI/ML or LLM-based solution development.
* Experience working in structured, multi-stakeholder environments.
* Strong communication skills and a high level of ownership.
* Senior-Level Expectations.
* Lead architectural design and contribute to technical standard-setting.
* Demonstrated track record delivering AI solutions in production.
* Advise and guide cross-market implementations.
* Lead complex, multi-stakeholder initiatives.
* Influence engineering and business stakeholders on AI design and scaling decisions.

**What we offer:**

At Intrum we offer not only a challenging and rewarding career but also:

* A challenging, exciting and developing position in an international company with growth ambitions
* Highly motivated and skilled co-workers globally
* Being part of a supportive culture where effort counts
* We facilitate your learning through different learning arenas

**How to apply**: If you are interested in this position and believe you have the right qualifications, please send your English CV and a cover letter via the “apply button”


\*\*Please note that as a multinational company, our Global Talent Acquisition Partner is based in Spain. You might receive a call with a Spanish phone number.\*\*


At Intrum we strive to create a diverse and inclusive workplace. We encourage applicants from all backgrounds to apply.


Do you feel that you might be the right person? Great! Apply now. Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Associate Mechanical Plant Design Engineer
description:
**Location:**

Ludvika, Dalarna County, Sweden
**Job ID:**

R0099564
**Date Posted:**

2026-03-04
**Company Name:**

HITACHI ENERGY SWEDEN AB
**Profession (Job Category):**

Engineering & Science
**Job Schedule:**

Full time
**Remote:**

No
**Job Description:**

**The opportunity**

The Mechanical Plant Design team, part of HVDC, is now looking for an Associate Mechanical Plant Design Engineer to join. You are welcome into our energetic team with mix of experienced and young engineers and colleagues from diverse nationalities around the world. We work closely within the various design teams and collaborate with engineering and research teams in Sweden and abroad.


*"Our team is highly supportive and excels at sharing knowledge. We are looking for someone who can further strengthen this cooperative spirit, so if you thrive in a collaborative environment and value teamwork, this could be the perfect opportunity for you."* - Hiring Manager Daniel Granat


**How you’ll make an impact**

* Evaluate, select and apply standard techniques and procedures to perform station layout design in 3D modelling in parts and assemblies. 2D drafting for drawings and layouts and make sure they are delivered on time and meet quality and safety standards.
* Correctly use design principles, guidelines and applicable standards that are used within mechanical plant design of HVDC stations, onshore and offshore.
* Prepare and propose/present for example bill of materials, estimated engineering hours, general project documentation.
* Interact with customers, suppliers, contractors and internal departments to achieve the scope of deliveries.

**Your background**

* A degree in Mechanical Engineering or related discipline.
* Knowledge in 3D-Modeling and preforming 2D-drawings/layouts in Software tools NX/TC.
* A high level of self-motivation, curiosity and desire to learn about new Technologies.
* A collaborative, solutions-oriented approach and strong communication skills.
* Proficiency in English is required, knowledge in Swedish is a great advantage.

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement.
* Flexible working time.
* Health care and wellness allowance.
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally.
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase.
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development.
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden.
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave.
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks.

**More about Us**

The preferred location for the role is Ludvika and requires frequent presence at our office, especially in the first 6 months up to a year. We also have offices in other locations in Sweden where it’s possible to work from after the initial onboarding.  



Are you ready for an exciting new challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Welcome to apply! Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis so don’t delay – apply today!  



Recruiting Manager Daniel Granat, daniel.granat@hitachienergy.com will answer your questions about the position. All other questions can be directed to Talent Partner Nicole Bergman, nicole.bergman@hitachienergy.com


Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Mikael Hjort, +46 107-38 29 86; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, +46 107 38 70 43; Unionen: Fredrik Holmgren, +46 107-38 21 85


**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**
